items.description: Thermite-based incendiary mixtures are a mixture of aluminum powder and iron oxide. These compounds have a very high combustion temperature and are capable of burning without the presence of oxygen. Thermite has an extremely strong burning effect and is almost impossible to extinguish.

items.name: Ratchet wrench
items.description: Ratchets are an indispensable tool that every locksmith and mechanic at a service station should have for car maintenance. Allows you to work in a confined space. Has the ability to quickly change working heads. A proper instrument!

items.name: TP-200 TNT brick
items.description: TP-200 is intended for use as charges in the production of seismic surveys, intermediate detonators when initiating borehole explosive charges, crushing oversized items and performing special blasting operations.

The carbine has shown exceptional reliability, which, together with the classic ergonomics of the AR system, gives an excellent example of a firearm. This variant features a fully automatic firing mode, for Law Enforcement and Millitary use only.

items.name: Mk47 254mm barrel
items.description: A 254mm long barrel for the CMMG Mk47 Mutant assault rifle, chambered in 7.62x39mm.

items.name: Mk47 409mm barrel
items.description: A 409mm long barrel for the CMMG Mk47 Mutant assault rifle, chambered in 7.62x39mm.

items.description: The Resolute upper receiver for Mk47 Mutant assault rifle, chambered in 7.62x39mm. Equipped with a mount for attaching additional devices. Manufactured by CMMG.

items.name: Mk47 ambidextrous charging handle
items.description: A charging handle for the Mk47 Mutant assault rifle. Ambidextrous latches allow for easy operation no matter which hand you use to charge the weapon. Manufactured by CMMG.

items.name: AR-10 CMMG SV Brake 7.62x51 muzzle brake
items.description: The CMMG SV Brake muzzle compensator is an effective single port brake designed specifically for .308 caliber AR-10 weapon systems. The large port presents a broad surface for gasses to impact against, which keeps the muzzle down and the sights on target.

items.name: AR-10 CMMG low profile gas block
items.description: A low-profile gas block designed for AR-10 weapon systems and the Mk47 Mutant assault rifle. Manufactured by CMMG.

items.name: MP-155 12ga semi-automatic shotgun
items.description: The Russian MP-155 smoothbore multi-shot 12 gauge shotgun, manufactured by IzhMekh ("Izhevsky Mechanical Plant"). The gun weighs less than its predecessor MP-153 and features enhanced ergonomics and an easy-to-replace barrel mechanism. The new design also makes it easier to use for left-handed users.

items.description: The SilencerCo ASR 5.56x45 flash hider is an effective flash suppressor that also serves as a platform for attaching the SilencerCo Saker 556 sound suppressor. Can be installed on AR-15 weapon systems.

items.name: SilencerCo Saker ASR 556 5.56x45 sound suppressor

items.name: Valday Krechet reflex sight

items.name: VOMZ Pilad TargetRing reflex sight
items.description:
Designed for hunting birds or small game, for sport shooting at stationary or fast-moving targets. Ideal for this purpose, it creates a contrasting circle on the target, giving the shooter an opportunity to make the pre-direction and not to lose speed.
It is mounted only on smoothbore (shotgun) weapons.

items.name: Torrey Pines Logic T12W 30Hz thermal reflex sight
items.description: A compact termal reflex sight with a low frequency. Manufactured by Torrey Pines Logic.

items.name: NFM THOR Concealable Reinforced Vest body armor
items.description: The THOR Concealable Reinforced Vest enables the overt or covert carrying of soft ballistic panels providing 360 degrees protection against high-speed fragments and handgun ammunition. Adding hard ballistic plates enables protection against rifle ammunition for the vital organs. The ergonomic shape of the soft ballistic panels and the position of the back plate combined with the integrated lumbar support belt provides comfort and stability close to the body’s center of mass. Manufactured by NFM.

items.name: Crye Precision AVS plate carrier (Tagilla Edition)
items.description: Tagilla's well-worn plate carrier based on the AVS module system by Crye Precision. Equipped with a front panel with three magazine pouches. And that's pretty much it. Nothing more, nothing less.

items.name: SIG Sauer ROMEO8T reflex sight
items.description: The ROMEO8T reflex sight, designed for precision shooting for modern sporting rifles and shotguns. Manufactured by SIG Sauer.

items.name: Hazard 4 Drawbridge backpack (Coyote Tan)

Fully-ambidextrous operating controls instantly adapt the SCAR to any user or any shooting position. The receiver-integrated optical rail plus three accessory rails enable mounting of a wide variety of scopes, electronic sights, tactical lights and lasers. Manufactured by Fabrique Nationale Herstal. items.name: HK USP .45 ACP pistol

This particular variant is chambered in .45 ACP. Manufactured by Heckler & Koch.

items.name: 5.45x39mm 7N40
items.description: The newest legendary 5.45x39mm 7N40 cartridge with a 4.2 gram armor-piercing bullet with a pointed hardened carbon steel core over a lead base with a bimetallic jacket, in a steel case. Made as part of the Ratnik program together with 7N39 PPBS "Igolnik". It is capable of piercing through basic and intermediate ballistic body protections, however, due to its design, it has a significant bounce probability on various surfaces.

items.name: 9x39mm PAB-9 gs
items.description: A 9x39mm PAB-9 gs special cartridge with a 17.2 gram subsonic armor-piercing bullet with an extended hardened carbon steel core with a two-layer semi-jacket, a lead interior and a bimetallic exterior, in a steel case. The PAB-9 (Patrón Avtomátnyy Bronebóynyy - "Armor-piercing Cartridge for Automatic rifles") is a modified version of the SP-6 cartridge. It has a heavier bullet and a higher muzzle velocity, making it capable of piercing through basic and intermediate ballistic body protections in addition of providing outstanding results against some specialized protection models, and having a considerable stopping power effect, at the cost of deterioration in its accuracy and having a high probability of bouncing off various surfaces. In the ranks of the special forces of the Russian Federation, it is not recommended for use due to the increased negative impact on the resource of the weapon.

items.name: .300 Blackout V-Max
items.description: A .300 Blackout (7.62x35mm) V-Max cartridge with a 7.1 gram lead core polymer tipped expansive bullet with a copper metal jacket, in a brass case. This bullet features a ballistic tip that improves its accuracy and acts as a wedge on the lead core upon impact, allowing the bullet to expand and cause considerable damage on the target. Despite the peculiarity of its design, it is able to pierce basic ballistic body protections. Its design also allows it to be used in STANAG 5.56x45mm NATO magazines without any problem.

items.name: .300 Whisper
items.description: The Whisper cartridge is a lightweight, hyper velocity design using an aluminum core and pre-stressed jacket. The aluminum core initiates the expansion slightly after contact, pressing back into the pre-stressed jacket and activating a violent, incapacitating energy transfer. The cartridge is ideal for close fire contacts of unarmored and/or lightly armored targets. Not to be mistaken for .300 Blackout, since Whisper was developed almost 20 years before it.

items.name: .300 Blackout M62 Tracer
items.description: A .300 Blackout (7.62x35mm) M62 Tracer cartridge loaded with a 9.2 gram tracer bullet from a 7.62x51mm NATO M62 cartridge, composed of a lead-antimony alloy core with a bimetallic jacket, in a brass case; intended for target designation and fire adjustment in battle (Trace color: Red). Despite the bullet's own characteristics when used in a full-power cartridge, these are affected when transferred to an intermediate cartridge, still, the bullet continues to have capabilities to pierce basic ballistic body protections as well as some intermediate models. However, it has a high bounce probability off various surfaces. Its design also allows it to be used in STANAG 5.56x45mm NATO magazines without any issues.

It was accepted into service with the Bundeswehr in 1997, replacing the G3. Since then, it has also been a popular export, and the G36 has seen active service in military and police units in several countries, including Germany, Spain, and the United Kingdom.

The bullet in this cartridge has an outstanding stopping power effect thanks to its exceptional ability to expand upon impact, as well as being able to cause severe adverse effects on the target after impact. Likewise, its design increases its penetration capabilities against some models of basic ballistic body protection.

items.name: .357 Magnum JHP

The bullet in this cartridge is designed to expand shortly after impacting the target, allowing it to pierce through basic ballistic body protections and provide a considerable stopping power effect, as well as being able to cause severe adverse effects on the target after impact.

items.name: .357 Magnum SP

The bullet in this cartridge has an excellent expansion and impact energy that gives it a superior stopping power effect for its caliber, as well as being able to cause severe adverse effects on the target upon impact and provide recoil reduction, making it an excellent choice for hunting.

items.name: Milkor M2A1 grenade launcher reflex sight

The built-in light sensor dims the reticle during daylight hours and allows for a brighter reticle during night time operations. The M2A1 reflex sight enhances the overall capabilities and usage of the MUSA MSGLs.

items.name: AK-545 rear sight
items.description: A standard rear sight for AK-545 carbines, manufactured by Sureshot Armament Group.

items.name: S&S Precision PlateFrame plate carrier (Goons Edition)
items.description: A plate carrier with a minimalistic, lightweight, semi rigid plastic design, which was configured by Big Pipe - member of the Goons squad. Manufactured by S&S Precision.

items.name: AK-545 buffer tube
items.description: Sureshot Armament Group Receiver Extension Buffer Tube, 6-position, Mil-Spec diameter, designed specifically for AK-545.

items.description: A standard-issue dust cover for AK-545 carbines, manufactured by Sureshot Armament Group.

items.name: SAG AK-545 Short 5.45x39 carbine
items.description: A shortened version of the Sureshot Armament Group AK-545 carbine based on modern AK platforms.

items.name: Crye Precision CPC plate carrier (Goons Edition)
items.description: The CAGE PLATE CARRIER (CPC) offers unrivaled comfort and load support in a low profile plate carrier configuration. The system supports a range of different pouches. In this case, the configuration is made by the leader of the Goons squad - Knight - for conducting assault operations with increased mobility.

items.name: LBT-1961A Load Bearing Chest Rig (Goons Edition)
items.description: A tactical load-bearing system designed to carry magazines, grenades, and special equipment, while using low-profile body armor. Manufactured by London Bridge Trading. Special configuration by Birdeye, member of the Goons squad.

items.name: Mystery Ranch NICE COMM 3 BVS frame system (Coyote)
items.description: The NICE Frame special system for carrying oversized or heavy loads with an installed COMM 3 backpack for carrying radio systems. The COMM 3 main bay is designed for PRC117F or G, PRC119F, 152, or ASIP radios. The Hitchhiker and Daypack lid allows you to carry separate gear if needed. The modular NICE COMM 3 system is ready to adapt to changing tasks. An extremely rare thing, for which a real hunt is conducted in Tarkov.

items.name: AK TangoDown Battle Grip pistol grip (FDE)
items.description: A lightweight pistol grip for AK assault rifles, manufactured by TangoDown. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: Tasmanian Tiger SK plate carrier (MultiCam Black)
items.description: The ultra-light and skeletal TT Plate Carrier SK vest is made primarily from lightweight, thin and durable TPU-laminated Cordura nylon material with a claimed density of at least 700 denier. The design of the vest provides two lightweight covers for plates, adjustable shoulder straps and a light waist jumper. Equipped with a front panel for 4 magazines.

items.name: NPP KlASS Bagariy plate carrier (EMR)
items.description: In the second millennium, the equipment of a soldier received serious changes in view of new threats and tasks. A better level of protection was required, so the Russian army needed a reliable and functional body armor. In the mid-2000s, the MVD, which was later reorganized into the Russian Guard, received Bagariy bulletproof vests. Bagariy was used both by ordinary soldiers of the internal troops, and in special forces. Actively was used by PMC BEAR as the main heavy body armor.

items.name: ECLiPSE RBAV-AF plate carrier (Ranger Green)
items.description: The BAE ECLiPSE RBAV (Releasable Body Armor Vest, Air Force) variant is designed specifically for the Guardian Angel Weapon System (USAF PJ) and contains several new features not found in other versions.

items.name: Gruppa 99 T30 backpack (Black)
items.description: A thirty-liter assault backpack from Gruppa 99. A high-quality solution for conducting special raid operations. Black version.

items.name: Big Pipe's bandana
items.description: Big Pipe's personal headgear. A black bandana with the Goons squad identification symbol.

items.name: Peltor ComTac IV Hybrid headset (Coyote Brown)
items.description: The ComTac IV Hybrid Communication Headset is designed to help reduce exposure to hazardous levels of noise, improve situational awareness and at the same time enable two-way radio communication in noisy environments. The headset's electronics are contained completely inside the headset housing, eliminating the need for a large, heavy external radio control box. The headband mechanically stabilizes the headset to help relieve issues of earplugs dislodging from cable snags and body movement. Designed for comfortable use with a ballistic helmet.

items.name: Death Knight mask
items.description: A unique mask of the commander of the Goons squad, former USEC operators who decided not to flee Tarkov, but to create their own order.

Glock 19X is a hybrid of the Glock 17 and Glock 19 models: bolt and barrel of the 19th model, and the long handle of the very first 17th model. Also, the Glock 19X is devoid of sub-finger recesses, but has a loop for a safety cord. The gun is made in the Coyote color.

items.description: Steyr AUG A3 is a 5.56x45 bullpup assault rifle, developed by the Austrian company Steyr-Daimler-Puch. AUG is known for good ergonomics, decent accuracy, low recoil and sufficient reliability. The rifle also stands out for its futuristic design. The A3 version features a bolt-catch button.

items.name: Steyr AUG A1 5.56x45 16 inch barrel
items.description: A barrel for Steyr AUG A1 designed for 5.56x45 NATO ammo, 16 inches (417mm) long.

items.name: Zryachiy's balaclava (folded)
items.description: An intimidating face mask with a skull print, worn by Zryachiy. Folded to be worn as a hat.

items.name: Hexatac HPC Plate Carrier (MultiCam Black)
items.description: A plate carrier by Hexatac. A minimalistic version designed to be used with chest rigs. MultiCam Black version.

items.name: PM bakelite grip
items.description: A standard-issue bakelite grip panel for the PM pistol.

items.name: PM pistol slide
items.description: A standard-issue slide for Makarov Pistol 9x18.

items.name: PM FAB Defense PM-G pistol grip
items.description: A PM grip by FAB Defense with a built-in magazine release mechanism that turns the Soviet classic into a modern handy pistol, significantly improving ergonomics.

items.name: Obdolbos 2 cocktail injector
items.description: A syringe with a homemade drug, developed by Sanitar. A new version of the old classic. Looks like TerraGroup Labs' experiments did not end with the closure of TerraGroup Labs itself.

items.name: SJ12 TGLabs combat stimulant injector
items.description: Developed for the operatives of special units. Slows down some functions of the body and they temporarily start working with energy regeneration. The drug forces the release of vasopressin in the hypothalamus, which leads to a change in the work of the adrenal glands, lowers body temperature and increases perception. After the end of the action, there is usually a jump in temperature to 40-42 degrees as a compensation for the incorrect functioning of the body systems.

items.name: PNB (Product 16) stimulant injector
items.description: A combat stimulant. Developed by TerraGroup Labs, labeled PNB. Allows a short-term activation of the inner muscles, bringing them into a state of hypertonicity, which in turn reduces the received damage. At the same time there is an active synthesis of proteins for accelerated tissue regeneration. Used for the expansion of the organism abilities at the key moment of the combat. Allowed for use by Special Forces. Has some side effects.

items.name: Trimadol stimulant injector
items.description: An opioid synthetic analgesic developed for special forces operatives. It has a central and spinal cord action (promotes opening of K+ and Ca2+ channels, causes hyperpolarization of membranes and inhibits conduction of pain impulses). In addition to the analgesic effect, it increases combat characteristics. Overdose leads to exhaustion of the body after the effects wear off.

items.name: Perfotoran (Blue Blood) stimulant injector
items.description: A blood substitute with the function of oxygen transfer, used as a powerful antidote capable of relieving toxins, poisons, and radiation damage. It was developed by Soviet scientists in the 1980s. It is a submicron emulsion based on PFO compounds. Once in the blood, it temporarily speeds up the metabolism and regenerates tissues. Negatively affects health in case of overdose or rejection.

items.name: PM Tactic Kit pistol grip
items.description: An ergonomic Makarov Pistol grip. Provides a comfortable grip and allows installation of additional accessories under the barrel. Manufactured by Gun Custom Tuning.

items.name: SR-2M pistol grip (Plum)
items.description: A standard-issue pistol grip for SR-2M "Veresk". Manufactured by TsNIItochmash. Made out of plum-colored polymer, earning the nickname "Sliva" (Plum).

items.name: SR-2M polymer handguard (Black)
items.description: A standard-issue SR-2M "Veresk" polymer handguard for burn protection. Manufactured by TsNIItochmash. Black version.

items.name: SR-2M pistol grip (Black)
items.description: A standard-issue pistol grip for SR-2M "Veresk". Manufactured by TsNIItochmash. Black version.

items.description: A carbine length lower handguard part manufactured by Colt, a standard-issue handguard for the M4A1 assault rifles.

items.description: The Thor PSR XL sound suppressor is designed for use with 7.62x51 NATO rounds, but is also compatible with several other calibers. Requires an AWC PSR muzzle brake for installation. Manufactured by AWC Silencers.

items.name: Pack of Arseniy buckwheat
items.description: There is nothing more valuable in a difficult time than buckwheat. Granular gold, food of the gods.

items.name: Aquapeps water purification tablets
items.description: These tablets are used to prepare drinking water potentially contaminated with pathogens.

items.name: Electronic components
items.description: Various components and parts of electronics required for the repair and production of devices and systems.

items.description: A printed circuit board from microcontrollers. A consumable in the production of various advanced far-forward electronics components.

items.name: Far-forward GPS Signal Amplifier Unit
items.description: A configurable low noise GPS amplifier module with pre-filtering and wide input voltage range.

items.name: Advanced current converter
items.description: A DC/DC converter that provides a regulated DC voltage. Using voltage converters makes it possible to eliminate malfunctions in the system. This converter has increased physical security and quality of components, which allows it to be used in highly loaded systems with increased physical impact factors.

items.description: The AVT-40 partially compensated for the lack of handguns and submachine guns at the beginning of WW2. The AVT-40 is similar to the SVT-40 in its design, but due to the presence of a fire selector, the role of which is played by the safety lever, it can fire both single and automatic fire.

items.name: SVT-40 Tokarev PU mount

items.name: Tokarev SVT-40 7.62x54R rifle
items.description: The SVT-40 was the only mass-produced personal weapon in the early years of WW2, before the mass production of submachine guns began. The soldiers affectionately called this rifle "Sveta". When "Sveta" went to the troops, it turned out that not all Red Army soldiers were able to truly master this weapon. The SVT was best used by marine infantry units and snipers. The production of SVT-40 continued until the end of the war, and this semi-automatic rifle made an important contribution to the overall victory.

items.description: The VSK-94 (Voyskovoy Snayperskiy Kompleks - "Military Sniper Complex") is a marksman rifle designed on the base of the 9A-91 assault rifle as a cheaper alternative to the VSS "Vintorez". The silencer, unlike the VSS, is not integrated, which allows the rifle to be used without it if needed. Manufactured by Tula KBP Instrument Design Bureau.

items.name: Kalashnikov PKM 7.62x54R machine gun
items.description: PKM (Pulemyot Kalashnikova Modernizirovanny - "Kalashnikov's Machine Gun Modernized") is a modernized version of Kalashnikov PK machine gun, operating with 7.62x54R ammunition. The PKM proved to be a powerful, simple, reliable and effective weapon. It was in demand for many decades, starting from the late 60s of the last century and up to the present time. Manufactured by V.A. Degtyarev Plant.

items.name: AK Custom Guns CG101 AR-type pistol grip adapter
items.description: An adapter that allows AR-type pistol grips installation on the AK rifles. Manufactured by Custom Guns.

items.name: PM FAB Defense PM-G pistol grip (Olive Drab)
items.description: A PM grip by FAB Defense with a built-in magazine release mechanism that turns the Soviet classic into a modern handy pistol, significantly improving ergonomics. Olive Drab version.

items.name: PK Zenit B-50 handguard
items.description: The B-50 integrally-machined handguard made of D16T alloy for Kalashnikov Machine gun. Allows installation of additional equipment and handgrips. Manufactured by Zenit.

items.name: PK Zenit B-50 16mm top mount
items.description: The B-50 16mm mount for Kalashnikov Machine gun. Features a Weaver rail for installation of various scopes. Manufactured by Zenit.

items.name: PK Zenit B-50 66mm top mount
items.description: The B-50 66mm mount for Kalashnikov Machine gun. Features a Weaver rail for installation of various scopes. Manufactured by Zenit.

items.name: PK Zenit PT-2 "Klassika" stock
items.description: The PT-2 telescopic stock made of aluminum alloy D16T replaces the standard PK stock, has a length adjustment mechanism and height adjustable cheek. Manufactured by Zenit.

items.name: PKP polymer stock
items.description: A standard-issue stock for PKP "Pecheneg" machine gun. Manufactured by V.A. Degtyarev Plant.

items.name: PK Zenit DTK-1P 7.62x54R muzzle brake
items.description: The DTK-1P muzzle brake, designed for installation on PK, PKM, and PKP machine guns. Manufactured by Zenit.

items.name: PKM 7.62x54R slotted flash hider
items.description: A standard-issue flash hider for Kalashnikov Machine gun. Manufactured by V.A. Degtyarev Plant.

items.name: PKM 7.62x54R muzzle brake
items.description: A standard-issue muzzle brake-compensator for Kalashnikov Machine gun. Manufactured by V.A. Degtyarev Plant.

items.name: PK rear sight
items.description: A standard-issue rear sight for Kalashnikov Machine gun. Manufactured by V.A. Degtyarev Plant.

items.name: AK Custom Arms ST-EF 74 skeleton stock extension
items.description: A buttpad that extends the length of the standard metal frame folding buttstock of the AK-platform weapons. The advantage of this extension is that the width of the pad is equal to the width of the AK-100 series plastic pad. The buttpad adds comfort when shooting and reduces the recoil effect. Manufactured by Custom Arms.

items.name: AK Vector VR-05T 7.62x39 muzzle brake
items.description: A muzzle brake for AK 7.62x39 assault rifles and compatibles. Manufactured by Vector 7.62.

items.name: AR-15 WDR NERO 556 5.56x45 muzzle brake
items.description: The NERO 556 5.56x45 Muzzle Brake from Walker Defense Research reduces recoil and muzzle flip by directing gases upward and to the side.

items.name: Kalashnikov AK-12 5.45x39 assault rifle
items.description: The Kalashnikov AK-12 5.45 automatic rifle is the primary model of individual small arms for personnel of motorized and other units of the Russian Armed Forces. The AK-12 is a part of the Ratnik equipment system.

items.name: AK-12 gas tube
items.description: A standard-issue gas tube for AK-12 automatic rifles. Gas tubes channel the travel direction of gas piston.

items.name: AK-12 handguard
items.description: A standard-issue handguard for AK-12 automatic rifles. Manufactured by Izhmash.

items.name: AK-12 5.45x39 muzzle brake
items.description: A standard-issue muzzle brake for AK-12 automatic rifles. Manufactured by Izhmash.

items.name: AK-12 rear sight
items.description: A detachable rear sight for AK-12 automatic rifles. Manufactured by Izhmash.

items.name: AK-12 rear sight base
items.description: A detachable base for rear sights, installed on AK-12 automatic rifles. Manufactured by Izhmash.

items.name: AK-12 railed dust cover
items.description: A standard receiver dust cover with integrated Picatinny rail for AK-12 automatic rifles. Manufactured by Izhmash.

items.name: AK-12 5.45x39 early model 30-round magazine
items.description: An early model of 30-round polymer magazine with windows for ammunition control, for 5.45x39 cartridge for AK-12 and compatible rifles. Manufactured by Izhmash.

items.name: AK-12 buffer tube
items.description: A standard-issue buffer tube for AK-12 automatic rifles, manufactured by Izhmash.

items.name: WARTECH TV-115 plate carrier (Olive Drab)
items.description: Operational armor system TV-115 with high-density polyethylene (class 3) plates, protecting only the chest and the back. Manufactured by WARTECH.

items.name: Eagle Allied Industries MBSS plate carrier (Coyote Brown)
items.description: The MBSS vest is part of the Maritime Ballistic Survivor System. The vest can be used with flotation inserts to provide buoyancy as it is not equipped with a quick release system. Manufactured by Eagle Allied Industries.

items.name: Interceptor OTV body armor (UCP)
items.description: The Interceptor vest consists of a fabric Outer Tactical Vest (OTV) with dorsal and thoracic pockets and two protective ceramic-composite SAPI or ESAPI inserts. The Outer Tactical Vest (OTV) is a basic vest equipped with aramid fabric pouches that protect against ammunition fragments and 9mm handgun bullets.

items.description: A 20-round package of 7.62x39 FMJ cartridges.

items.description: A 20-round package of 7.62x39 PP gzh cartridges.

items.description: A 20-round package of 7.62x39 SP cartridges.

items.name: 7.62x39mm T-45M1 gzh ammo pack (20 pcs)
items.description: A 20-round package of 7.62x39 T-45M1 gzh cartridges.

items.name: 7.62x39mm US gzh ammo pack (20 pcs)
items.description: A 20-round package of 7.62x39 US gzh cartridges.

items.name: 7.62x39mm BP gzh ammo pack (20 pcs)
items.description: A 20-round package of 7.62x39 BP gzh cartridges.

items.name: 7.62x39mm HP ammo pack (20 pcs)
items.description: A 20-round package of 7.62x39 HP cartridges.

items.name: 7.62x54mm R SP BT gzh ammo pack (20 pcs)
items.description: A 20-round pack of 7.62x54mm R SP BT cartridges.

items.name: 7.62x54mm R FMJ ammo pack (20 pcs)
items.description: A 20-round pack of 7.62x54R FMJ cartridges.

items.name: 4.6x30mm JSP SX ammo pack (40 pcs)
items.description: A pack of 4.6x30mm JSP SX ammo, 40 rounds.

items.name: 9x19mm FMJ M882 ammo pack (30 pcs)
items.description: A pack of 9x19mm FMJ M882 ammo, 30 rounds.

items.name: 7.62x54mm R HP BT ammo pack (20 pcs)
items.description: A 20-round pack of 7.62x54R HP BT cartridges.

items.name: Granit Br5 ballistic plate
items.description: Granit Br5 ballistic plates are unified for use in both chest and back sections of the body armor. Features improved ergonomic characteristics: anatomical shape and division into two panels provides an optimal fit to the user's figure, increasing the comfort of use.

items.name: Granit ballistic plate (Side)
items.description: Granit Side is a ceramic ballistic plate for torso side pouches of Russian bulletproof vests and plate carriers.

items.name: ESBI level IV ballistic plate (Side)
items.description: Enhanced Side Ballistic Inserts (ESBI) is a ceramic ballistic plate for torso side plate pouches.

items.name: ESAPI level IV ballistic plate
items.description: Enhanced Small Arms Protective Insert (ESAPI) is a ceramic ballistic plate for torso front and back pouches of plate carrier.

items.name: 4.6x30mm JSP SX
items.description: Fibonacci 40gr. Jacketed Soft Point Ammo for the 4.6x30 HK caliber. This round is designed along the same lines as the 5.7x28 round. The jacketed soft point makes this a viable varmint and small game round. Usable in the H&K MP7. This ammo is brass cased, boxer primed, and non-corrosive.

items.name: 7.62x39mm PP gzh
items.description: A PP gzh (GRAU index - 7N27) cartridge with an improved penetration bullet. The PP bullet consists of a tompak-clad steel jacket with a truncated tip, a sharp core of hardened steel, a cap of thin metal foil coated with green varnish, and a lead jacket. The foil is used to prevent wear and tear on the gun and magazine when feeding cartridges.

items.name: 7.62x39mm FMJ
items.description: Lead bullet with full metal jacket. Excellent for practical and recreational shooting.

items.name: 7.62x39mm SP
items.description: 7.62x39 rifled ammunition with SP 123 gr (8 g) bullet is great for practice and recreational shooting.

items.name: 9x19mm FMJ M882
items.description: US Military 9mm ammunition is some of the most reliable ammunition available in the market, great for target shooting, plinking and practice. Loaded with M882 124-grain full metal jacket bullets rated at 1140 fps, this cartridge is considered +P (but slightly less than +P+) ammo. These increased pressure cartridges travel farther and penetrate better than standard 9mm rounds.

items.name: .300 Blackout CBJ
items.description: Experimental armor piercing round by CBJ Tech. Contains a 6.1g tungsten core projectile inside 1g plastic sabot. It has improved armor penetrating capabilities and improved velocity.

items.name: 12/70 Piranha
items.description: This 12 gauge round contains dozens of razor sharp steel tacks that blast out at high velocity which virtually guarantees that there will be no response from the perpetrator. Each round is buffed with #12 shot thus creating a double shock to the wound area. Absolutely will not harm your shotgun. To be used no closer than 10 feet and no further than 50 feet.

items.name: 7.62x54mm R FMJ
items.description: Full Metal Jacket bullet. Standard lead core with a metallic jacket. Best for training and target shooting applications.

items.name: 7.62x54mm R SP BT
items.description: 180gr Soft Point Boat Tail large game cartridges are designed for use on deer, large pig and other large game where greater stopping power is required.

items.name: 7.62x54mm R HP BT
items.description: HPBT (Hollow Point Boat Tail) - an HP-type bullet with a streamlined or tapered tail. HP (Hollow Point) - a semi-hollow point bullet with a hole in the nose.

items.name: AK 7.62x39 Magpul PMAG 20 GEN M3 20-round magazine
items.description: A 20-round polymer Magpul PMAG 20 AK/AKM GEN M3 magazine for 7.62x39 AK and compatible weapons. Can also be supplied with .366 TKM ammo for use with the corresponding caliber AK-compatible weapons.

items.name: M1A 7.62x51 10-round magazine
items.description: A 10-round double-stack 7.62x51 NATO magazine for the M1A rifle, produced by Springfield Armory.

items.name: AK-74 Delta-Tek Saiga 545 5.45x39 20-round magazine
items.description: A 20-round 5.45x39 polymer magazine for the AK-based civilian carbine of the same name.

items.name: Zulu Nylon Gear M4 Reduced Signature Chest Rig (Ranger Green)
items.description: The M4 RSCR chest system was designed to be a lightweight and minimalist system for carrying just the essentials. Manufactured by Zulu Nylon Gear.

items.name: Type 56 Chicom chest harness
items.description: The Type 56 Chicom vest is the forefather of modern tactical loadout harness systems. The Type 56 rifle magazine chest harness was developed for the People's Liberation Army of China in the 1950s and has since been widely used in many local conflicts of the 20th century. In the early 1980s, such harnesses made their way to Afghanistan, where they gained acceptance by select Soviet troops who used the trophy Chicoms. It is unknown whether or not the Chicom served as a prototype for the Soviet Belt-A chest rig or not.

items.name: NPP KlASS Kora-Kulon body armor (Black)
items.description: The Kora-Kulon bulletproof vest is a means of individual armor protection of long-term wear, allowing to perform all types of professional activities of the personnel of the Ministry of Internal Affairs and Ministry of Defense units. The design of the bulletproof vest allows its use in concealed operation under outer clothing. Designed to protect the wearer from firearms and sharp weapons. Black version.

items.name: NPP KlASS Kora-Kulon body armor (EMR)
items.description: The Kora-Kulon bulletproof vest is a means of individual armor protection of long-term wear, allowing to perform all types of professional activities of the personnel of the Ministry of Internal Affairs and Ministry of Defense units. The design of the bulletproof vest allows its use in concealed operation under outer clothing. Designed to protect the wearer from firearms and sharp weapons. EMR (Digital Flora) camouflage version.

items.name: AK-12 5.45x39 sound suppressor
items.description: A standard-issue sound suppressor for AK-12 automatic rifles. Manufactured by Izhmash.

items.name: Kalashnikov PKP 7.62x54R infantry machine gun
items.description: The 7.62 mm PKP "Pecheneg" is widely recognized for its reliability and firepower. Time-tested technical solutions, skillfully combined with advanced approaches to ergonomics, made it possible to increase not only the mobility of the shooter on the battlefield, but also the accuracy of fire at a distance of up to 1500 m, eliminating the effect of thermal mirage by equipping the machine gun with an over-barrel transport grip.

items.name: PK pistol grip (Black)
items.description: A standard-issue pistol grip for Kalashnikov Machine gun. Manufactured by V.A. Degtyarev Plant. Black version.

items.name: Concordia apartment 34 room key
items.description: A key to one of the rooms in apartment 34 inside the Concordia building.

items.name: Concordia apartment 8 home cinema key
items.description: A key to the home cinema in apartment 8 in the Concordia building.

items.name: Concordia apartment 63 room key
items.description: A key to one of the rooms in apartment 63 in the Concordia building.

items.name: Beluga restaurant director key
items.description: A key to the director’s office in the Beluga restaurant.

items.name: TerraGroup meeting room key

items.name: Tarbank cash register department key
items.description: An access key to the cash registers of the regional branch of Tarbank.

items.name: X-ray room key
items.description: The key to the control room in the radial diagnostics room of Children's Polyclinic No. 69.

items.name: TerraGroup security armory key
items.description: A key to TerraGroup's office security armory.

items.name: Mysterious room marked key
items.description: A mysterious key from an unknown door located at house 13 Chekannaya Street. There is a strange symbol scratched on the key.

items.name: PE teacher's office key
items.description: A key to the physical education teacher's office at School No. 30.

items.name: Aspect company office key
items.description: A key from the entrance to the office of Aspect LLC on 56 Primorsky Ave.

items.name: Kalashnikov PKP 7.62x54R infantry machine gun Pecheneg
Kalashnikov PKP 7.62x54R infantry machine gun Zenit
Sacred Amulet
items.description: A mysterious amulet given to you by Lightkeeper. Serves as a reminder of the wearer's important role in Tarkov's history. Very fragile.

items.name: Rusted bloody key
items.description: A rusted bloody key, inscribed on it is: "He who holds this key shall wander for eternity".

items.name: VSS/VAL polymer handguard (Plum)
items.description: A polymer handguard for the AS Val and VSS Vintorez. Manufactured by TsNIITochMash. Made out of plum-colored polymer, earning the nickname "Sliva" (Plum).

items.name: VSS/VAL 9x39 30-round magazine
items.description: A 30-round polymer TsNIITochMash 9x39 magazine for the AS VAL special assault rifle.

items.name: Degtyarev RPD 7.62x39 machine gun
items.description: The Degtyarev hand-held machine gun chambered in 7.62x39 caliber. This machine gun was adopted by the Soviet Army and was used as a means of reinforcing infantry squads and platoons from the late forties to the early sixties. The RPD is elegantly designed, resulting in a compact, reliable and quite powerful fire support weapon. Manufactured by V.A. Degtyarev Plant.

items.name: RPD 7.62x39 520mm barrel
items.description: A standard-issue 520mm barrel for the RPD machine gun. Manufactured by V.A. Degtyarev Plant.

items.name: RPD bipod
items.description: A standard-issue bipod for the RPD machine gun. Manufactured by V.A. Degtyarev Plant.

items.name: RPD wooden handguard
items.description: A standard-issue wooden handguard for the RPD machine gun. Manufactured by V.A. Degtyarev Plant.

items.name: RPD 7.62x39 Buben 100-round box
items.description: A standard-issue 100-round box for the RPD machine gun nicknamed "Buben" for its round shape. Manufactured by V.A. Degtyarev Plant.

items.name: RPD barrel thread protector
items.description: A standard-issue barrel thread protector for the RPD machine gun. Manufactured by V.A. Degtyarev Plant.

items.name: RPD wooden pistol grip
items.description: A standard-issue wooden pistol grip for the RPD machine gun. Manufactured by V.A. Degtyarev Plant.

items.name: RPD rear sight
items.description: A standard-issue rear sight for the RPD machine gun. Manufactured by V.A. Degtyarev Plant.

items.name: RPD wooden stock
items.description: A standard-issue wooden stock for the RPD machine gun. Manufactured by V.A. Degtyarev Plant.

items.name: SR-3M polymer handguard (Black)
items.description: A standard-issue polymer handguard for the SR-3M assault rifle.

items.name: SR-3M 9x39 sound suppressor
items.description: A standard-issue sound suppressor for the SR-3M assault rifle.

items.name: SR-3M 9x39 compact assault rifle
items.description: The SR-3M is a powerful assault rifle, featuring a very compact size comparable to submachine guns, but noticeably superior in terms of firepower due to the use of special armor-piercing ammunition. The main purpose of the SR-3M is to be used as a concealed carry weapon for Russian special forces units. Developed at TsNIITochMash and based on the AS VAL assault rifle.

items.name: AK PUFGUN SG-M2 pistol grip
items.description: The SG-M2 pistol grip for AK and compatible rifles. Manufactured by PUFGUN.

items.name: RTM Pillau P-2 tactical foregrip (Red)
items.description: The Pillau second generation lightweight aluminum tactical grip. Manufactured by RTM. Red color version.

items.name: SVDS Lynx Arms AK-series pistol grip adapter
items.description: An adapter that allows installation of AK-series pistol grips on SVDS. Manufactured by Lynx Arms.

items.description: A quick detach buttstock for AR-15 carbines. Manufactured by Daniel Defense. Black version.

items.name: AR-15 Daniel Defense Enhanced Collapsible Buttstock (FDE)
items.description: A quick detach buttstock for AR-15 carbines. Manufactured by Daniel Defense. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: Daniel Defense TCS 12mm Buttpad
items.description: The 12mm Thicker Convex Shape Buttpad for Daniel Defense buttstocks. Manufactured by Daniel Defense.

items.name: Daniel Defense TCS 20mm Buttpad
items.description: The 20mm Thicker Convex Shape Buttpad for Daniel Defense buttstocks. Manufactured by Daniel Defense.

items.name: Daniel Defense Enhanced M-LOK Vertical Foregrip (Black)
items.description: The Enhanced M-LOK Vertical Foregrip, installed on M-LOK interface handguards. Manufactured by Daniel Defense. Black version.

items.name: Daniel Defense Enhanced M-LOK Vertical Foregrip (Coyote Brown)
items.description: The Enhanced M-LOK Vertical Foregrip, installed on M-LOK interface handguards. Manufactured by Daniel Defense. Coyote Brown version.

items.name: AR-15 Daniel Defense GRIP-N-RIP charging handle
items.description: The GRIP-N-RIP charging handle for AR-15 style weapons. Manufactured by Daniel Defense.

items.name: Saiga-9 Hartman Gyurza handguard
items.description: A tubular handguard for the Saiga-9 carbine. Manufactured by Hartman.

items.name: RPD 7.62x39 sawed-off 350mm barrel
items.description: A 350mm barrel shortened by an unknown artisan for the RPD machine gun.

items.name: Degtyarev RPDN 7.62x39 machine gun
items.description: The Degtyarev hand-held machine gun chambered in 7.62x39 caliber. This machine gun was adopted by the Soviet Army and was used as a means of reinforcing infantry squads and platoons from the late forties to the early sixties. The RPD is elegantly designed, resulting in a compact, reliable and quite powerful fire support weapon. The RPDN variant is equipped with a hinged dovetail mount for installing optics. Manufactured by V.A. Degtyarev Plant.

items.name: Audio recorder
items.description: A regular audio recorder. In Tarkov, they became widely used right after the city was cut off from the outside world.

items.name: SIG MCX-SPEAR 6.8x51 assault rifle
items.description: The MCX SPEAR is a multi-caliber assault rifle designed and manufactured by SIG Sauer based on the MCX assault rifle. Primarily chambered in the new 6.8x51mm (.277 FURY) ammunition. Designed specifically for the US Military to replace the M4 carbine.

items.name: MCX-SPEAR 6.8x51 13 inch barrel
items.description: A 13 inch (330mm) barrel for the MCX-SPEAR assault rifle chambered in 6.8x51 (.277 FURY) ammo. Manufactured by SIG Sauer.

items.name: MCX-SPEAR charging handle
items.description: A standard-issue ambidextrous charging handle for the MCX-SPEAR assault rifle. Manufactured by SIG Sauer.

items.name: MCX-SPEAR Adjustable Gas Piston
items.description: A gas piston for the MCX-SPEAR assault rifle. Manufactured by SIG Sauer.

items.name: MCX-SPEAR 11 inch M-LOK handguard
items.description: An 11 inch handguard for the MCX-SPEAR assault rifle equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of additional devices and accessories. Manufactured by SIG Sauer.

items.name: MCX-SPEAR Clutch-Lok QD 6.8x51 Shouldered Flash Hider
items.description: The SPEAR Clutch-Lok Shouldered Flash Hider is an effective flash suppressor that also serves as an attachment platform for the SLX/SLH sound suppressor. Manufactured by SIG Sauer.

items.name: AR-15 SIG Sauer Reduced Angle Pistol Grip (Coyote Tan)
items.description: The polymer Reduced Angle Pistol Grip fits any weapon compatible with AR-15 system. Manufactured by SIG Sauer. Coyote Tan version.

items.name: MCX-SPEAR 6.8x51 upper receiver
items.description: A standard-issue upper receiver for the MCX-SPEAR assault rifle, chambered in 6.8x51mm (.277 FURY). Equipped with a mount for attaching additional devices. Manufactured by SIG Sauer.

items.name: MCX-SPEAR SLX68-MG-QD 6.8x51 sound suppressor
items.description: The SLX68-MG-QD suppressor is designed for use with the 6.8x51 (.277 FURY) caliber cartridge. Can only be mounted on Clutch-Lok flash hiders. Manufactured by SIG Sauer.

items.name: 6.8x51mm SIG Hybrid
items.description: A mil-spec 6.8x51mm (.277 FURY) rifle round with bi-metallic case (stainless steel base coupled to a brass body), manufactured by SIG Sauer. Provides a higher velocity, more energy hitting being transferred to the target, and a lighter cartridge than 5.56x45, and hits harder than 7.62x51, while also having a great penetration power against modern body armor.

items.name: 6.8x51mm SIG FMJ
items.description: A civilian 6.8x51mm (.277 FURY) Elite Ball FMJ (Full Metal Jacket) 135 grain rifle round, manufactured by SIG Sauer.

items.name: SIG Sauer Locking Stock Hinge Assembly
items.description: An adapter for installing buffer tubes on 1913 rail interface receivers. Manufactured by SIG Sauer.

items.name: SIG Sauer Stock Adapter Low Profile Tube (Coyote Tan)
items.description: A buffer tube for the folding stock adapter for SIG AR platform rifles and SMGs. Manufactured by SIG Sauer. Coyote Tan version.

items.name: AR-15 Magpul MOE SL-K buttstock (Coyote Tan)
items.description: A quick-detach buttstock for AR-15/M16 rifles with mil-spec buffer tube. Manufactured by Magpul Original Equipment. Coyote Tan version.

items.name: AR-10 7.62x51 Lancer L7AWM 20-round magazine
items.description: A 20-round double-stack L7AWM 20 magazine for 7.62x51 NATO ammunition. Manufactured by Lancer Systems.

items.name: AR-10 7.62x51 Lancer L7AWM 25-round magazine
items.description: A 25-round double-stack L7AWM 25 magazine for 7.62x51 NATO ammunition. Manufactured by Lancer Systems.

items.name: Vengeful Zryachiy's balaclava
items.description: An intimidating red face mask, worn by vengeful Zryachiy.

items.name: Vengeful Zryachiy's balaclava (folded)
items.description: An intimidating red face mask, worn by Zryachiy. Folded to be worn as a hat.

items.name: SR-3M polymer foregrip (Black)
items.description: A standard-issue polymer foregrip for the SR-3M assault rifle.

items.name: GBRS Aimpoint Hydra Mount Kit (Black)
items.description: The Hydra Mount Kit for Aimpoint Micro T-1 and H-1 series sights and tactical equipment. Manufactured by GBRS Group.

items.name: GBRS Aimpoint Hydra Mount Kit (FDE)
items.description: The Hydra Mount Kit for Aimpoint Micro T-1 and H-1 series sights and tactical equipment. Manufactured by GBRS Group. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: SKS ATI Monte Carlo gas tube cover
items.description: A cover for the SKS carbine gas tube. Manufactured by ATI Outdoors.

items.name: SKS TAPCO railed gas tube cover
items.description: A railed gas tube cover/handguard for the SKS carbine. Manufactured by TAPCO.

items.name: SKS FAB Defense UAS gas tube cover
items.description: A cover for the SKS carbine gas tube. Manufactured by FAB Defense.

items.name: SKS ATI Monte Carlo stock
items.description: A lightweight Monte Carlo-style stock for the SKS carbine, designed for sport shooting and hunting. Manufactured by ATI Outdoors.

items.name: SKS FAB Defense UAS buttstock
items.description: A lightweight polymer folding buttstock for the SKS carbine. Manufactured by FAB Defense.

items.name: SKS TAPCO Intrafuse chassis lower rail
items.description: A short Weaver/Picatinny type rail for installation of tactical foregrips on the Intrafuse chassis. Manufactured by TAPCO.

items.name: PR-Taran police baton
items.description: The PR-Taran baton with side handle is used by law enforcement agencies for protection and crowd control.

items.name: Hartman Lenok 70mm rail
items.description: The "Lenok" Weaver rail allows installation of additional equipment on Hartman tubular handguards.

items.name: Axion Kobra EKP-1S-03 reflex sight (Dovetail)
items.description: Kobra is a highly popular red dot sight among law enforcement agencies and civilian shooters. It was developed for the Armed Forces of the Russian Federation. EKP-1S-03 has earned a reputation of reliable, fail-safe in the harshest field conditions among hunters, sports shooters, soldiers and collectors. This sight is designed for installation on the Dovetail type mounts. Manufactured by Axion.

items.name: Granit 4RS ballistic plates (Back)
items.description: Two armor plates for the back section of 6B13 body armor. Features improved ergonomic characteristics: anatomical shape and division into two panels provides an optimal fit to the user's figure, increasing the comfort of use.

items.name: 6B12 ballistic plates (Front)
items.description: Armored steel plates for torso front pouches of Russian bulletproof vests.

items.name: Korund-VM ballistic plate (Side)
items.description: Steel ballistic plate for side pouches of Russian bulletproof vests.

items.name: Granit Br4 ballistic plate
items.description: Granit Br4 ballistic plates are unified for use in both chest and back sections of the body armor. Features improved ergonomic characteristics: anatomical shape and division into two panels provides an optimal fit to the user's figure, increasing the comfort of use.

items.name: SSAPI level III+ ballistic plate (Side)
items.description: Side Small Arms Protective Insert (SSAPI) is a ceramic ballistic plate for torso side plate pouches.

items.name: SAPI level III+ ballistic plate
items.description: Small Arms Protective Insert (SAPI) is a ceramic ballistic plate for torso front and back pouches of plate carrier.

items.name: BEAR operative figurine
items.description: The Tarko collectible figure of a BEAR PMC fighter. This collectible image of a soldier with an MP-155 Ultima perfectly conveys the spirit and willingness of Bears to fight to the end.

items.name: USEC operative figurine
items.description: The Tarko collectible figure of a USEC PMC fighter. This USEC operative is tough, deadly, and doesn't really speak much Russian.

items.name: Cultist figurine
items.description: The Tarko collectible figure of a local cultist. The craftsman has very meticulously portrayed these hooded unidentified individuals. Particular attention was paid to the unusual knife. Looks like the author had familiarized himself firsthand with the sharpness of its blade.

items.name: Politician Mutkevich figurine
items.description: The Tarko collectible figure of a politician called Mutkevich. The unknown craftsman was impressed with how the former politician and current fighter of the Arena cleanup crew from is fighting for his life.

items.name: Scav figurine
items.description: The Tarko collectible figure of a Scav. The unknown craftsman decided to portray a regular representative of the Scavs on Streets of Tarkov. It is unclear what impressed the author more: the memorable hat or how diligently the Scav tried to aim.

items.name: Ryzhy figurine
items.description: The Tarko collectible figure of a Scav called Ryzhy. Having heard of the adventures of the well-known in certain circles Ryzhy, the unknown craftsman created this figurine.

items.name: Ded Moroz figurine
items.description: The Tarko collectible figure of a Ded Moroz. This time, the craftsman portrayed a collective image of one of the Scavs who changes his clothes every Christmas and New Year and gives everyone in the city gifts that he managed to loot during the year. Traditionally, PMC fighters and Scavs do not attack this oddball.

items.name: AKS-74U Legal Arsenal Pilgrim railed dust cover
items.description: The Pilgrim receiver dust cover with integrated Picatinny rail for AKS-74U. Allows installation of reflex sights and optics. Manufactured by Legal Arsenal.

items.name: Strike Industries Cobra Tactical foregrip (FDE)
items.description: The Cobra Tactical foregrip integrates the form with functionality. Its hybrid-designed shape works both as a regular foregrip and as a comfortable hand stop when going with the thumb over bore method. The grip allows you to handle the weapon with confidence and the organic design enables the operator to manipulate the rifle in a way that’s most comfortable at any given moment. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: Stark SE-5 Express Forward foregrip (FDE)
items.description: The Stark SE-5 Express Forward tactical grip enables a more natural grip against the barrel axis. Thanks to that, it reduces recoil and improves the weapon control. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: Wilcox BOSS Xe reflex sight
items.description: The Ballistically Optimized Sighting System reflex sight that combines the functions of a red dot, tactical block and iron sights. Manufactured by Wilcox.

items.name: AS VAL pistol grip (Black)
items.description: A standard-issue polymer pistol grip for AS VAL, manufactured by TSNIITochMash.

items.name: VSS/VAL polymer handguard (Black)
items.description: A black polymer handguard for the AS Val and VSS Vintorez. Manufactured by TsNIITochMash.

items.name: SR-3M polymer foregrip (Plum)
items.description: A standard-issue polymer foregrip for the SR-3M assault rifle. Made out of plum-colored polymer, earning the nickname "Sliva" (Plum).

items.name: SR-3M polymer handguard (Plum)
items.description: A standard-issue polymer handguard for the SR-3M assault rifle. Made out of plum-colored polymer, earning the nickname "Sliva" (Plum).

items.name: SIG Sauer ALPHA4 30mm ring scope mount
items.description: A mount for 30mm riflescopes, installed on Weaver/Picatinny type rails. Manufactured by SIG Sauer.

items.name: SIG Sauer TANGO6T 1-6x24 30mm riflescope
items.description: The TANGO6T is a rugged and well-built low power variable optic. This model features a 1x to 6x magnification and a first focal plane reticle. This rifle scope is ideal for short and medium distances, as well as for backcountry hunting. Manufactured by SIG Sauer.

items.name: SR-3M railed polymer handguard (Black)
items.description: A polymer handguard with Zenit Picatinny rails for the SR-3M assault rifle.

items.name: Tehinkom RK-PT-25 patrol backpack (EMR)
items.description: This backpack is a multifunctional piece of equipment designed for transportation of various items of combat and marching equipment, additional weaponry, etc. It can be used both as part of the UMTBS transportation and gear system (ZhTU 6Sh112) and independently, as part of various sets of individual combat equipment.

items.name: Pack of instant noodles
items.description: A pack of instant noodles. No hot water? Too bad. Eat it dry.

items.name: Mystery Ranch SATL Bridger Assault Pack (Foliage)
items.description: The Mystery Ranch SATL assault backpack has been the standard gear for SOCOM assault operations for nearly a decade. It now features a removable BVS system and a redirect waist belt for effective weight distribution, even when the backpack is worn over body armor.

items.name: Granit 4 ballistic plates (Back)

items.name: 6B13 custom ballistic plates (Back)
items.description: Custom homespun ballistic plates for the 6B13 bulletproof vest.

items.name: Direct Action Dragon Egg Mark II backpack (Black)
items.description: A lightweight and versatile backpack with a volume of over 25 liters, designed for military and law enforcement personnel.

items.description: A box of 5.56x45mm MK 318 Mod 0 (SOST) cartridges, 100 pieces.

items.name: 5.56x45mm SSA AP ammo pack (100 pcs)
items.description: A box of 5.56x45mm SSA AP cartridges, 100 pieces.

items.name: Atomic Defense CQCM ballistic mask (Black)
items.description: Atomic Defense's CQCM ballistic mask provides protection against wide variety of short-mid range weapons including shotguns and assault rifles. This heavyweight reinforced mask covers the wearer's face completely. It features an inner lining and wraps slightly around the sides of the head for added protection. The mask also features five-point adjustable straps to ensure a comfortable and precise fit.

items.name: 5.45x39mm 7N40 ammo pack (120 pcs)
items.description: A box of 5.45x39mm 7N40 cartridges, 120 pieces.

items.name: Diamond Age NeoSteel High Cut helmet (Black)
items.description: The Diamond Age NeoSteel helmet features a unique design that combines high-strength steel with composite materials to provide advanced protection against ballistic and impact threats. It is designed to withstand high velocity impacts and can provide protection against a variety of threats.

items.name: Diamond Age NeoSteel helmet ballistic mandible
items.description: An extra ballistic protection with a special design for the Diamond Age NeoSteel helmet.

items.name: Death Shadow lightweight armored mask
items.description: The "Death Shadow" mask for face protection, reinforced with aramid fibers.

items.description: NPP KlASS Tor-2 is an assault protective helmet with a removable bullet-resistant visor and an integrated system for installing additional equipment (NVG, headsets, tactical lights, cameras, IR strobe lights, etc.).

items.name: NPP KlASS Tor-2 helmet face shield
items.description: A special visor for the NPP KlASS Tor-2 helmet, made of heavy-duty glass.

items.name: Ghost half-mask
items.description: A half-mask with a skull print.

items.description: A real bandit's attribute - the black leather baseball cap.

9x21mm 7N42 Zubilo
items.description: The 9x21mm PP cartridge (GRAU Index - 7N42) with increased penetration bullet is designed to engage armored personnel. The head part of the core is made with a cut edge. This design ensures the tearing of the threads of the fabric base of the body armor and significantly increases the penetration of the bullet. The core protrudes from the jacket, which increases its penetration capability. The bullet head is colored black.

items.name: 9x21mm 7U4
items.description: The 9x21mm 7U4 round (GRAU index - 7U4) with reduced bullet velocity, designed for flameless and low-noise firing. The cartridge features a cut edge on the front end of the core, formed by two flat edges, and increased weight.

items.name: 9x39mm FMJ
items.description: The 9x39mm TCW FMJ cartridge is intended for firing from civilian weapons. The cartridge does not lose its qualities when used in various climatic and meteorological conditions, regardless of the time of year.

items.name: 9x21mm 7U4 ammo pack (30 pcs)
items.description: A box of 9x21mm 7U4 cartridges, 30 pieces.

items.name: 9x21mm 7N42 ammo pack (30 pcs)
items.description: A box of 9x21mm 7N42 cartridges, 30 pieces.

items.name: 9x39mm FMJ ammo pack (20 pcs)
items.description: A box of 9x39mm FMJ cartridges, 20 pieces.

items.name: 6B23-2 ballistic plate (Back)
items.description: An armored steel plate for torso rear pouch of 6b23-1, 6b23-2, Korund and Bagariy bulletproof vests.

items.name: Korund-VM ballistic plate (Back)
items.description: An armored steel plate for torso rear pouch of 6b23-1, 6b23-2, Korund and Bagariy bulletproof vests.

items.name: Korund-VM-K ballistic plate (Back)
items.description: A ceramic plate for torso rear pouch of 6b23-1, 6b23-2, Korund and Bagariy bulletproof vests.

Molot Arms Simonov OP-SKS 7.62x39 carbine Tactical
Pack of Tarker dried meat
items.description: A vacuum pack with slices of beef jerky. Yum yum.

items.name: Unity Credit Bank cash register key
items.description: A key to the cash register inside the city center Unity Credit bank branch.

items.name: Underground parking utility room key
items.description: A key to the utility room at the underground parking in the city center.

items.name: Horse restaurant toilet key
items.description: A key to one of the toilets inside the Horse restaurant in the city center.

items.name: TerraGroup science office key
items.description: A key to the science office inside the TerraGroup main building in the city center.

items.name: "Negotiation" room key
items.description: A key to the room for important meetings inside one of the city offices.

items.name: Relaxation room key
items.description: A key to the relaxation room inside one of the city offices.

items.name: MVD academy entrance hall guard room key
items.description: A key to the guard room at the entrance hall inside the city MVD (Ministry of the Interior) academy.

items.name: Real estate agency office room key
items.description: A key to the office inside the city real estate agency.

items.name: Unity Credit Bank archive room key
items.description: A key to the archive room inside the city Unity Credit bank branch.

items.name: PP-19-01 Vityaz Vector VR-LPS left-side charging handle
items.description: VR-LPS is a device that allows for reloading the weapon with the support hand. Installed in place of the gas tube and enables quick and efficient reloading. Manufactured by Vector 7.62.

items.name: United Cutlery M48 Tactical Kukri
items.description: A 48 series tactical kukri manufactured by United Cutlery. Features a stainless steel blade and rubberized handle. A great addition to every survivalist's arsenal!

items.name: Mark of The Unheard
items.description: A radio transmitter reconfigured by unknown assailants. It's impossible to determine the modification technology, nor is it likely to figure out what kind of signal it's transmitting. When in the area of low intensity combat zone (PvE), the user of the device becomes visible in Fence's agent network. However, using this device, you have to follow his rules. Fence pays half of the money spent in the raid and coordinates the Scavs when searching for the user's lost equipment. If trusted enough by Fence, the user will not be attacked by Scavs as long as they keep their distance and show no aggression. In return, Fence requires to minimize damage to Scavs, and if the death of a Scav could not be avoided - to reduce the number of interference with his activities in the face of other PMCs in the area of the incident.

items.name: KOMZ Rusak reflex sight
items.description: A collimator sight manufactured by Kazan Optical-Mechanical Plant in the mid-90s for use on hunting weapons. Installed on the Dovetail type rail, adjustment only possible after full disassembly. Heavy, uncomfortable, foggy sight with horrible parallax - a real product of its time. However, it's still slightly more effective than shooting with iron sights.

items.name: M700 Badger Ordnance Scope Rail
items.description: A universal rail for mounting various sights on the Remington Model 700. Manufactured by Badger Ordnance.

items.name: RS Regulate AK-303M Full Length Lower dovetail mount
items.description: The AK-303M side platform is designed as a base for mounting RS Regulate top mounts on AK assault rifles and their variants: Saiga, SVD, and others. Manufactured by RS Regulate.

items.name: RS Regulate AKR top mount
items.description: The AKR 1913 Railed 0 MOA Mount, installed on the AK-303M Lower Mount. Manufactured by RS Regulate.

items.name: U.S. Ordnance M60E4 7.62x51 light machine gun
items.description: The M60E4 (Mk 43 Mod 1) is a 7.62x51 caliber light machine gun, a modification of the M60E3 with a more reliable trigger mechanism, ability to attach optics, and a number of other improvements. The M60 was nicknamed "The Pig" due to its bulky size and design flaws. Despite its disadvantages, variants of the M60 are still used in some military units. Manufactured by U.S. Ordnance.

items.name: M60E4 trigger group
items.description: A trigger group for the M60E4 machine gun with an adapter that allows the installation of pistol grips from the M60. Manufactured by U.S. Ordnance.

items.name: M60E4 pistol grip
items.description: A standard-issue pistol grip for the M60E4 light machine gun. Manufactured by U.S Ordnance.

items.name: M60E4 buttstock
items.description: A lightweight buttstock for the M60E4 light machine gun with articulated shoulder rest and improved buffer mounting mechanism. Manufactured by U.S. Ordnance.

items.name: M60 rear sight
items.description: A standard-issue foldable rear sight for the M60 machine gun. Manufactured by U.S Ordnance.

items.name: M60E4 front sight
items.description: A standard-issue fixed front sight for the M60E4 light machine gun, installed on the barrel. Manufactured by U.S Ordnance.

items.name: M60E6 front sight rail
items.description: A small front sight rail for the M60E6 light machine gun. Manufactured by U.S Ordnance.

items.name: M60E4 7.62x51 458mm barrel
items.description: A 458mm short barrel for the M60E4 light machine gun. Manufactured by U.S Ordnance.

items.name: M60E4 7.62x51 475mm heavy barrel
items.description: A heavy fluted 475mm barrel for the M60E4 light machine gun. Manufactured by U.S Ordnance.

items.name: M60E3 7.62x51 584mm barrel
items.description: A long 584mm barrel for the M60E3 light machine gun. Manufactured by U.S Ordnance.

items.name: M60E3 7.62x51 flash hider
items.description: A standard-issue flash hider for the M60E3 light machine gun. Manufactured by U.S Ordnance.

items.name: M60E6 7.62x51 flash hider
items.description: A standard-issue flash hider for the M60E6 light machine gun. Manufactured by U.S Ordnance.

items.name: M60E6 handguard
items.description: A standard-issue railed handguard for the M60E6 light machine gun. Manufactured by U.S Ordnance.

items.name: M60E4 Mod 1 handguard
items.description: An aluminium railed handguard for the M60E4 Mod 1 light machine gun. Manufactured by U.S Ordnance.

items.name: M60 bipod
items.description: A standard-issue bipod for the M60 machine gun. Manufactured by U.S Ordnance.

items.name: 20/70 TSS Armor Piercing Slug
items.description: An armor-piercing slug for 20/70 caliber shotguns. Combines decent accuracy with increased penetration. Excellent choice if the target needs to be eliminated, not just intimidated.

items.name: 20/70 Dangerous Game Slug
items.description: A slug cartridge for 20/70 caliber shotguns. Loses very little velocity over distance, so it is suitable for reliable target engagement at a long range.

items.name: 20/70 flechette
items.description: A shell loaded with razor-sharp flechettes for 20ga shotguns. Far from being the most effective round, but believe us - you definitely don't want to be on the receiving end of the weapon loaded with it.

items.name: 20x1mm toy gun
items.description: A plastic semi-automatic toy gun firing 20x1mm disks. Designed for children over 5 years old. Manufactured in the USSR.

items.name: 20x1mm disk
items.description: A toy ammunition in the form of a 20x1mm disk for the Soviet plastic toy gun. Manufactured in the USSR.

items.name: Toy gun 20x1mm 20-round magazine
items.description: A standard disk magazine for the Soviet toy gun. Not recommended to load it with coins. Manufactured in the USSR.

items.name: Armband of The Unheard
items.description: An armband with a mysterious symbol that can be found in various parts of the city and its outskirts. Does this mean they are already among us?

items.name: Encrypted flash drive
items.description: One of many thumb drives scattered around Tarkov. Contains the login kostochkin_g_b from ARRS Terminal.

items.name: Documents with decrypted data
items.description: A stack of documents containing TerraGroup's classified data. Looks suspicious.

items.name: M60 7.62x51 Capco 100-round Assault Box
items.description: A 100-round 7.62x51 hard plastic ammo box for the M60 machine gun. Manufactured by Capco.

items.name: M60 7.62x51 LBT 100-round Feed Tray Pouch
items.description: A 100-round 7.62x51 soft ammo box for the M60 machine gun. Manufactured by London Bridge Trading.

items.name: M60E6 buttstock
items.description: A lightweight buttstock for the M60E6 light machine gun with articulated shoulder rest and improved buffer mounting mechanism. Manufactured by U.S. Ordnance.

items.name: M60E6 pistol grip
items.description: A standard-issue lightweight pistol grip for the M60E6 light machine gun. Manufactured by U.S Ordnance.

items.name: M60E6 trigger group
items.description: A trigger group for the M60E6 machine gun with an adapter that allows the installation of pistol grips from the M60. Manufactured by U.S. Ordnance.

items.name: M60E6 buttstock (FDE)
items.description: A lightweight buttstock for the M60E6 light machine gun with articulated shoulder rest and improved buffer mounting mechanism. Manufactured by U.S. Ordnance. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: M60E6 pistol grip (FDE)
items.description: A standard-issue lightweight pistol grip for the M60E6 light machine gun. Manufactured by U.S Ordnance. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: M60E6 trigger group (FDE)
items.description: A trigger group for the M60E6 machine gun with an adapter that allows the installation of pistol grips from the M60. Manufactured by U.S. Ordnance. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: U.S. Ordnance M60E6 7.62x51 light machine gun
items.description: The M60E6 is a 7.62x51 caliber light machine gun, a lightweight modification of the M60E4. The M60 was nicknamed "The Pig" due to its bulky size and design flaws. Despite its disadvantages, variants of the M60 are still used in some military units. Manufactured by U.S. Ordnance.

items.name: U.S. Ordnance M60E6 7.62x51 light machine gun (FDE)
items.description: The M60E6 is a 7.62x51 caliber light machine gun, a lightweight modification of the M60E4. The M60 was nicknamed "The Pig" due to its bulky size and design flaws. Despite its disadvantages, variants of the M60 are still used in some military units. Manufactured by U.S. Ordnance. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: TangoDown Stubby BGV-QDK foregrip (Black)
items.description: The Stubby BGV-QDK is a short grip for use with weapons in close and extra close quarters combat. Сontains a compartment for batteries or small items. Manufactured by TangoDown. Black version.

items.name: TangoDown Stubby BGV-QDK foregrip (FDE)
items.description: The Stubby BGV-QDK is a short grip for use with weapons in close and extra close quarters combat. Сontains a compartment for batteries or small items. Manufactured by TangoDown. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: TangoDown BGV-QDITI foregrip (Black)
items.description: The BGV-QDITI vertical grip with a compartment for batteries or small items. Manufactured by TangoDown. Black version.

items.name: TangoDown BGV-QDITI foregrip (FDE)
items.description: The BGV-QDITI vertical grip with a compartment for batteries or small items. Manufactured by TangoDown. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: PM PM-Laser grip with laser sight
items.description: A Makarov Pistol grip with built-in magazine release mechanism and laser designator. Manufactured by PM-Laser.

items.name: M60E4 Mod 1 handguard (FDE)
items.description: An aluminium railed handguard for the M60E4 Mod 1 light machine gun. Manufactured by U.S Ordnance. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: AR-15 DoubleStar Carlson Tac Comp 5.56x45 compensator
items.description: The Carlson Tac Comp compensator designed for AR-15 and compatible systems. Reduces recoil impulse and muzzle rise. Ideal for short barrel weapons. Manufactured by DoubleStar.

items.name: M60E6 7.62x51 458mm barrel
items.description: A 458mm short barrel for the M60E6 light machine gun. Manufactured by U.S Ordnance.

items.name: USEC cottage room key
items.description: A key to one of the rooms in the cottages of former USEC operatives.

items.name: Mr Kerman's cat hologram
items.description: Greetings from Mr. Kerman.

items.name: AR-10 Delta-Tek DTK-AR10 7.62x51 muzzle brake
items.description: The DTK-AR10 muzzle brake, designed for AR-10 and compatible systems. Greatly reduces recoil and muzzle rise due to the special compensation chamber. Manufactured by Delta-Tek.

items.name: AR-15 Delta-Tek DTK-M16 5.56x45 muzzle brake
items.description: The DTK-M16 muzzle brake, designed for AR-15 and compatible systems. Greatly reduces recoil and muzzle rise due to the special compensation chamber. Manufactured by Delta-Tek.

items.name: BT10 V8 Atlas Bipod
items.description: The Atlas V8 series BT10 bipod. Lightweight, foldable, adjustable. Manufactured by B&T Industries L.L.C.

items.name: APOK Tactical Wasteland Gladius
items.description: The Tactical Wasteland Gladius sword, manufactured by APOK. Arena champion's prime melee weapon. Rumors are that this is the exact blade that the gladiator Voron used to fight with. Or at least it looks like one.

items.name: Armband (ARENA)
items.description: Armband given by Ref. The mark of the Tarkov Arena champion.

items.name: Secure container Theta
items.description: A unique secure container available only for Tarkov Arena champions.

items.name: Shatun's hideout key
items.description: A key that unlocks a door to one of the village houses located somewhere in Priozersk natural reserve. Belonged to one of the Arena gladiators by the name "Shatun".

items.name: Grumpy's hideout key
items.description: A key that unlocks the room located at the power station next to the ULTRA mall. Belonged to one of the Arena gladiators by the name "Grumpy".

items.name: Voron's hideout key
items.description: A key that opens the room located somewhere near the Health Resort. Belonged to one of the Arena gladiators by the name "Voron".

items.name: Leon's hideout key
items.description: A key to the room in the big house next to the bridge that leads to the water treatment plant. Belonged to one of Arena gladiators by the name "Leon".

items.name: Dorm overseer key
items.description: A key to the three-story dormitory with a tag reading "Overseer" on it. Appears to be extremely fragile, one-two uses and the key will break apart.

items.name: 2A2-(b-TG) stimulant injector
items.description: TerraGroup's next development after the 3-(b-TG) stimulant. The goal of the project was to obtain a drug that would give an advantage in reconnaissance and crossing combat zones far away from supply points. At the same time, the drug is required to be manufacturable in handicraft conditions. The obtained substance allows to keep the CNS in tone for a long period of time, which positively affects the fighter's efficiency to assess the environment, and also enhances their ability to carry equipment. The stimulant’s effective duration is accompanied by increased loss of hydration.

items.name: "The Eye" mortar strike signaling device
items.description: A special device that utilizes a whole network of detectors, communication systems and satellites. Mechanic built it from the blueprints of a certain someone named Mr. Kerman. Although the device doesn't allow you to connect to digital maps of the area, it can warn you of an impending mortar attack.

items.name: Lega Medal
items.description: A medal with the Legendary Kill mark. An extremely rare reward for Arena gladiators, which can be earned by completing Ref's hardest challenges.

items.name: Locked equipment crate (Rare)
items.description: A trophy for participating in Arena battles. It contains various equipment to help you survive and kill in the harsh world of Tarkov. But first, you need to find a way to open this box.

items.name: Locked weapon crate (Rare)
items.description: A trophy for participating in Arena battles. Contains ammunition, weapon mods, or even weapons if you're lucky. Everything you need to make your enemies respect you. But first, you need to find a way to open this box.

items.name: Locked supply crate (Rare)
items.description: A trophy for participating in Arena battles. Outside the border, the contents of this box can hardly be considered valuable. However, Tarkov has its own notions of value. But first, you need to find a way to open this box.

items.name: Den figurine
items.description: A limited edition Tarko figurine of a BEAR PMC operator and Ryzhy's battle buddy. Despite all the hardships, his beard looks surprisingly neat.

items.name: Locked valuables crate (Rare)
items.description: A trophy for participating in Arena battles. Unlike cash, barter will always be viable, and the contents of this box may be more valuable than a few packs of crunchy paper. But first, you need to find a way to open this box.

items.name: Reshala figurine
items.description: A limited edition Tarko figurine. A lover of expensive watches and golden handguns. Knows how to roundhouse kick. All bark and no bite.

items.name: Killa figurine
items.description: A limited edition Tarko figurine. Killa loves hardbass, three stripes and is waiting to meet you at the mall. Tarko's swaggiest figure, and whoever said otherwise, has been missing ever since. The figurine is rumored to be made of the same material as his helmet.

items.name: Tagilla figurine
items.description: A limited edition Tarko figurine. As a child, Tagilla fell into a tub of protein. His welding mask protects him not only from bullets, but also from blood spatter. Many parts of the Polikhim factory are rumored to be forged with his hammer.

items.name: Unlocked equipment crate (Rare)
items.description: A trophy for participating in Arena battles. It contains various equipment to help you survive and kill in the harsh world of Tarkov. The lock has been crudely broken, which means there are no more obstacles between you and the contents of the box.

items.name: Unlocked weapon crate (Rare)
items.description: A trophy for participating in Arena battles. Contains ammunition, weapon mods, or even weapons if you're lucky. Everything you need to make your enemies respect you. The lock has been crudely broken, which means there are no more obstacles between you and the contents of the box.

items.description: A lightweight polymer tactical foregrip. Mounted on handguards with M-LOK interface. Manufactured by Bravo Company Manufacturing. Black color version.

items.name: BCM GUNFIGHTER MOD 3 M-LOK foregrip (FDE)
items.description: A lightweight polymer tactical foregrip. Mounted on handguards with M-LOK interface. Manufactured by Bravo Company Manufacturing. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: Secure container Gamma
items.description: A unique secure container used only by veteran PMCs formerly deployed in Tarkov. Has a mysterious mark on the side.

This ultra-compact submachine gun is an evolution of the full-size UZI submachine gun, ideal for concealed carry and featuring a high rate of fire. Manufactured by Israel Weapon Industries.

items.name: Magnum Research Desert Eagle Mk XIX .50 AE pistol
items.description: Desert Eagle (Mk XIX) is the third modification of the .50 Action Express caliber sport-hunting pistol. This pistol is huge, heavy and not the most practical in operation, but at the same time it is an absolutely unique short-barreled weapon, which undoubtedly became a frequent visitor in video games for its brutal appearance and impressive size. The Desert Eagle did not win any military approval, but deservedly became one of the most famous pistols in the world. Manufactured by Magnum Research.

items.description:
A foldable buttstock for the UZI submachine gun. The most famous variant which has been involved in countless operations, from localized skirmishes on the southern continent, to protecting presidents during assassination attempts. Manufactured by Israel Weapon Industries.
Slap it HARDER, I know you want it!
