items.description: A rubberized grip with finger grooves for the Desert Eagle pistol. Manufactured by Hogue.

items.name: Partisan's bag
items.description: An old used Gorka bag. It seems that Partisan replaced his old Afghan trophies with patches of PMC operatives who were foolish enough to cross him in some way when they came to Tarkov.

items.name: AK skeletonized stock (Customized)
items.description: A metal skeleton stock equipped with a bandage and Esmarch tourniquet, the use of which, when carried this way, has been the subject of much debate and is still in question. A true old school.

items.name: TerraGroup storage room keycard
items.description: An access keycard for the TerraGroup storage room, located inside Chemical Plant No. 16.

items.description: An Inseq brand adjustable wrench in a cerulean blue color, reminiscent of the cold depths of the Siberian sky. Combines reliability with functional simplicity.

items.name: Camelbak Tri-Zip assault backpack (MultiCam)
items.description: A Mid-sized versatile assault pack. Spacious, sturdy and comfortable, this backpack is loved both by military and hikers worldwide. 34L of total space, a hydration system, easy access to side pockets, near-perfect suspension, and a MOLLE attachment system make it a great choice for up to 72 hours of autonomous hiking... or carrying a good load of loot. MultiCam camouflage version.

items.name: Vertx Ready Pack backpack (Red)
items.description: A tactical (but not overly tactical) everyday carry 20L backpack made by Vertx. Red color version.

items.name: Ballistic Armor Co. Bastion helmet (Armor Black)
items.description: The Bastion NIJ level IIIA tactical helmet designed for law enforcement and civilian use. Equipped with M-LOK interface rails for mounting additional equipment. Manufactured by Ballistic Armor Co. Armor Black version.

items.name: Ballistic Armor Co. Bastion helmet (OD Green)
items.description: The Bastion NIJ level IIIA tactical helmet designed for law enforcement and civilian use. Equipped with M-LOK interface rails for mounting additional equipment. Manufactured by Ballistic Armor Co. OD Green version.

items.description: The Bastion NIJ level IIIA tactical helmet designed for law enforcement and civilian use. Equipped with M-LOK interface rails for mounting additional equipment. Manufactured by Ballistic Armor Co. MultiCam camouflage version.

items.name: Safariland Liberator HP 2.0 Hearing Protection Headset (FDE)
items.description: A next generation low-profile active headset, designed to protect the user's hearing from external factors. Manufactured by Safariland. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: Peltor ComTac V headset (OD Green)
items.description: A communication headset equipped with a microphone and omnidirectional high-fidelity speakers that are optimized for voice communication and capable of picking up sounds with high sensitivity. Manufactured by 3M Peltor. OD Green color version.

items.name: Peltor ComTac VI headset (Coyote Brown)
items.description: An improved version of the ComTac V communication headset, equipped with advanced environmental listening settings and an NIB (Natural Interaction Behavior) feature, allowing to communicate with other ComTac VI users in a certain proximity without having to use radios. Manufactured by 3M Peltor. Coyote Brown version.

items.name: TW EXFIL Peltor ComTac V headset (OD Green)
items.description: A communication headset equipped with a microphone and omnidirectional high-fidelity speakers that are optimized for voice communication and capable of picking up sounds with high sensitivity. Equipped with a mount for attaching the headset to Team Wendy EXFIL helmets. Manufactured by 3M Peltor. OD Green color version.

items.name: TW EXFIL Peltor ComTac VI headset (Coyote Brown)
items.description: An improved version of the ComTac V communication headset, equipped with advanced environmental listening settings and an NIB (Natural Interaction Behavior) feature, allowing to communicate with other ComTac VI users in a certain proximity without having to use radios. Equipped with a mount for attaching the headset to Team Wendy EXFIL helmets. Manufactured by 3M Peltor. Coyote Brown version.

items.name: Stich Profi Stich Defense mod.2 plate carrier (MultiCam)
items.description: A plate carrier designed for Granit and SAPI plates, made of heavy-duty materials with IR remission. Equipped with ROC buckles for quick donning and doffing. The inner sides are made of soft fabric and equipped with vent pads for increased comfort. Manufactured by Stich Profi. MultiCam camouflage version.

items.name: Tasmanian Tiger Plate Carrier MKIII (Coyote Brown)
items.description: A lightweight low-profile plate carrier designed to fit SAPI plates. Manufactured by Tasmanian Tiger. Coyote Brown version.

items.name: DevTac Ronin ballistic helmet
items.description: A Japan-styled tactical helmet, manufactured by DevTac. Not used by any military or special forces. Just somehow happened to be in Tarkov for some frivolous price. Features a full protection of the whole head, but the armor class is not good enough to actually be useful in combat.

items.name: Signal flare (Blue)
items.description: Signal flare (Blue)

items.name: RSP-30 reactive signal cartridge (Blue)
items.description: A reactive signal cartridge for commanding and maintaining squad interaction. Some Scavs use this flare color to send some kinds of signals. The question is, what do these signals mean?

items.name: RSP-30 reactive signal cartridge (Special Yellow)
items.description: A special cartridge used to signal the right people and collect the special cargo for Prapor.

items.name: Radar station spare parts
items.description: Some spare parts for radar stations. Probably not useful unless you're an advanced radar specialist PMC. Which you probably aren't.

items.name: KOSA UAV electronic jamming device
items.description: The device is designed to suppress UAV guidance systems. Helps to reliably protect any facility from airborne attacks.

items.name: GARY ZONT portable electronic warfare device
items.description: The device suppresses satellite navigation system signals within a several kilometers radius. Sometimes these “umbrellas” can be more important than good body armor.

items.name: V40 Mini-Grenade
items.description: A Dutch fragmentation hand grenade. The grenade is the size of a standard golf ball and has a guaranteed lethal radius of only one meter.

items.name: MPS Auto Assault-12 Gen 1 12ga automatic shotgun
items.description: The AA-12 (Auto Assault-12) is a reliable full-auto 12-gauge shotgun. The first generation features the high-mounted built-in iron sights. This shotgun is distinguished by its recoil pulse accumulation, which makes the recoil feel smooth without sacrificing fire rate and stopping power. The AA-12 is designed for military and police units. Manufactured by Military Police Systems.

items.name: AA-12 12ga 417mm threaded barrel
items.description: A 417mm threaded barrel for the Auto Assault-12 12-gauge shotgun.

items.name: AA-12 thread protector
items.description: A barrel thread protector for the Auto Assault-12 12ga shotgun.

items.name: AA-12 12ga choke
items.description: A special muzzle device for the Auto Assault-12 shotgun.

items.name: AA-12 stock assembly (FDE)
items.description: A standard-issue stock assembly for the Auto Assault-12 shotgun. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: Leapers UTG Universal Shotgun Barrel Mount
items.description: The UTG Universal Shotgun Barrel Mount is designed for mounting on tubular magazines and barrels with a diameter of 20-25 millimeters. Features 3 rails for attaching additional equipment. Manufactured by Leapers Inc.

items.name: TerraGroup Labs residential unit keycard
items.description: A keycard to the residential unit in the containment block of TerraGroup Labs.

items.name: HK G36 IDZ adjustable stock
items.description: A polymer adjustable buttstock for the G36 assault rifle, manufactured by Heckler & Koch.

items.name: HK G36 IDZ Convex Buttpad
items.description: An extended convex buttpad designed for installation on IDZ stocks for the G36 assault rifle. Manufactured by Heckler & Koch.

items.name: HK G36 IDZ Concave Buttpad
items.description: A concave buttpad designed for installation on IDZ stocks for the G36 assault rifle. Manufactured by Heckler & Koch.

items.name: Steyr AUG A3 Vltor 5.56x45 receiver
items.description: A low-profile receiver with built-in tactical equipment rail for AUG A3. Manufactured by Vltor.

items.name: Steyr AUG A3 Corvus Defensio Receiver Rail MOI 30 Slots
items.description: A low-profile sight mount for AUG A3. Manufactured by Corvus Defensio.

items.name: Steyr AUG Corvus Defensio KeyMod Forward Accessory Rail
items.description: A KeyMod interface mount that replaces the standard front grip and allows installation of various accessories, designed for the AUG assault rifle. Manufactured by Corvus Defensio.

items.name: Corvus Defensio KeyMod 1.8 inch rail section
items.description: The Corvus Defensio 1.8 inch KeyMod rail allows installation of additional equipment on the handguards equipped with a standard KeyMod interface.

items.name: Corvus Defensio KeyMod 6.8 inch rail section
items.description: The Corvus Defensio 6.8 inch KeyMod rail allows installation of additional equipment on the handguards equipped with a standard KeyMod interface.

items.name: Odin Works K-Pod KeyMod bipod adapter
items.description: A KeyMod interface mount that allows installation of bipods. Manufactured by Odin Works.

items.name: AI AXMC KeySlot Harris bipod mount
items.description: A KeySlot interface adapter that allows installation of Harris bipods to the AXMC precision rifle. Manufactured by Accuracy International.

items.name: Magpul M-LOK Bipod Mount
items.description: A mount allows installation of bipods on handguards equipped with a standard M-LOK interface. Manufactured by Magpul.

items.name: MPS Auto Assault-12 Gen 2 12ga automatic shotgun
items.description: The AA-12 (Auto Assault-12) is a reliable full-auto 12-gauge shotgun. The second generation features a mount for installing optics. This shotgun is distinguished by its recoil pulse accumulation, which makes the recoil feel smooth without sacrificing fire rate and stopping power. The AA-12 is designed for military and police units. Manufactured by Military Police Systems.

items.name: Steyr AUG A3 5.56x45 assault rifle (Black)
items.description: Steyr AUG A3 is a 5.56x45 bullpup assault rifle, developed by the Austrian company Steyr-Daimler-Puch. AUG is known for good ergonomics, decent accuracy, low recoil and sufficient reliability. The rifle also stands out for its futuristic design. The A3 version features a bolt-catch button. Black version.

items.name: Steyr AUG vertical foregrip (Black)
items.description: A vertical foregrip for the Steyr AUG assault rifle. Black version.

items.name: AA-12 stock assembly (TerraGroup)
items.description: A standard-issue stock assembly for the Auto Assault-12 shotgun. TerraGroup version.

items.name: MPS Auto Assault-12 Gen 1 12ga automatic shotgun Default
MPS Auto Assault-12 Gen 2 12ga automatic shotgun Default
MPS Auto Assault-12 Gen 2 12ga automatic shotgun TerraGroup Labs
MPS Auto Assault-12 Gen 2 12ga automatic shotgun
Steyr AUG A3 5.56x45 assault rifle (Black) Default
Sako TRG M10 .338 LM bolt-action sniper rifle
items.description: The TRG M10 is a precision bolt-action sniper rifle chambered for the .338 Lapua Magnum cartridge. The TRG M10 is an extremely versatile platform: it easily converts from a proper long-range rifle to a more compact weapon. The rifle is designed to be used by army, police and various special forces of several countries. Manufactured by Sako, which is part of Beretta Defense Technologies holding company.

items.name: Sako TRG M10 chassis
items.description: Standard chassis with a folding stock for the TRG M10 sniper rifle, manufactured by Sako.

items.name: Sako TRG M10 .338 LM bolt assembly
items.description: A .338 Lapua Magnum bolt assembly for the Sako TRG M10 sniper rifle.

items.name: Sako TRG M10 .338 LM receiver
items.description: A standard .338 Lapua Magnum receiver for the TRG M10 sniper rifle. Manufactured by Sako.

items.name: Sako TRG M10 scope mount
items.description: A universal rail for mounting various sights on the TRG M10 sniper rifle. Manufactured by Sako.

items.name: Sako TRG M10 .338 LM 23.5 inch barrel
items.description: A 23.5 inch (597mm) .338 Lapua Magnum barrel for the TRG M10 sniper rifle, manufactured by Sako.

items.name: Sako TRG M10 15 inch handguard assembly
items.description: A 15 inch long handguard assembly for the TRG M10 sniper rifle, equipped with a Finnish interface for mounting additional equipment. Manufactured by Sako.

items.name: Sako TRG M10 grip pad
items.description: A standard-issue padded grip for the TRG M10 sniper rifle, manufactured by Sako. Comes with a hex and torx key set for quick access.

items.name: Sako TRG M10 .338 LM 8-round magazine
items.description: An 8-round .338 Lapua Magnum magazine for the TRG M10 sniper rifle, manufactured by Sako.

items.name: Sako TRG short length rail
items.description: A short length handguard rail for installing additional equipment on the TRG series sniper rifles. Manufactured by Sako.

items.name: Sako TRG medium length rail
items.description: A medium length handguard rail for installing additional equipment on the TRG series sniper rifles. Manufactured by Sako.

items.name: Sako TRG M10 rear hook
items.description: A rail cover for the TRG M10 sniper rifle buttstock. Manufactured by Sako.

items.name: Ase Utra SL7i-BL BoreLock .338 LM sound suppressor
items.description: The SL7i-BL sound suppressor, installed on compatible BoreLock muzzle brakes. Manufactured by Ase Utra.

items.name: Sako TRG PGM Precision .338 LM sound suppressor
items.description: A sound suppressor manufactured by PGM Precision, designed to fit .338 Lapua Magnum weapons.

items.name: CGS Hekate DT .338 LM sound suppressor
items.description: The Hekate DT .338 LM suppressor boasts great noise and flash reduction for large caliber rifles. Manufactured by CGS Group.

items.name: Ase Utra BoreLock .338 LM muzzle brake
items.description: A muzzle brake manufactured by Ase Utra for .338 LM (8.6x70). Reduces recoil and counters the muzzle rise. The brake is threaded and compatible with BoreLock-type sound suppressors.

items.name: Ase Utra BoreLock thread protector
items.description: A threading protection cap for Ase Utra BoreLock muzzle brakes.

items.name: Sako TRG .338 LM thread protector
items.description: A threading protection cap for the Sako TRG .338 LM rifle barrel.

items.name: Sako TRG Coretac CoreBrake .338 LM muzzle brake
items.description: A .338 LM muzzle brake for the TRG sniper rifle. Manufactured by Coretac Solutions.

items.name: Sako TRG 22/42/M10 .338 LM muzzle brake
items.description: A TRG .338 LM sniper rifle muzzle brake, manufactured by Sako.

items.name: Sako TRG M10 .338 LM 20 inch barrel
items.description: A 20 inch (508mm) .338 Lapua Magnum barrel for the TRG M10 sniper rifle, manufactured by Sako.

items.name: Sako TRG M10 .338 LM 27 inch barrel
items.description: A 27 inch (685mm) .338 Lapua Magnum barrel for the TRG M10 sniper rifle, manufactured by Sako.

items.name: Sako TRG M10 11 inch handguard assembly
items.description: An 11 inch long handguard assembly for the TRG M10 sniper rifle, equipped with a Finnish interface for mounting additional equipment. Manufactured by Sako.

items.name: Sako TRG M10 M-LOK 15 inch handguard assembly
items.description: A 15 inch long handguard assembly for the TRG M10 sniper rifle, equipped with an M-LOK interface for mounting additional equipment. Manufactured by Sako.

items.name: Opened case
items.description: This case contains several sealed boxes.

items.name: Contraband box
items.description: A box containing contraband cargo from Peacekeeper. Opening it might not be a good idea.

items.name: Sealed box
items.description: The box is sealed to protect its contents. A multitool is required to open it.

items.name: Opened box
items.description: This box can't hold much, but now you can see what's inside.

items.name: Locked case
items.description: The contents are unknown, but you'll need a key to open it.

items.name: ShG-2 assault rocket
items.description: A 72.5mm thermobaric assault rocket for the RShG-2 rocket launcher.

items.name: Case key
items.description: A key suitable for opening most standard cases.

items.name: 5.11 Tactical RUSH 100 backpack (Black)
items.description: A tactical backpack with a complex modular system. The arrangement of internal compartments and side straps makes the RUSH 100 a highly versatile backpack that can be adapted to any combat situation.

items.name: LBT-1476A 3Day Pack (MultiCam Alpine)
items.description: A medium-size 3-day backpack designed for both military and tourist use. Manufactured by London Bridge Trading. MultiCam Alpine version.

items.name: 6B47 Ratnik-BSh helmet (EMR Arctic cover)
items.description: 6B47 is an aramid helmet of Russian origin. As part of the Ratnik program, it is the new standard-issue helmet for most of the Russian Armed Forces. The 6B47 is similar to previous generation helmets such as the 6B7-1M and 6B27. It has equal protection but weighs slightly less, floats in water, and has mounting equipment for lights and night vision devices. The helmet can be fitted with a variety of covers for different environments. Equipped with an arctic EMR camouflage cover.

items.name: Spiritus Systems Bank Robber chest rig (MultiCam Alpine)
items.description: An ultra-compact and lightweight chest rig for mobility and comfort. Manufactured by Spiritus Systems. MultiCam Alpine camouflage version, for all your winter LARP needs.

items.name: PP-19-01 9x19 F5 MFG 50-round drum magazine
items.description: A PP-19-01 Vityaz 9x19 drum magazine with a 50-round capacity. Manufactured by F5 MFG.

items.name: Velociraptor polymer handguard
items.description: A polymer handguard for the Velociraptor assault rifle. A modified version of the Tapco AK handguard based on the Galil AR handguard, designed to be installed over the suppressor shroud, preventing possible injury to the shooter's hands during firing.

items.name: Aklys Defense Velociraptor .300 Blackout assault rifle
items.description: A special modification based on the AK assault rifle chambered in .300 Blackout caliber, manufactured by Aklys Defense. It replaces the standard barrel assembly with a modified integrally suppressed barrel, which allowed to achieve a significantly reduced sound signature.

items.name: Akula push dagger
items.description: As dangerous as the fish it's named after.

items.name: 6B13 M assault armor (Christmas Edition)
items.description: To celebrate Christmas and the New Year, Killa redesigned his body armor. The armor is now more noticeable, but Killa has never been one for cautious reconnaissance.

items.name: Mystery Ranch Terraframe backpack (Olive Drab)
items.description: A comfortable and spacious backpack for its volume, it remained popular even in wartime. Judging by the attached antlers, this backpack used to belong to a hunter.

items.name: Mystery Ranch Terraframe backpack (Christmas Edition)
items.description: Someone has decorated the standard Terraframe model for Christmas. The weight hasn't changed much, but going into a raid has become somehow... more cheerful?

items.name: SOK-12 Chaos Titan Quad Rail handguard
items.description: A lightweight handguard from the Titan Quad Rail System for Saiga shotguns. Manufactured by Chaos.

items.name: SOK-12 Chaos Titan Quad Rail handguard top cover
items.description: A handguard top rail for the Titan Quad Rail System, manufactured by Chaos.

items.name: SOK-12 Chaos Titan receiver top rail
items.description: A receiver top rail for the Titan Quad Rail System, manufactured by Chaos.

items.name: Chaos HK Style rear sight
items.description: A rear sight modeled after the popular Heckler & Koch iron sights, manufactured by Chaos.

items.name: Chaos HK Style front sight
items.description: A front sight modeled after the popular Heckler & Koch iron sights, manufactured by Chaos.

items.name: SOK-12 12ga MD Arms 20-round drum magazine
items.description: The MD Arms 20-shell drum magazine for SOK-12 and compatible weapons, intended for use with 12/76 or 12/70 shells.

items.name: Saiga-12K 12ga automatic shotgun
items.description: A modification of the Saiga-12K smoothbore shotgun, enabling fully automatic fire. Hell of a beast.

items.name: PNV-57E night vision goggles
items.description: Despite the fact that this model was manufactured in the 80s, the Soviet quality is still evident. The picture might not be as good as gen 2 or gen 3 night vision, but it's definitely worth its price.

items.name: AR-15 Magpul B.A.D. Lever bolt release
items.description: The Battery Assist Device Lever for the AR-15 platform and compatibles. Allows to release the bolt into battery from the right side of the rifle, making it easier to operate the weapon for left-handed shooters. Manufactured by Magpul.

items.name: Jar of pickles
items.description: The jar has been sealed either a few months or a few years ago. There's hardly anyone left in the city who would waste time making fresh pickles.

items.name: Olivier salad box
items.description: Even during a military conflict, experienced warriors strive to celebrate the holiday. Olivier salad is the mainstay of the New Year's Eve table.

items.name: Special 40-degree fuel
items.description: Even gasoline can fail in extreme cold. That is why you have to use something stronger outdoors.

items.name: SHYSHKA Christmas tree life extender
items.description: A special product designed for preserving the cut Christmas trees.

items.name: MTEK FLUX Ballistic helmet (MultiCam Alpine)
items.description: A version of the MTEK STRIKE helmet with extended modularity. MultiCam Alpine version.

items.name: MTEK FLUX Ballistic helmet (Olive Drab)
items.description: A version of the MTEK STRIKE helmet with extended modularity. Olive Drab version.

items.name: MTEK STRIKE Ballistic helmet (Coyote)
items.description: A lightweight ergonomic helmet manufactured by MTEK. Coyote version.

items.name: MTEK STRIKE Ballistic helmet (Coyote/MultiCam Arid)
items.description: A lightweight ergonomic helmet manufactured by MTEK. Coyote/MultiCam Arid version.

items.name: Maska-1SCh bulletproof helmet (Christmas Edition)
items.description: The Maska-1 bulletproof protective helmet appeared in service in 1991 as a replacement for the "Sphere" helmet, designed for use by the Ministry of Internal Affairs of the Russian Federation armed forces. The Maska-1SCh ("Mask-1 Shield") modification features a bulletproof steel faceshield to ensure maximum protection of the user's face. Looks like Killa loves to celebrate Christmas and New Year.

items.name: What You Seek poster
items.description: A rare What You Seek poster. Only the most hardcore USEC operators can get it.

items.name: I Bear Loot poster
items.description: A rare I Bear Loot poster. Very few BEAR operators can get one of these.

items.name: Girl poster
items.description: A simple poster of a girl. Perfect for a rest area.

items.name: Girl poster
items.description: A simple poster of a girl. A little weathered in some spots, but still pleasing to the eye.

items.name: Girl poster
items.description: A simple poster of a girl. So simple that every man in Tarkov had probably seen it at least once.

items.name: Girl poster
items.description: A simple poster of a girl. Not perfect condition, but it's doubtful you could find a better one.

items.name: Girl poster
items.description: A rare poster of a girl. It is said that someone pawned five gold teeth for one of these. Who they used to belong to is not stated.

items.name: Special girl poster
items.description: A poster that has truly become legendary. Only a few people have one of these.

items.name: Arena advertisement poster
items.description: A blatant advertisement for making money in the Arena. Many Tarkov citizens were tempted by the quick money, despite risking death.

items.name: Arena poster
items.description: A poster advertising making money in the Arena. Sure, you can make some quick cash, but you will most definitely die even quicker.

items.name: Bison vs Undertaker poster
items.description: A poster from the Arena. It depicts the at the time legendary gladiators. So many Scavs came to see them fight that there weren't enough seats in the stands. Nowadays, nobody even remembers who won.

items.name: Killa and Tagilla poster
items.description: A poster with Killa and Tagila as anime girls. If only they were real.

items.name: Alex Green poster
items.description: A poster of the avant-garde composer Alex Green. His music is multifaceted and unique, so much so that the world's leading media wrote about him. People used to pay huge sums of money to visit his concerts.

items.name: Things Sure Are Strange poster
items.description: A rare poster of the movie which was never released. Director N. Tankovsky said in an interview that the story would be about a young security guard who began to notice mystical strange things going on in Tarkov.

items.name: TerraGroup Labs advertisement
items.description: At one point, the whole Tarkov was flooded with advertisements like this. But for some reason this particular poster is subtly different.

items.name: Geneburn concert advertisement
items.description: A rare poster. The concert was held overseas. Why were these posters put up all over Tarkov? No one knows to this day, but conspiracy theories are rampant.

items.name: Exodus poster
items.description: A regular poster of yet another movie from the director A. Bambetov.

items.name: Den of Wolves poster
items.description: A regular poster for the unreleased movie Den of Wolves. Nothing special, just a wolf.

items.name: Highway poster
items.description: An unknown artist tried to envision what a highway will look like in 2028. What is it: a flight of fancy or a subtle warning?

items.name: Hell or Highwater poster
items.description: A poster for the movie Hell or Highwater. The big screens never ran it, but Tarkov still has enough of these posters left to use as decoration.

items.name: Gunfight poster
items.description: A poster for the action thriller Gunfight from the studio Battle Star. Years ago, cinemas used to have massive waiting lines for movie. Now all that's left are the posters. It's a nice reminder of the old days.

items.name: Last Flight poster
items.description: The thriller Last Flight did not win any awards, but the box office collected a decent amount of cash. The director of the movie, Yulin Kontorsky, must have been overjoyed.

items.name: Spooky Movie poster
items.description: The studio Bubble Step did a pretty good job on their debut horror film Spooky Movie. Too bad they didn't have enough imagination for the title.

items.name: Vasily poster
items.description: The movie Vasily from the legendary director Nikita Bayanov. It held the box office lead for 28 weeks, owing in no small part to its deep and unusual plot.

items.name: RUN poster
items.description: The poster is not wordy, but straightforward. It'll look great at the front door. Or the exit door?

items.name: Sharpshooter poster
items.description: The movie Sharpshooter never came out. A real shame. The poster's kinda stylish.

items.name: The Ambush poster
items.description: A poster of the movie The Ambush. Although, in the end, the audience didn't see anything other than posters.

items.name: The Hunted poster
items.description: A poster for the unreleased movie The Hunted. Something about this style reminds of... A sequel to another unreleased project?

items.name: USEC poster
items.description: A poster of the unreleased movie USEC. It seems that this is how they wanted to fill the ranks of PMC operatives.

items.name: Minefield map (Reserve)
items.description: Someone had sketched a hand-drawn diagram of the perimeter of the Federal Reserve military base in its northwestern part. According to the notes, there is a gap in the minefield that could be used for a safe exfil.

items.name: Minefield map (Lighthouse)
items.description: Someone was preparing to assault the water treatment plant and had marked out the optimal routes to bypass the minefields. One of the routes goes toward the bay. Looks like there's a safe exfil route from the coast.

items.name: Minefield map (Woods)
items.description: Someone has hand-drawn a diagram of the minefield next to the railroad in the nature reserve area. Apparently, you can safely exfil from Priozersk near the railroad bridge.

items.name: Note with code word Voron
items.description: It seems that "Voron" is some kind of cipher or code. If someone has manipulated the exfils from Customs, they must have left access only for their own. The question is, where are these exits?

items.name: Note with code word Onyx
items.description: “Onyx”. If it's not a random scribble, then it's some kind of code. Perhaps one of the Scavs has found a new exfil route out of the city, but only allows access to their own. In a densely built environment, a reliable escape route must be underground.

items.name: Note with code word Adaptation
items.description: There's only one word on the note: “Adaptation”. Looks like a code word. If someone found a new exfil route out of the TerraGroup HQ area, they must have placed their men nearby to keep anyone from the outside from getting to the new exit. In that case, the code would help distinguish friend from foe.

items.name: Note with code word Ark
items.description: The word “Ark” hardly needs to be taken literally. It's more like a code word. There are quite a few locked doors under the Polikhim Factory, leading deeper into the catacombs. Perhaps someone will open the door for you if you know the code word.

items.name: Note with code word Heartbeat
items.description: Someone wrote the word “Heartbeat” on a torn piece of paper. Sounds like one of Sanitar's weird pranks. Or perhaps a code word? If his men have their own exfil routes off Shoreline, they must be using a system of key phrases or signals. Maybe this note will make you look like one of their own.

items.name: Elf hat
items.description: Usually these hats ring loudly with each head movement. Looks like someone got all the bells out of it beforehand.

items.name: Hat with antlers
items.description: A Christmas hat with deer antlers. It won't protect you from gunshots, but it can distract your opponent for a split second. Sometimes that's all that matters.

items.name: Balaclava (White)
items.description: In normal conditions, this balaclava would be too visible. But in winter it becomes essential, especially in rough terrain.

items.name: Dogtag BEAR
items.description: A special army dogtag with rubber sides serving the purpose of quickly identifying the wounded and deceased in combat. An indicator of the PMC operative's status.

items.name: Dogtag BEAR
items.description: A special stainless steel army dogtag serving the purpose of quickly identifying the wounded and deceased in combat. Available only to the most experienced PMC operatives.

items.name: RSP-30 reactive signal cartridge (Firework)
items.description: RSP-30 is a reactive signal cartridge for commanding and maintaining squad interaction. Multi-star rocket cartridges are used as flares.

items.name: Signal flare (New Year)
items.description: Signal flare (New Year)

items.name: Aklys Defense Velociraptor .300 Blackout assault rifle Default
Secure container Kappa (Desecrated)
items.description: A secret TerraGroup invention that has fallen into the hands of the cultists.

items.name: Ballistic plate case
items.description: A spacious case for storing ballistic plates.

items.name: .50 AE Copper Solid ammo pack (20 pcs)
items.description: A pack of .50 AE Copper Solid ammo, 20 rounds.

items.name: .50 AE FMJ ammo pack (20 pcs)
items.description: A pack of .50 AE FMJ ammo, 20 rounds.

items.name: .50 AE JHP ammo pack (20 pcs)
items.description: A pack of .50 AE JHP ammo, 20 rounds.

items.name: .50 AE Hawk JSP ammo pack (20 pcs)
items.description: A pack of .50 AE Hawk JSP ammo, 20 rounds.

items.name: 6.8x51mm SIG FMJ ammo pack (20 pcs)
items.description: A box of 6.8x51mm SIG FMJ cartridges, 20 pieces.

items.name: 6.8x51mm SIG Hybrid ammo pack (20 pcs)
items.description: A box of 6.8x51mm SIG Hybrid cartridges, 20 pieces.

items.name: SOK-12 Kiba Arms Zombie Custom dust cover
items.description: A receiver dust cover for the SOK-12 shotgun, modernized by Kiba Arms.

items.name: Rooster mask
items.description: A children's mask stylized as a rooster. In the realities of Tarkov, it probably looks intimidating. Or not. As if there weren't enough mercs with cringy plastic skull masks already.

items.name: Cipollino mask
items.description: It looks like this mask was taken from a warehouse with props for a play based on a G. Rodari story.

items.name: Aybolit mask
items.description: A mask depicting one of the best doctors of all time.

items.name: Fox mask
items.description: These kinds of masks are often seen at kids' parties. But this one also fits an adult.

items.name: Grinch mask
items.description: A mask of someone who hates Christmas.

items.name: Hare mask
items.description: A common hare mask. It is unclear just who and why made a copy of this mask to fit an adult.

items.name: Astronomer mask
items.description: A stargazer mask with a cap worn by astronomers from children's fairy tales.

items.name: MPX GEN 2 ambidextrous charging handle
items.description: An ambidextrous charging handle with two latches for the second generation of the MPX SMG. Manufactured by SIG Sauer.

items.name: SB Tactical MPX Pistol Stabilizing Brace
items.description: A brace stock for MPX. Manufactured by SB Tactical.

items.name: MPX 9x19 Ronin Arms 4.75 inch Ported SD Barrel
items.description: A 4.75 inch ported barrel from the MPX-SD conversion kit designed for installation of the special suppressor. Manufactured by Ronin Arms.

items.name: MPX 9x19 Ronin Arms 6.75 inch Ported SD Barrel
items.description: A 6.75 inch ported barrel from the MPX-SD conversion kit designed for installation of the special suppressor. Manufactured by Ronin Arms.

items.name: MPX 9x19 Ronin Arms 8 inch SD Suppressor
items.description: An 8 inch suppressor from the MPX-SD conversion kit designed for installation over the custom ported barrel. Manufactured by Ronin Arms.

items.name: MPX 9x19 Ronin Arms 12 inch SD Suppressor
items.description: A 12 inch suppressor from the MPX-SD conversion kit designed for installation over the custom ported barrel. Manufactured by Ronin Arms.

items.name: MPX GEN1 4 inch handguard
items.description: A 4 inch handguard for the first generation of the SIG Sauer MPX SMG.

items.name: MPX GEN1 8 inch handguard
items.description: An 8 inch handguard for the first generation of the SIG Sauer MPX SMG.

items.name: MPX GEN2 4 inch M-LOK handguard
items.description: A 4 inch handguard for the second generation of the SIG Sauer MPX SMG equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of additional devices and accessories.

items.name: MPX GEN2 8 inch M-LOK handguard
items.description: An 8 inch handguard for the second generation of the SIG Sauer MPX SMG equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of additional devices and accessories.

items.name: MPX GEN2 6 inch M-LOK handguard
items.description: A 6 inch handguard for the second generation of the SIG Sauer MPX SMG equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of additional devices and accessories.

items.name: Khorovod armband
items.description: An armband by which the participants of the Khorovod can recognize each other. Without it, you cannot be part of the celebration.

items.name: Armband (Prestige 1)
items.description: This armband will help demonstrate your status in Tarkov.

items.name: Armband (Prestige 2)
items.description: These armbands are only for the best of the best.

items.name: Leupold Mark 5HD 5-25x56mm 35mm riflescope (FDE)
items.description: The Mark 5HD 5-25x56 riflescope is known for being a lighter and more efficient optic than other scopes in its class. Featuring optical glass, full multi-coated lenses and an advanced light management system, the scope offers low-glare, high-contrast imaging. Installed on 35mm ring mounts. Manufactured by Leupold. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: Leupold Mark IMS 35mm ring scope mount
items.description: A 35mm scope mount for installation on Picatinny rails. Manufactured by Leupold.

items.name: KAC MWS Bipod Adapter
items.description: A mount allows installation of Harris bipods on standard Picatinny handguards. Manufactured by Knight's Armament Company.

items.name: AKMS FAB Defense M4-AKMS P stock adapter
items.description: A buttstock adapter for the AKMS automatic rifle. Allows to install Com-Spec and Mil-Spec buttstocks on the weapon. Made of durable anodized aluminum. Manufactured by FAB Defense.

items.name: AR-15 5.56x45 Beta C-Mag 100-round drum magazine
items.description: A 100-round double drum magazine for the AR-15 platform weapons. Manufactured by Beta Company.

items.name: UZI 9x19 Beta C-Mag 100-round drum magazine
items.description: A 100-round double drum magazine for the UZI submachine gun. The magazine modification is equipped with a transparent plastic cover that allows to check the ammo count. Manufactured by Beta Company.

items.name: M9A3 9x19 CX4 30-round magazine
items.description: A 30-round 9x19 magazine for the Beretta M9A3 pistol.

items.name: FN SCAR-H X-17 7.62x51 assault rifle
items.description: The FN SCAR-H (Special Operations Forces Combat Assault Rifle - Heavy) assault rifle chambered in 7.62x51 NATO rounds, was adopted by the US SOCOM as the Mk 17. Features a side-folding polymer stock and a free-floating, cold hammer-forged Mil-Spec barrel with hardchromed bore. Fully-ambidextrous operating controls instantly adapt the SCAR to any user or any shooting position. The receiver-integrated optical rail plus three accessory rails enable mounting of a wide variety of scopes, electronic sights, tactical lights and lasers. The X-17 lower receiver allows the installation of AR-10 magazines. Manufactured by Fabrique Nationale Herstal and X Products.

items.name: AR-10 7.62x51 X Products X-25 50-round drum magazine
items.description: A 50-round 7.62x51 drum magazine for the AR-10 platform weapons. Manufactured by X Products.

items.name: RFB Quad Rail 3 inch mount
items.description: A 3 inch quad rail mount for the RFB rifle, allowing the installation of additional tactical equipment. Manufactured by Kel-Tec.

items.name: AR-15 DoubleStar ACE ARFX Skeleton Stock
items.description: The lightweight ACE ARFX Skeleton Stock provides comfort, balance and aesthetics. Fits both the Mil-Spec and civilian M/AR platform. Manufactured by DoubleStar.

items.name: AK AK-EVO stock
items.description: A new polymer buttstock for the modern AK platform folding weapons. Manufactured by Kalashnikov Concern.

items.name: Toni System Tactical Barrel Clamp
items.description: The Tactical Barrel Clamp is designed for mounting on tubular magazines and barrels with a diameter of 20-27 millimeters. Features a rail for attaching additional equipment. Manufactured by Toni System.

items.name: PP-19-01 Vityaz SAG MK1 M-LOK handguard with gas tube
items.description: A combined kit consisting of a handguard and a milled gas tube designed to improve the performance of the PP-19-01 Vityaz and the Saiga-9 civilian carbine. The handguard is equipped with an M-LOK interface for installing additional equipment, and the gas tube has a picatinny rail for mounting sights and tactical units. Manufactured by Sureshot Armament Group.

items.name: Sako TRG M10 .338 LM bolt-action sniper rifle Default
Old house room key
items.description: A key to one of the rooms in an old house somewhere on the edge of the Priozersk forest. It is said that a person nicknamed Ogryzok used to trade in these parts. He used to sell rare goods including even a steady supply of tank batteries. Yet nothing had long been heard of Ogryzok, and no one knows where he had disappeared to.

items.name: Company director's room key
items.description: This key must have been used to lock one of the company offices located in the customs terminal area.

items.name: SIG MPX 9x19 submachine gun Gen.2 PDW
AK 5.56x45 Molot Arms 45-round magazine
items.description: A 45-round 5.56x45 polymer magazine for AK. Manufactured by Molot Arms.

items.name: Cyclone Shakhin mount
items.description: A Weaver mount for installing the Shakhin thermal scope. Manufactured by Central Research Institute Cyclone.

items.name: Cyclone Shakhin 3.7x thermal scope
items.description: A 3.7x thermal scope manufactured by Central Research Institute Cyclone.

items.name: Cyclone Shakhin scope eyecup
items.description: A rubber eyecup for the Shakhin thermal scope. Manufactured by Central Research Institute Cyclone.

items.name: Dogtag USEC
items.description: A special stainless steel army dogtag serving the purpose of quickly identifying the wounded and deceased in combat. Available only to the most experienced PMC operatives.

items.name: Dogtag USEC
items.description: A special army dogtag with rubber sides serving the purpose of quickly identifying the wounded and deceased in combat. An indicator of the PMC operative's status.

items.name: 20/70 Flechette ammo pack (25 pcs)
items.description: A box of 20/70 Flechette cartridges, 25 pieces.

items.name: 20/70 TSS Armor Piercing Slug ammo pack (25 pcs)
items.description: A box of 20/70 TSS Armor Piercing Slug cartridges, 25 pieces.

items.name: 20/70 Dangerous Game Slug ammo pack (25 pcs)
items.description: A box of 20/70 Dangerous Game Slug cartridges, 25 pieces.

items.name: 7.62x51mm M80A1
items.description: A 7.62x51mm NATO M80A1 cartridge with a 124 grain armor-piercing copper jacket bullet with an exposed hardened steel penetrator, in a stainless steel casing. Designed as a replacement for the M80 cartridge to improve the armor penetration and ballistics of the cartridge as part of a program to eliminate the use of lead in small arms ammunition in the U.S. Army.

items.name: 7.62x51mm M80A1 ammo pack (20 pcs)
items.description: A box of 7.62x51mm M80A1 cartridges, 20 pieces.

items.description: A case with some common goodies.
