items.description: A case with some epic goodies.

items.name: RShG-2 72.5mm rocket launcher
items.description: A single-use 72.5mm rocket-propelled grenade launcher, designed to engage enemy personnel in open terrain, field shelters, and various types of structures. Manufactured by NPO Bazalt.

items.name: Tagilla's welding mask "ZABEY"
items.description: Judging by this mask, the Labyrinth had severely affected Tagilla's mental state, making him even more unhinged and bloodthirsty. Who thought he could be any more crazy?

items.name: Valve handwheel
items.description: A massive handwheel removed from some kind of valve. It must have been used to regulate the water or gas supply in the Knossos underground facilities.

items.name: Last Breath poster
items.description: There's no escape from the Minotaur's grasp. The only thing left to do is to take the last deep breath and hold on as long as possible.

items.name: Final Moment poster
items.description: Looking at this poster, you realize the sheer terror that the Minotaur's victims felt before they died.

items.name: Taurus poster
items.description: This poster embodies the nature of the Minotaur. Brutality, thirst for murder, and blood. Rivers of blood.

items.name: Tark Souls poster
items.description: This poster shows the Minotaur being slain by a warrior from the Labyrinth. Very few people have witnessed such a scene with their own eyes.

items.name: Knossos LLC facility key
items.description: A worn office door key marked "Knossos LLC". Probably used to open utility rooms or other premises belonging to Knossos.

items.name: Labrys access keycard
items.description: A keycard to one of Knossos facilities. The design references the Minotaur mythos, but it's somewhat strange there are no Minotaur theme parks in Tarkov.

items.name: Labrys research notes
items.description: The documents are encrypted, but appear to contain research notes on some kind of technology or weapon. The records mention the name “Item 1156”.

items.name: Nailhead figurine
items.description: A limited edition Tarko figurine. What's more strange: the pale skin or the nails stuck in his head? It looks like this poor guy has experienced the full spectrum of human pain.

items.name: Petya Crooker figurine
items.description: A limited edition Tarko figurine. A creepy dude with a disfigured face and blades on his arm. Doing Obdolbos would give you nightmares.

items.name: Count Bloodsucker figurine
items.description: A limited edition Tarko figurine. Count Bloodsucker wouldn't have lasted more than a couple days in Tarkov. Sucking blood is cool and all, but does it work against flashbangs and .308?

items.name: Xenoalien figurine
items.description: A limited edition Tarko figurine. Looks like a monster with a disproportionately elongated head and a double mouth. Totally "Alien" (good one) to the Tarko universe.

items.name: Pointy guy figurine
items.description: A limited edition Tarko figurine. This funny little character is wearing something like a pyramid on his head. A character like this could only exist in a fictional world, along with zombies and other monsters.

items.name: Chained Labrys
items.description: A two-handed axe made out of a sewer hatch... With that weight, a single blow is enough to split a skull, whether the blade is sharp or not.

items.name: Key 01
items.description: An old key, the markings are unreadable. Could be useful for surviving the Labyrinth.

items.name: Key 02
items.description: This key probably opens some kind of an old lock. The number engraving has been practically scratched off. Could be useful for surviving the Labyrinth.

items.name: Key 03
items.description: The number engraving is barely recognizable on the weathered metal. Could be useful for surviving the Labyrinth.

items.name: Key 04
items.description: The engraving on this key is barely readable: it's either the number 4 or the Russian letter Ч. Could be useful for surviving the Labyrinth.

items.name: Observation room key
items.description: A key that opens one of the personnel workstation rooms in the Labyrinth. That room may have something to do with the research that took place in the Labyrinth.

items.name: Torture room key
items.description: An old key that would be more suitable for a shabby lock on a grate or fence than a modern door.

items.name: Corpse room key
items.description: An old key that has a strong odor of death. Probably opens a morgue or a room where bodies were kept.

items.name: Labyrinth key
items.description: A key that opens a certain room in the Labyrinth. There's no telling what might be inside.

items.name: Atomic Defense CQCM ballistic mask (Smile)
items.description: Atomic Defense's CQCM ballistic mask provides protection against short-range weapons including pistols, shotguns and knives. Someone has customized this one to their liking.

items.name: Atomic Defense CQCM ballistic mask (Stop Me)
items.description: Atomic Defense's CQCM ballistic mask provides protection against short-range weapons including pistols, shotguns and knives. Could this writing on it be considered a cry for help?

items.name: Atomic Defense CQCM ballistic mask (Scars)
items.description: Atomic Defense's CQCM ballistic mask provides protection against short-range weapons including pistols, shotguns and knives. Scars or ritual symbols - what it depicts is up to you to determine.

items.name: Atomic Defense CQCM ballistic mask (Target)
items.description: Atomic Defense's CQCM ballistic mask provides protection against short-range weapons including pistols, shotguns and knives. This reinforced mask covers the wearer's face completely. It's unclear who had the idea to paint a target on it, but that sure is pretty ironic.

items.name: Atomic Defense CQCM ballistic mask (Skull)
items.description: Atomic Defense's CQCM ballistic mask provides protection against short-range weapons including pistols, shotguns and knives. Some say the skull is a universal symbol that inspires fear and respect in opponents.

items.name: Atomic Defense CQCM ballistic mask (Demon)
items.description: Atomic Defense's CQCM ballistic mask provides protection against short-range weapons including pistols, shotguns and knives. This reinforced mask covers the wearer's face completely. Mom always asked you to smile more, but she hardly expected this.

items.name: Atomic Defense CQCM ballistic mask (El Día de Muertos)
items.description: Atomic Defense's CQCM ballistic mask provides protection against short-range weapons including pistols, shotguns and knives. The drawing is applied with a durable paint for true fans of El Día de Muertos, the Day of the Dead.

items.name: Lower half-mask (MultiCam)
items.description: A piece of cloth, typically a bandana, covering the face from nose and below, is the most typical attribute of a street gang member. MultiCam camouflage version.

items.name: Lower half-mask (Zombie)
items.description: A piece of cloth, typically a bandana, covering the face from nose and below, is the most typical attribute of a street gang member. The zombie print is chosen in hopes of intimidating opponents.

items.name: Lower half-mask (Moss)
items.description: A piece of cloth, typically a bandana, covering the face from nose and below, is the most typical attribute of a street gang member. Moss camouflage version.

items.name: Lower half-mask (El Día de Muertos)
items.description: A piece of cloth, typically a bandana, covering the face from nose and below, is the most typical attribute of a street gang member. For true fans of El Día de Muertos, the Day of the Dead.

items.name: Lower half-mask (Wraith)
items.description: A piece of cloth, typically a bandana, covering the face from nose and below, is the most typical attribute of a street gang member. The print is chosen in hopes of intimidating opponents.

items.name: Lower half-mask (Balaclavas Green)
items.description: A piece of cloth, typically a bandana, covering the face from nose and below, is the most typical attribute of a street gang member. The colorful print will highlight your personality.

items.name: Lower half-mask (Balaclavas Red)
items.description: A piece of cloth, typically a bandana, covering the face from nose and below, is the most typical attribute of a street gang member. The colorful print will highlight your personality.

items.name: Lower half-mask (Balaclavas White)
items.description: A piece of cloth, typically a bandana, covering the face from nose and below, is the most typical attribute of a street gang member. The colorful print will highlight your personality.

items.name: Balaclava (Green)
items.description: A definitive woolen balaclava is not only a head-warmer but soul-warmer too for anyone who is too modest for public heroic deeds. Vibrant green version.

items.name: Balaclava (Scars)
items.description: Scars adorn a man, even if they're just on his balaclava.

items.name: Balaclava (Scratches)
items.description: The embroidered scratches on this balaclava refer to the worst fight of your life. Or trying to pet a fussy cat.

items.name: Balaclava (Born to Die)
items.description: With the embroidery on this balaclava, everyone will know your creed.

items.name: Balaclava (Not Nice)
items.description: A definitive woolen balaclava is not only a head-warmer but soul-warmer too for anyone who is too modest for public heroic deeds. The letterings add some flavor.

items.name: Balaclava (Yellow)
items.description: Why make face tattoos when you can make them on a mask.

items.name: Balaclava (Luxury)
items.description: This balaclava is designed to catch the eye. It's a good thing no one will recognize you with it on.

items.name: Cold Fear infrared balaclava (Green)
items.description: A quality balaclava with a special technological material. Green version. Or a Ranger Green version. Or an Olive Drab version. Or a Taiga Green version. Or an Army Green version. Or a Deep Forest Green version.

items.name: Cold Fear infrared balaclava (SBEU)
items.description: A quality balaclava with a special technological material. Very Stylish version.

items.name: Cold Fear infrared balaclava (Oak)
items.description: A quality balaclava with a special technological material. Hunting camo version.

items.name: Cold Fear infrared balaclava (Surpat)
items.description: A quality balaclava with a special technological material. Surpat camo version.

items.name: Cold Fear infrared balaclava (DPM Desert)
items.description: A quality balaclava with a special technological material. Desert Disruptive Pattern Material version. Drip? Unlimited.

items.name: Cold Fear infrared balaclava (MultiCam Tropic)
items.description: A quality balaclava with a special technological material. MultiCam Tropic version.

items.name: Cold Fear infrared balaclava (Tiger Stripe)
items.description: A quality balaclava with a special technological material. Tiger Stripe camouflage version.

items.name: Balaclava (Red Nose)
items.description: A universal balaclava. For those who want to express their individuality and warn both enemies and allies about who you really are.

items.name: Balaclava (Demon)
items.description: A universal balaclava. For the true Japanese warriors.

items.name: Balaclava (Skull)
items.description: Another balaclava with a skull print for the truest mall ninjas.

items.name: Balaclava (Fear)
items.description: Express yourself and intimidate your enemies (or make them cringe) with a yet another skull mask.

items.name: Balaclava (Yellow Oni)
items.description: A balaclava with a yellow Oni print.

items.name: Balaclava (Red Oni)
items.description: A balaclava with a red Oni print.

items.name: Balaclava (White Oni)
items.description: A balaclava with a white Oni print.

items.name: Balaclava (Smile)
items.description: A balaclava with a toothy smile print.

items.name: Neoprene mask (M90 Desert)
items.description: A lightweight neoprene mask. M90 Desert camouflage version.

items.name: Neoprene mask (Loui Peeton)
items.description: A lightweight neoprene mask with a luxury design.

items.name: Neoprene mask (Lucha Libre)
items.description: A lightweight neoprene mask with a professional wrestling print.

items.name: Neoprene mask (Zombie)
items.description: A lightweight neoprene mask with a zombie print.

items.name: Neoprene mask (Say Nothing)
items.description: A lightweight neoprene mask with a unique print. The little symbol on the side looks strangely familiar.

items.name: Neoprene mask (ONI)
items.description: A lightweight neoprene mask with an Oni print.

items.name: Hexatac HPC Plate Carrier (MultiCam)
items.description: A plate carrier by Hexatac. A minimalistic version designed to be used with chest rigs. MultiCam version.

items.name: BNTI Kirasa-N body armor (Green)
items.description: The "Kirasa N" body armor is designed for the army and police special forces of the Russian Federation. The bulletproof vest provides circular protection of the human torso. Elements of the damper provide ventilation of the under armor space and reduce the blunt damage. Green version.

items.name: FORT Redut-M body armor (SK Woodland)
items.description: “Redut-M” is a modified version of the well-proven Redut body armor, which is in service of special units of the FSB. The vest is based on advanced technologies in the field of individual armor. Due to the optimized form of armor elements and the outer cover with a special damping-ventilation system, the Redut M armored vest has excellent functional qualities, which facilitates active actions, including those associated with the use of vehicles and in confined spaces. SK Woodland version.

items.name: HighCom Trooper TFO body armor (Coyote)
items.description: A plate armor vest by HighCom, popular among USEC PMCs. Coyote version.

items.name: BBQ-S43 gas torch
items.description: A portable torch with a limited gas supply. This bad boy is unlikely to burn a hole in the wall, but will do the job on a small metal target.

items.name: ANA Tactical Alpha chest rig (MultiCam)
items.description: "Alpha" is a high-quality chest rig that fully meets the military standards for reliability and functionality. The combination of integrated pouches and MOLLE straps provides the means of carrying a large number of necessary equipment. The vest is designed as a classic chest rig. In this type of vest, all the gear is located in the front and side parts, while the back part is comprised of adjustment belts and straps. Manufactured by ANA Tactical. MultiCam camouflage version.

items.name: BlackRock chest rig (Khaki)
items.description: A custom-made chest rig for wearing on top of body armor in urban operations. Sturdy and versatile, it features both MOLLE and ALICE attachment systems. Khaki version.

items.name: Crye Precision AVS plate carrier (MultiCam)
items.description: The Crye Precision AVS plate carrier equipped with Groin Protector and pouches in assault configuration. MultiCam camouflage version.

items.name: 5.11 Tactical TacTec plate carrier (Storm)
items.description: A plate carrier with a set of pouches for use with assault rifles. Manufactured by 5.11 Tactical. Storm color version.

items.name: Dundukk sport sunglasses (Orange lenses)
items.description: Modern sunglasses, made in a sporty style. Great for a stylish shootout at the gas station.

items.name: RayBench Aviator glasses (Green lenses)
items.description: Legendary mercenary glasses around the world. Wear them if you want to be cool, like Vovan from the hood.

items.name: Oakley SI M Frame safety glasses (Orange lenses)
items.description: Ballistic glasses with impact-resistant polycarbonate lenses.

items.name: Round frame sunglasses (Green lenses)
items.description: Sunglasses with a round-shaped frame. Cool and stylish!

items.name: F-1 hand grenade (Reduced delay)
items.description: The F-1 hand grenade (GRAU Index 57-G-721) is an anti-personnel fragmentation grenade, designed for neutralizing enemy personnel in defensive combat. This version is personally modified by Partisan and has a shortened fuze, intended for explosive tripwires.

items.name: Kruglov's RFID keycard
items.description: A personalized RFID card with a strict design. Grants access to the TerraGroup evacuation point reserved for trusted personnel.

items.name: Activated Kruglov's RFID keycard
items.description: A personalized RFID card with a strict design. Now that it is activated, you can try to slip into the port.

items.name: Keycard from Kruglov's safe
items.description: A keycard found in Kruglov's safe.

items.name: Blank RFID keycard
items.description: A blank access keycard template. It doesn’t open anything, at least not yet.

items.name: Reprogrammed RFID keycard with Mr. Kerman's hash codes
items.description: An RFID keycard reprogrammed using hash codes from Mr. Kerman. Grants access to the port Terminal. At least, it should.

items.name: Flash drive with Mr. Kerman's hash codes
items.description: A flash drive containing updated hash codes for RFID cards. Handed over by a trusted associate of Mr. Kerman.

items.name: Reprogrammed RFID keycard with Prapor's hash codes
items.description: An RFID keycard reprogrammed using hash codes from Prapor. Grants access to the port Terminal. At least, it should.

items.name: Flash drive with Prapor's hash codes
items.description: A flash drive containing updated hash codes for RFID cards. Handed over by Prapor for a small favor.

items.name: RFID keycard with unknown name
items.description: A personalized RFID card with a strict design. An exact copy of Kruglov’s keycard, but the owner’s name has been deliberately scrubbed off. Grants access to the TerraGroup evacuation point reserved for trusted personnel.

items.name: .308 ME
items.description: A rifle cartridge developed in 2007 by American companies Marlin Firearms and Hornady for the lever-action hunting rifles Marlin Model 308MX and Marlin Model 308MXLR. It is based on the .307 Winchester and was designed to reproduce that cartridge’s high ballistic performance.

items.name: .308 ME LOKT
items.description: A .308 Marlin Express cartridge loaded with a soft-point expanding bullet, developed specifically for Marlin MX and MXLR rifles.

items.name: MXLR trigger
items.description: A standard-issue trigger for the Marlin MXLR rifle.

items.name: M1895/MXLR Ranger Point Precision trigger
items.description: An ergonomic trigger for M1895 rifles and compatibles. Manufactured by Ranger Point Precision.

items.name: MXLR hammer
items.description: A standard-issue hammer for the Marlin MXLR rifle.

items.name: M1895/MXLR Ranger Point Precision hammer spur extension
items.description: An ergonomic hammer extension for M1895 rifles and compatibles. Manufactured by Ranger Point Precision.

items.name: MXLR hammer spur extension
items.description: An ergonomic hammer extension for the Marlin MXLR.

items.name: MXLR loop lever
items.description: A standard loop lever for the Marlin MXLR.

items.name: M1895/MXLR Ranger Point Precision medium loop lever
items.description: An extended loop lever for M1895 rifles and compatibles. Manufactured by Ranger Point Precision.

items.name: MXLR standard stock
items.description: A standard stock for the Marlin MXLR rifle.

items.name: M1895/MXLR Ranger Point Precision aluminum stock
items.description: An aluminum stock for M1895 rifles and compatibles. Manufactured by Ranger Point Precision.

items.name: M1895/MXLR Magpul ELG stock
items.description: A polymer stock for M1895 and compatibles. Manufactured by Magpul.

items.name: M1895/MXLR Ranger Point Precision RHINO 5 inch scope rail
items.description: A 5 inch top rail for M1895 rifles and compatibles. Allows installation of various optics. Manufactured by Ranger Point Precision.

items.name: M1895/MXLR XS Marlin Optic Mount
items.description: A top rail for M1895 rifles and compatibles. Allows installation of various optics. Manufactured by XS Sights.

items.name: M1895/MXLR XS Marlin Ghost Ring rear sight
items.description: A Ghost Ring type rear sight for M1895 and compatibles. Manufactured by XS Sights.

items.name: MXLR .308 ME 5-round magazine
items.description: A 5-round .308 ME tube magazine for the Marlin MXLR rifle.

items.name: MXLR .308 ME 24 inch barrel
items.description: A 24 inch .308 ME barrel for the Marlin MXLR rifle.

items.name: MXLR standard front sight
items.description: A standard front sight for the Marlin MXLR rifle.

items.name: M1895/MXLR XS Marlin Ghost front sight
items.description: A Ghost type front sight for M1895 rifles and compatibles. Manufactured by XS Sights.

items.name: MXLR standard rear sight
items.description: A standard rear sight for the Marlin MXLR rifle.

items.name: M1895/MXLR Ranger Point Precision M-LOK handguard
items.description: A handguard for M1895 rifles and compatibles. Equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of tactical equipment. Manufactured by Ranger Point Precision.

items.name: M1895/MXLR Magpul ELG M-LOK handguard
items.description: A handguard for M1895 rifles and compatibles. Equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of tactical equipment. Manufactured by Magpul.

items.name: M1895/MXLR Ranger Point Precision COSTA M-LOK handguard
items.description: A handguard for M1895 rifles and compatibles. Equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of tactical equipment. Manufactured by Ranger Point Precision.

items.name: MXLR standard handguard
items.description: A standard handguard for the Marlin MXLR rifle.

items.name: M1895/MXLR Ranger Point Precision COSTA top rail
items.description: A top rail for the COSTA handguard for M1895 rifles and compatibles. Manufactured by Ranger Point Precision.

items.name: Marlin MXLR .308 ME lever-action rifle
items.description: The classic Marlin 1895 lever-action rifle in the MXLR (Marlin Express LEVERevolution) variant. A modern take on the timeless Henry-style lever-action. Comes in a chrome finish and chambered for the special .308 Marlin Express cartridge.

items.name: HighCom Trooper TFO body armor (Coyote) Default
Crye Precision AVS plate carrier (MultiCam) Default
FORT Redut-M body armor (SK Woodland) Default
Locked equipment crate (BattlePass 0)
items.description: A reward for progress in BattlePass Season 0. It contains various equipment to help you survive and kill in the harsh world of Tarkov. But first, you need to find a way to open this box.

items.name: Unlocked equipment crate (BattlePass 0)
items.description: A reward for progress in BattlePass Season 0. It contains various equipment to help you survive and kill in the harsh world of Tarkov. The lock has been crudely broken, which means there are no more obstacles between you and the contents of the box.

items.name: TheAKGuy AK-50 .50 BMG anti-materiel rifle
items.description: The AK-50 semi-automatic anti-materiel rifle is an experimental first-of-a-kind project that adapts the Kalashnikov platform to use the .50 BMG cartridge. The AK-50 has outstanding penetration and range, making it a very powerful sniper rifle. This prototype was developed by a firearms manufacturer and YouTube blogger Brandon Herrera and co. as part of The AK Guy LTD.

items.name: Sacred Amulet
items.description: A mysterious amulet given to you by Lightkeeper. Serves as a reminder of the wearer's important role in Tarkov's history. Very fragile.

items.name: Key case
items.description: This case is the ultimate solution to the problem of hoarding various keys in the stash, helping to store them in one place.

items.name: AK-50 dust cover
items.description: A receiver dust cover with integrated Picatinny rail for the AK-50, allowing installation of optics. Manufactured by The AK Guy LTD.

items.name: AK-50 .50 BMG 24 inch barrel
items.description: A 24 inch (612mm) barrel for the AK-50, manufactured by The AK Guy LTD.

items.name: AK-50 M-LOK handguard with gas tube
items.description: A handguard and gas tube for the AK-50. The handguard is equipped with an M-LOK standard interface for attaching additional equipment, and also has Picatinny rail for mounting tactical devices. Manufactured by The AK Guy LTD.

items.name: AK-50 .50 BMG muzzle brake
items.description: A muzzle brake for the AK-50. Reduces recoil and muzzle rise. Manufactured by The AK Guy LTD.

items.name: M82A1 .50 BMG 10-round magazine
items.description: A 10-round .50 BMG magazine for the M82A1 sniper rifle, manufactured by Barrett Firearms.

items.name: .50 BMG HP
items.description: A .50 BMG (12.7x99mm NATO) hollow point cartridge, developed in the USA. The cartridge has significant stopping power and is capable of inflicting devastating damage to the target upon impact, however the hollow point bullet design does not allow it to penetrate armor effectively.

items.name: .50 BMG M21
items.description: A .50 BMG (12.7x99mm NATO) M21 "headlight" high-visibility tracer cartridge, developed in the USA and adopted in 1923 for Browning M2 machine guns, primarily designed to destroy light armored vehicles and neutralize enemy personnel behind light cover. The cartridge has significant stopping power and is capable of inflicting devastating damage to the target upon impact.

items.name: .50 BMG M33
items.description: A .50 BMG (12.7x99mm NATO) M33 Ball cartridge, developed in the USA and adopted in 1923 for Browning M2 machine guns, primarily designed to destroy light armored vehicles and neutralize enemy personnel behind light cover. The cartridge has significant stopping power and is capable of inflicting devastating damage to the target upon impact.

items.name: .50 BMG M903 SLAP
items.description: A .50 BMG (12.7x99mm NATO) M903 SLAP (Saboted Light Armor Penetrator) cartridge. Created by placing a 7.62 armor-piercing bullet in a polymer container that separates after leaving the barrel. The cartridge has significant stopping power and is capable of inflicting devastating damage to the target upon impact.

items.name: Ariadne symbol key
items.description: Someone had made a barely visible mark on this key, resembling a ball of thread. Although, it could have simply been left by careless storage.

items.name: Tagilla's welding mask "ZABEY" (Replica)
items.description: Judging by this mask, the Labyrinth had severely affected Tagilla's mental state, making him even more unhinged and bloodthirsty. Who thought he could be any more crazy? It seems that this is merely a replica and cannot be worn. The mask was probably created as a souvenir, intended to remind survivors of their encounter with a ruthless killer.

items.name: TerraGroup corporate apartment key
items.description: A key found in A.P.'s room. It likely opens one of TerraGroup’s corporate apartments.

items.name: Arena Cup Series balaclava
items.description: A signature balaclava of the famous Tarkov hip-hop artist with the Arena Cup Series tournament insignia. The artist hasn't performed in Tarkov for quite a while, but their merch has found a new life.

items.name: Killa fangirl poster
items.description: This poster shows a Killa fangirl. Despite the scratches on the paper and folding marks, you can tell that the previous owner treasured this poster very much.

items.name: Grenade girl poster
items.description: Women are not usually allowed to join BEAR or USEC. But even though the poster is damaged and the paper is sticky in places, it is obvious that this photo is authentic.

items.name: Unusual leather rig poster
items.description: It seems unlikely that similar pieces of equipment are available in present-day Tarkov. Judging by the condition of the poster, it was obviously made during peacetime.

items.name: M1895/MXLR Ranger Point Precision trigger (Black)
items.description: An ergonomic trigger for M1895 rifles and compatibles. Manufactured by Ranger Point Precision. Black version.

items.name: M1895/MXLR Ranger Point Precision trigger (Gold)
items.description: An ergonomic trigger for M1895 rifles and compatibles. Manufactured by Ranger Point Precision. Gold color version.

items.name: M1895/MXLR Ranger Point Precision hammer spur extension (Black)
items.description: An ergonomic hammer extension for M1895 rifles and compatibles. Manufactured by Ranger Point Precision. Black version.

items.name: M1895/MXLR Ranger Point Precision aluminum stock (FDE)
items.description: An aluminum stock for M1895 rifles and compatibles. Manufactured by Ranger Point Precision. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: M1895/MXLR Ranger Point Precision aluminum stock (Green)
items.description: An aluminum stock for M1895 rifles and compatibles. Manufactured by Ranger Point Precision. Green version.

items.name: M1895/MXLR Ranger Point Precision M-LOK handguard (FDE)
items.description: A handguard for M1895 rifles and compatibles. Equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of tactical equipment. Manufactured by Ranger Point Precision. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: M1895/MXLR Ranger Point Precision M-LOK handguard (Green)
items.description: A handguard for M1895 rifles and compatibles. Equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of tactical equipment. Manufactured by Ranger Point Precision. Green version.

items.name: M1895/MXLR Magpul ELG M-LOK handguard (FDE)
items.description: A handguard for M1895 rifles and compatibles. Equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of tactical equipment. Manufactured by Magpul. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: M1895/MXLR Ranger Point Precision COSTA M-LOK handguard (FDE)
items.description: A handguard for M1895 rifles and compatibles. Equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of tactical equipment. Manufactured by Ranger Point Precision. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: M1895/MXLR Ranger Point Precision COSTA M-LOK handguard (Green)
items.description: A handguard for M1895 rifles and compatibles. Equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of tactical equipment. Manufactured by Ranger Point Precision. Green version.

items.name: M1895/MXLR Magpul ELG stock (FDE)
items.description: A polymer stock for M1895 rifles and compatibles. Manufactured by Magpul. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: HK G36 KAC Front Flip Up Sight
items.description: A flip-up folding front sight for the HK G36 assault rifle. Manufactured by Knight's Armament Company.

items.name: HK G36 KAC 600m Rear Sight Rail
items.description: A flip-up rear sight with a Picatinny rail for the HK G36 assault rifle. Manufactured by Knight's Armament Company.

items.name: MDR BLK LBL ALX Bipod 20 handguard (FDE)
items.description: A 20 inch handguard for MDR assault rifles with a bipod slot. Equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of additional tactical devices and accessories. Manufactured by BLK LBL. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: MDR BLK LBL ALX Bipod 20 handguard (Black)
items.description: A 20 inch handguard for MDR assault rifles with a bipod slot. Equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of additional tactical devices and accessories. Manufactured by BLK LBL. Black version.

items.name: MDR BLK LBL ALX Bipod 16 handguard (FDE)
items.description: A 16 inch handguard for MDR assault rifles with a bipod slot. Equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of additional tactical devices and accessories. Manufactured by BLK LBL. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: MDR BLK LBL ALX Bipod 16 handguard (Black)
items.description: A 16 inch handguard for MDR assault rifles with a bipod slot. Equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of additional tactical devices and accessories. Manufactured by BLK LBL. Black version.

items.name: MDR BLK LBL ALX Bipod 16
items.description: An integrated lightweight bipod for the ALX Bipod 16 handguard. Manufactured by BLK LBL.

items.name: MDR BLK LBL ALX Bipod 20
items.description: An integrated lightweight bipod for the ALX Bipod 20 handguard. Manufactured by BLK LBL.

items.name: MDR 5.56x45 20 inch barrel
items.description: A 20 inch (508mm) barrel for MDR based weapons for 5.56x45 NATO ammo.

items.name: MDR 7.62x51 20 inch barrel
items.description: A 20 inch (508mm) barrel for MDR based weapons for 7.62x51 NATO ammo.

items.name: MDR BLK LBL ALX 20 handguard (FDE)
items.description: A 20 inch handguard for MDR assault rifles. Equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of additional tactical devices and accessories. Manufactured by BLK LBL. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: MDR BLK LBL ALX 20 handguard (Black)
items.description: A 20 inch handguard for MDR assault rifles. Equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of additional tactical devices and accessories. Manufactured by BLK LBL. Black version.

items.name: A.P. meeting audio tape Part 1
items.description: A tape from the lecture hall recording one of the TerraGroup meetings.

items.name: MDR BLK LBL ALX 16 handguard (FDE)
items.description: A 16 inch handguard for MDR assault rifles. Equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of additional tactical devices and accessories. Manufactured by BLK LBL. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: MDR BLK LBL ALX 16 handguard (Black)
items.description: A 16 inch handguard for MDR assault rifles. Equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of additional tactical devices and accessories. Manufactured by BLK LBL. Black version.

items.name: MDR Micron M-LOK handguard (FDE)
items.description: A PDW handguard with an integrated foregrip for MDR assault rifles. Equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of additional tactical devices and accessories. Manufactured by Desert Tech. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: MDR 5.56x45 11.5 inch barrel
items.description: An 11.5 inch (292mm) barrel for MDR based weapons for 5.56x45 NATO ammo.

items.name: MDR Micron M-LOK handguard (Black)
items.description: A PDW handguard with an integrated foregrip for MDR assault rifles. Equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of additional tactical devices and accessories. Manufactured by Desert Tech. Black version.

items.name: Cult victim audio tape #1
items.description: An audio tape from the apartment of the cult victim. The recording mentions something called the Eye of the World.

items.name: MCX GEN1 10.5 inch handguard
items.description: A first-gen 10.5 inch handguard with a proprietary rail attachment system for the MCX assault rifle. Part of the LVAW (Low Visibility Assault Weapon) configuration used by US JSOC units. Manufactured by SIG Sauer.

items.name: MCX Lancer Carbon Fiber M-LOK 10.5 inch handguard
items.description: A 10.5 inch handguard for the MCX assault rifle, equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of additional tactical devices and accessories. Manufactured by Lancer Systems.

items.name: MCX Lancer Carbon Fiber M-LOK 12 inch handguard
items.description: A 12 inch handguard for the MCX assault rifle, equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of additional tactical devices and accessories. Manufactured by Lancer Systems.

items.name: MCX Lancer Carbon Fiber M-LOK 18 inch handguard
items.description: An 18 inch handguard for the MCX assault rifle, equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of additional tactical devices and accessories. Manufactured by Lancer Systems.

items.name: MCX .300 BLK 16 inch barrel
items.description: A 16 inch (406mm) barrel for MCX-based weapons, chambered in .300 BLK.

items.name: MCX Cal-X Mid-Piston gas block
items.description: A gas block with a medium length piston designed for the MCX assault rifles, manufactured by SIG Sauer.

items.name: SZ-1 explosive charge
items.description: A demolition charge equipped with an improvised countdown timer, ready for use.

items.name: AK-12 L.A.C. Akvilon-15 handguard
items.description: A free-float handguard for the AK-12 assault rifle. Equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of additional tactical devices and accessories. Manufactured by L.A.C.

items.name: AK-12 Tactical Ideas N-4 handguard
items.description: A free-float handguard for the AK-12 assault rifle. Equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of additional tactical devices and accessories. Manufactured by Tactical Ideas.

items.name: AK-12 Zenit Sport-12 handguard
items.description: A handguard for the AK-12 assault rifle. Manufactured by Zenit.

items.name: AK-12 Zenit Sport-12 handguard cover
items.description: A handguard cover from the Sport-12 kit for the AK-12 assault rifle. Manufactured by Zenit.

items.name: Zenit B-2 rail
items.description: A proprietary rail that allows installation of tactical equipment. Installed on the Basis series interface. Manufactured by Zenit.

items.name: Zenit B-2U rail
items.description: A proprietary rail that allows installation of tactical equipment. Installed on the Basis series interface. Manufactured by Zenit.

items.name: AK-12 BRT M24 thread muzzle adapter
items.description: A muzzle thread adapter that allows installation of various modern AK 5.45x39 muzzle devices on the bayonet type barrel thread of the AK-12 and its civilian versions. Manufactured by BRT.

items.name: RPD DS Arms Railed Handguard
items.description: A polymer railed handguard for the RPD machine gun. Manufactured by DS Arms.

items.name: RPD 7.62x39 DS Arms 370mm barrel
items.description: A 370mm barrel for the RPD machine gun, custom threaded for .308/7.62x51 muzzle devices.

items.name: RPD DS Arms buttstock
items.description: A polymer buttstock for the RPD machine gun. Manufactured by DS Arms.

items.name: RPD 7.62x51 DS Arms Belgian Style Muzzle Brake
items.description: A Belgian type muzzle brake for the custom threaded .308 barrel for the RPD machine gun. Manufactured by DS Arms.

items.name: Disk drive 1
items.description: A solid state drive. Used to store data with enhanced read and write performance.

items.name: Dogtag USEC
items.description: A special stainless steel army dogtag serving the purpose of quickly identifying the wounded and deceased in combat. It has an unusual golden tint to it.

items.name: Dogtag BEAR
items.description: A special stainless steel army dogtag serving the purpose of quickly identifying the wounded and deceased in combat. It has an unusual golden tint to it.

items.name: Dogtag USEC
items.description: A special stainless steel army dogtag serving the purpose of quickly identifying the wounded and deceased in combat. Not every PMC can get one of these.

items.name: Dogtag BEAR
items.description: A special stainless steel army dogtag serving the purpose of quickly identifying the wounded and deceased in combat. Not every PMC can get one of these.

items.name: Get a Life poster
items.description: The girl on the poster is definitely hinting at something. But you're stronger than her urging.

items.name: Get a Paw poster
items.description: We all need a loyal friend. Even if just in the arms of a 2d girl.

items.name: Armband (Prestige 3)
items.description: An armband for distinguished warriors.

items.name: Armband (Prestige 4)
items.description: You need to work really hard to earn this armband.

items.name: Armband (Prestige 5)
items.description: An armband available only to a handful of people in Tarkov.

items.name: PMC Origins figurine
items.description: This Tarko figurine depicts a very green PMC just setting foot in the city. There must be two more like this one out there somewhere.

items.name: MP-155 12ga 660mm barrel
items.description: A standard serially produced 660mm barrel with built-in iron sights for MP-155 12 gauge shotguns.

items.name: MP-155 12ga 750mm barrel
items.description: A standard serially produced 750mm barrel with a vent rib for MP-155 12 gauge shotguns.

items.name: AK 7.62x39 Arsenal 4 Piece Flash Hider
items.description: A well-known muzzle device commonly called "The Bulgarian" in Russia. Its reverse-cone shape makes it highly effective at reducing muzzle flash, and it also slightly lessens the concussive effect when firing indoors. Compatible with any caliber from 5.45 to 7.62 on the AK-74 platform, or with the appropriate adapter on AKM or AK-12 assault rifles.

items.name: Map piece
items.description: A piece of a map found on a Scav. Will it lead to trouble or great riches? Time will tell.

items.name: Programmer's diary (Copy)
items.description:
A perfect duplicate of the programmer's diary. How Mechanic achieved such resemblance and why is a mystery.

The first page has a table of contents:
• Update
• Notes 
• Highlights
• Encrypt
• Agenda 
• Ruminates
• Drafts

items.name: Disk with unknown data
items.description: The most ordinary-looking disk. The only thing that catches your eye is the “Ⅰ” written on top. If this is a first disk, then there must be a second one somewhere?

items.name: Decrypted intelligence folder
items.description: A folder with decrypted data from the military flash drives. Someone out there would give millions for one of these.

items.name: Black Division keycard
items.description: It seems the Black Division operatives have somehow prepared a working access keycard. It should also work on doors at the seaport.

items.name: Pier door key
items.description: This key should fit the door that blocks access to the pier leading to the evacuation zone.

items.name: AS VAL MOD.4 9x39 special assault rifle
items.description: AS VAL MOD.4 is the fourth special modification of the integrally suppressed assault rifle, intended for Russian special operations units and task groups. The MOD.4 features improved controls: an enlarged magazine release button, additional safety selector lever, and an integrated custom charging handle. Developed by members of the BEAR Norvinsk brigade.

items.name: AS VAL NB MOD.4 Kit handguard
items.description: A custom handguard designed for the AS VAL MOD.4. Features rails for mounting optics, tactical accessories, and foregrips.

items.name: AS VAL MOD.4 magwell
items.description: A flared magazine well for the AS VAL MOD.4. Enables faster and more precise magazine insertion.

items.name: NB MOD.4 Kit 3.5 inch rail
items.description: A 3.5 inch rail for the AS VAL MOD.4 handguard. Allows installation of tactical equipment.

items.name: AS VAL NB MOD.4 Kit top cover
items.description: A custom mount for the AS VAL MOD.4. Allows installation of optics.

items.name: AS VAL MOD.4 9x39 suppressor cap
items.description: A muzzle cap for the AS VAL MOD.4 sound suppressor.

items.name: AS VAL MOD.4 9x39 integral barrel-suppressor
items.description: An integral barrel-suppressor module for the AS VAL MOD.4.

items.name: Disk with release version
items.description: A simple disk with a handwritten note that this is the second version, the final one. Finally you can go through the whole game all the way to the end. Gotta write a review later!

items.name: Note mentioning Item #1156
items.description: A handwritten note left in the open workspace of the TerraGroup laboratory.

items.name: Note on preparations for the Arrival
items.description: A torn notebook page detailing preparations for the Arrival.

items.name: Order from TerraGroup Worldwide headquarters
items.description: A paint-smeared document containing an order from TerraGroup's main office.

items.name: Note with ramblings about the Purification
items.description: A blank TerraGroup sheet with a rough scribble. Doesn't resemble the handwriting of office staff.

items.name: AS VAL 9x39 NB MOD.4 muzzle brake
items.description: A custom muzzle brake for the AS VAL MOD.4.

items.name: AS VAL 9x39 NB MOD.4 JailBrake muzzle device
items.description: A custom muzzle device for the AS VAL MOD.4, installed on the MOD.4 handguard.

items.name: AS VAL Zenit RK-3 pistol grip
items.description: A custom Zenit pistol grip for the AS VAL. Replaces the standard pistol grip.

items.name: AS VAL NB stock adapter tube
items.description: An adapter for installing aftermarket buttstocks on the AS VAL.

items.name: A.P. meeting audio tape Part 2
items.description: A tape from the lecture hall recording one of the TerraGroup meetings.

items.name: Cult victim audio tape #2
items.description: An audio tape found among the personal belongings of the victim in the cultists' torture chamber. It seems the owner was chosen deliberately.

items.name: Rus Post audio tape 11.05 / 001
items.description: One of the audio tapes used by Rus Post to record work calls from its couriers. This tape contains the first call from May 11.

items.name: Rus Post audio tape 11.05 / 002
items.description: One of the audio tapes used by Rus Post to record work calls from its couriers. This tape contains the second call from May 11.

items.name: Rus Post audio tape 11.05 / 003
items.description: One of the audio tapes used by Rus Post to record work calls from its couriers. This tape contains the third call from May 11.

items.name: Mysterious audio tape
items.description: An audio tape that somehow ended up in the safe at station 14-4 KORD. Either someone slipped it in unnoticed when the server room’s cooling system was activated, or they already knew what would happen.

items.name: SVT-40 Addley Precision Smith-less Scope Mount
items.description: A scope mount designed for the SVT-40. Manufactured by Addley Precision.

items.name: Audio tape with report
items.description: An audio tape recording the conversations between the Gnezdo outpost fighters and the Bogatyr squad.

items.name: Voevoda's thoughts audio tape
items.description: This recording seems to capture one of Voevoda’s reflections on the causes of the Tarkov conflict.

items.name: Deceased scientist's audio tape
items.description: The final recording of a TerraGroup scientist who locked himself in the Labyrinth observation room.

items.name: Audio tape with incriminating evidence
items.description: An audio tape prepared by Kozlov for Anastasia. According to Kozlov’s letters, it contains irrefutable proof of the city administration’s ties to the local criminal underworld.

items.name: BEAR commander's audio tape labeled "For the BEARs"
items.description: An audio tape containing important instructions left by our squad’s commander.

items.name: USEC commander's audio tape labeled "For the USEC"
items.description: An audio tape containing important instructions left by our squad’s commander.

items.name: USEC operative's audio tape labeled "Day 35"
items.description: A personal audio tape on which a USEC operative recorded a conversation with their commander during a rest stop.

items.name: SVT-40 Addley Precision Steel Scope Mount
items.description: A scope mount designed for the SVT-40. Manufactured by Addley Precision.

items.name: SVT-40 SVD style stock
items.description: A wood stock for the SVT-40/AVT-40 rifles styled after the SVD sniper rifle.

items.name: Military thumb drive
items.description: An unassuming thumb drive. Contains classified military data which was not taken out of the city in time. It's best to gather as many of these as you can. Just in case.

items.name: FN Five-seveN 5.7x28 Pro-Mag 30-round magazine
items.description: A 30-round 5.7x28 magazine for the FN Five-seveN pistol. Manufactured by ProMag.

items.name: MeproLight Mepro M21 reflex sight
items.description: A fiber optic red dot sight manufactured by MeproLight. Installed on a proprietary mount.

items.name: MeproLight Mepro red dot mount
items.description: A Picatinny/Weaver quick-detach mount base for Mepro series red dot sights. Manufactured by MeproLight.

items.name: Toolbox (Discord Version)
items.description: An ordinary toolbox with an unordinary color. Most of the stickers on it are inexistent in Tarkov. Someone has paid a hefty price to smuggle it from outside the cordon.

items.name: Armband (Purple)
items.description: A unique armband for the most sociable operators.

items.name: Atomic Defense CQCM ballistic mask (Ping)
items.description: A unique face mask with an unusual paint job. Guess someone should check their DMs.

items.name: Trijicon SRO reflex sight
items.description: The SRO (Specialized Reflex Optic) is a rugged, compact reflex sight. It can be used as a primary or backup optic. Requires a compatible base to mount on Weaver-style rails. Manufactured by Trijicon.

items.name: Trijicon SRO reflex sight (FDE)
items.description: The SRO (Specialized Reflex Optic) is a rugged, compact reflex sight. It can be used as a primary or backup optic. Requires a compatible base to mount on Weaver-style rails. Manufactured by Trijicon. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: Elcan SpecterDR Mounting Plate for Trijicon
items.description: A mount base for installation of RMR-type reflex sights on the Elcan SpecterDR scope.

items.name: 9A-91 TTS System handguard
items.description: A 9A-91 handguard with a bottom rail for installation of foregrips. Manufactured by TTS System.

items.name: TTS System handguard top rail
items.description: A compact lightweight rail for the TTS System handguard, designed for installation of small optics or tactical devices. Manufactured by TTS System.

items.name: TTS System 2.5 inch rail
items.description: A 2.5 inch rail that allows installation of additional equipment on the TTS System handguard. Manufactured by TTS System.

items.name: SR-3M Karden rail handguard
items.description: A custom handguard for the SR-3M assault rifle made on order from one of the well-known local operatives. Made out of aircraft-grade aluminum alloy and fitted with Zenit rails for installation of additional tactical equipment.

items.name: AK JMac Customs RSA-5.5 stock adapter
items.description: An adapter for installing 1913 Picatinny buttstocks, designed for AK-style assault rifles with 5.5mm pin folding stocks. Manufactured by JMac Customs.

items.name: AK Samson Rear Trunnion Folding Stock Adapter
items.description: A 1913 stock adapter, designed for installation on AK-series assault rifles. Manufactured by Samson Manufacturing.

items.name: Kalashnikov AK-308 7.62x51 assault rifle
items.description: A variant of the Kalashnikov assault rifle designed for export to countries whose armies continue to use the 7.62x51 NATO (.308 Win) cartridge as their standard infantry small arms ammunition. Manufactured by Kalashnikov Group.

items.name: AK-308 handguard
items.description: A standard-issue handguard for the AK-308 assault rifle. Manufactured by Kalashnikov Group.

items.name: AK-308 7.62x51 20-round magazine
items.description: A 20-round 7.62x51 NATO magazine for the AK-308 assault rifle. Manufactured by Kalashnikov Group.

items.name: AK-308 railed dust cover
items.description: A standard receiver dust cover with an integrated Picatinny rail for AK-308 assault rifles. Manufactured by Kalashnikov Group.

items.name: AK-308 rear sight base
items.description: A standard-issue removable rear sight base mount for the AK-308 assault rifle. Manufactured by Kalashnikov Group.

items.name: AK-308 7.62x51 flash hider
items.description: A standard-issue 7.62x51 NATO flash hider for the AK-308 assault rifle. Manufactured by Kalashnikov Group.

items.name: Note from USEC's corpse
items.description: A note in which someone scolds a USEC operative for poor weapon maintenance.

items.name: Escape route map from the TerraGroup office area
items.description: A map showing USEC retreat points from the TerraGroup office area. Judging by the tags, it was intercepted by the BEARs after the EMP blast.

items.name: Tarkov News Issue #142
items.description: A newspaper issue featuring an article on the escalating conflict in Tarkov.

items.name: Blue Fire witness note
items.description: A mysterious note mentioning the EMP blast that occurred over the TerraGroup office.

items.name: Saiga-308/AK-308 7.62x51 ProMag 24-round magazine
items.description: A 24-round polymer magazine for the Saiga-308 carbine and AK-308 assault rifle. Manufactured by ProMag.

items.name: Spiritus Systems LV-119 Plate Carrier (Black Division V1)
items.description: A highly customizable modular plate carrier by Spiritus Systems, built for maximum comfort in combat. Wolf Grey version. This setup allows full freedom of movement while providing an ergonomic layout for ammunition and essential gear.

items.name: Ferro Concepts FCPC V5 Plate Carrier (Black Division)
items.description: The fifth-generation FCPC plate carrier continues Ferro Concepts’ focus on lightweight, adaptable gear. In this version, the plate bags and carrier contour have been redesigned for improved comfort and mobility. Coyote Brown version. Equipped with two radios for communicating with both the assigned squad and HQ.

items.name: Spiritus Systems LV-119 Plate Carrier (Black Division V2)
items.description: A highly customizable modular plate carrier by Spiritus Systems, built for maximum comfort in combat. Black version. This setup is equipped with breaching charges and multiple GP pouches for maximum equipment flexibility.

items.name: First Spear Siege-R Optimized M.A.S.S. Plate Carrier (Black Division)
items.description: A Siege-R Optimized plate carrier equipped with the M.A.S.S. Shoulder System. Provides reliable all-around protection while offering ample workspace for equipment placement. Black version.

items.name: Tasmanian Tiger Modular Pack 45 Plus (MultiCam Black)
items.description: The TT Modular Pack 45 is a system that can be customized to suit the user’s needs. The top flap can be raised to increase capacity or removed entirely if required. External straps allow attachment of bulky gear or equipment that needs to remain easily accessible. MultiCam Black version.

items.name: Mystery Ranch 2 Day Assault Pack (Black)
items.description: This Mystery Ranch backpack is designed for short missions of up to two days. Its compact size is offset by excellent ergonomics. External straps provide convenient attachment points for tools and gear you might need on the go.

items.name: Mystery Ranch NICE Frame Load Sling
items.description: The Load Sling by Mystery Ranch allows to carry heavy, irregularly shaped cargo. Its strap system secures items safely and reliably, while the external MOLLE straps provide versatile attachment points for smaller gear. This particular model is equipped with a spacious case offering extra protection.

items.name: 6B45 body armor (EMR)
items.description: The 6B45 body armor, designed to protect personnel from shrapnel and small arms fire. Part of the Ratnik equipment system and has been in production since the 2010s as a replacement for the 6B43 model.

items.name: 6B45 armored rig (General Purpose, EMR)
items.description: A full plate carrier setup built on the 6B45 vest. This setup gives the user a compact yet versatile space for carrying essential gear. EMR camouflage version.

items.name: 6B45 armored rig (Medic, EMR)
items.description: A full plate carrier setup built on the 6B45 vest. This setup allows for convenient placement of essential combat medical supplies and communication equipment. EMR camouflage version.

items.name: 6B45 armored rig (Assault, EMR)
items.description: A full plate carrier setup built on the 6B45 vest. This setup provides maximum space for carrying magazines and grenades. EMR camouflage version.

items.name: Radian Weapons Model 1 FA 5.56x45 assault rifle
items.description: Radian Model 1 Full Auto, an AR-15 platform assault rifle chambered for 5.56x45 NATO. The rifle is positioned as a reliable, high-quality, and accurate system for professional and sporting use. Manufactured by Radian Weapons.

items.name: AR-15 Radian Weapons Model 1 14 inch handguard
items.description: A precision CNC machined 14 inch handguard, equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of additional equipment. Manufactured by Radian Weapons.

items.name: AR-15 Radian Weapons Model 1 5.56x45 upper receiver
items.description: A precision CNC machined upper receiver for the AR-15 platform. Manufactured by Radian Weapons.

items.name: AR-15 Radian Weapons Raptor-SD charging handle
items.description: An ambidextrous charging handle for the AR-15 platform. Manufactured by Radian Weapons.

items.name: Gatorz Specter MILSPEC ballistic glasses
items.description: The Gatorz Specter glasses provide full eye protection and are designed to be worn with helmets, headsets, or ear protection.

items.name: Gentex Ops-Core SOTR respirator
items.description: The SOTR respirator was developed by Gentex to protect operators from hazardous airborne compounds and particles, intended for use only in ground operations. Provides reliable filtration against most harmful particles, including lead, asbestos, lubricants, and smoke from burning materials.

items.name: Note from Mr. Kerman
items.description: A note with a warning from an unknown sender.

items.name: RFID card manual
items.description: A TerraGroup instruction manual included with Kruglov's RFID card.

items.name: Transcript of conversation with Ms. A.
items.description: A printout of miss A.'s conversation with an unidentified individual.

items.name: Folder with intelligence on Norvinsk region facilities
items.description: A TerraGroup report compiling information on government facilities in the Norvinsk region.

items.name: Note from Prapor's men
items.description: The note mentions the delivery of some goods near the lighthouse.

items.name: Document on changes in enterprise interactions
items.description: A TerraGroup document detailing updated procedures for working with contractors. Some of the information has been blacked out.

items.name: Cargo transport fax
items.description: A fax containing instructions for moving a certain shipment. Some of the information has been blacked out with a marker.

items.name: Hard drive printout
items.description: A printout of correspondence recovered from the hard drive in A.P.’s car.

items.name: Transport log with notes
items.description: A transport log with handwritten markings. It's clear the cargo was never meant to go through official channels.

items.name: Fuel catalyst test report
items.description: A TerraGroup report on fuel catalyst tests conducted at Chemical Plant #16.

items.name: Guard post note
items.description: A handwritten note left at the guard post.

items.name: Burnt document
items.description: A burnt document, barely legible.

items.name: Document mentioning the Warden
items.description: A paint-smeared document with no stamps or logos.

items.name: Document mentioning a protocol
items.description: A paint-smeared document with no stamps or logos.

items.name: Copy of report for TG Worldwide
items.description: A copy of the report intended for the TerraGroup headquarters. Smeared in ink.

items.name: Item #1156 specification
items.description: The full specification for Item #1156, intended for transport from Tarkov to Norvinsk.

items.name: Note about the Eye of the World
items.description: A cultist's note mentioning something called the Eye of the World.

items.name: Book of the Arrival
items.description: A homemade book filled with notes and drawings about witnesses of the Arrival, The Unheard, and the end of the old world.

items.name: Programmer's note
items.description: A note in which the programmer writes about how they became one of the Witnesses of the Arrival.

items.name: Victim's note
items.description: A note from an NGO Cobalt specialist who was hiding from the cultists.

items.name: Newspaper clipping from the cultists' house
items.description: A newspaper clipping featuring an article about the NGO Cobalt. It seems the cultists took a great interest in this organization.

items.name: ARRS system specifications
items.description: A full specification for the ARRS system. Most of it is encrypted.

items.name: Targrad Tales poster
items.description: A poster that someone left right outside the door of your Hideout. A limited edition item. It'll remind you of all the time you spent in front of your monitor.

items.name: Avon M53A1 gas mask
items.description: The gas mask from Avon Protection was developed under the JSGPM (Joint Service General Purpose Mask) program to provide special operations forces with maximum protection against CBRN threats while keeping the design lightweight and comfortable for use in a wide range of conditions.

items.name: Wilcox L4G24 NVG Mount (Coyote)
items.description: A universal adjustable night vision mounting system manufactured by Wilcox. Features a breakaway lever that disconnects under stress to prevent user injury. Compatible with most night vision shrouds and adapters. Coyote version.

items.name: L3Harris PVS-31A night vision goggles
items.description: A very lightweight and ergonomic night vision device manufactured by L3Harris. Provides an optimal field of view and a clear image not only in low-light conditions but also in the presence of bright light sources. Equipped with Butler Creek flip-open lens protectors. White Phosphor tubes version.

items.description: A modern lightweight tactical weapon light, installed on special compatible mounts. Manufactured by SureFire.

items.name: SureFire M600 Scout Light Thumbscrew Mount
items.description: A Picatinny/Weaver mount for M600/M300 series weapon lights. Manufactured by SureFire.

items.name: Arisaka Inline Scout Mount KeyMod
items.description: A weapon light mount designed for KeyMod interface. Manufactured by Arisaka.

items.name: Arisaka Inline Scout Mount M-LOK
items.description: A weapon light mount designed for M-LOK interface. Manufactured by Arisaka.

items.name: Wilcox L4G24 NVG Mount (Black)
items.description: A universal adjustable night vision mounting system manufactured by Wilcox. Features a breakaway lever that disconnects under stress to prevent user injury. Compatible with most night vision shrouds and adapters. Black version.

items.name: FALKE LE reflex sight
items.description: A rugged reflex sight made for withstanding harsh environmental conditions, compatible with NVGs and various weapon builds. Manufactured by FALKE.

items.name: SwampFox Justice reflex sight
items.description: A rugged everyday carry reflex sight, made for use on pistols, carbines, or shotguns. Can be used as a main or backup sight, requires a corresponding Weaver mount. Manufactured by SwampFox.

items.name: AR-15 Strike Industries GRIDLOK base (Black)
items.description: A base for installing GRIDLOK AR-15 handguards. Manufactured by Strike Industries. Black version.

items.description: An 8.5 inch main body of the GRIDLOK handguard for the AR-15 platform. Equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of additional equipment. Manufactured by Strike Industries.

Spiritus Systems LV-119 Plate Carrier (Black Division V2) Default
Spiritus Systems LV-119 Plate Carrier (Black Division V1) Default
Colt M16A1 5.56x45 assault rifle
items.description: An American-made 5.56x45mm assault rifle developed by Colt in the late 1960s as an improved variant of the original AR-15/M16 design. The M16A1 became the standard service rifle of the US military during the Vietnam War, featuring a forward assist and other refinements for reliability in harsh conditions. Though considered outdated by modern standards, it remains a durable and accurate weapon prized by collectors and shooters alike.

items.name: Colt M16A2 5.56x45 assault rifle
items.description: A later evolution of the M16 platform, the M16A2 introduced a burst-fire mechanism, improved iron sights, handguard and buttstock for greater control and durability. Chambered for 5.56x45mm NATO ammunition, it served as the primary service rifle for the U.S. military throughout the 1980s and 1990s. Known for its precision and dependability, the M16A2 remains a benchmark for modern assault rifle design.

items.name: AR-15 Colt early type charging handle
items.description: An early type charging handle for AR-15 and compatible systems, manufactured by Colt.

items.name: AR-15 5.56x45 A2 type 20 inch barrel
items.description: A 20 inch (508mm) barrel for AR-15 platform weapons for 5.56x45 NATO ammo. Corresponds with standard service M16A2 barrel.

items.name: AR-15 Colt USGI A1 3-prong 5.56x45 flash hider
items.description: A three-prong flash hider for the AR-15 series rifles, manufactured by Colt. The classic earlier A1 variant made in the 60s, which was later replaced by the more famous Bird Cage type.

items.name: AR-15 5.56x45 Colt STANAG 20-round magazine
items.description: A classic 20-round 5.56x45 magazine for AR-15. Manufactured by Colt.

items.name: M16A1E1 5.56x45 upper receiver
items.description: An upper receiver for the M16A1E1 assault rifle manufactured by Colt. An early prototype variant between the M16A1 and M16A2, which also served as the basis for the Canadian C7. During the 1980s it was widely fitted to various special carbines produced by Colt.

items.name: M16A2 5.56x45 upper receiver
items.description: An upper receiver for the M16A2 assault rifle manufactured by Colt.

items.name: AR-15 Colt M16A1 Type 7 stock
items.description: A standard-issue buttstock for the early-issue M16A1 assault rifles, compatible with AR-15 and AR-10 platforms.

items.name: AR-15 Colt A2 stock
items.description: The A2 type buttstock for the AR-15. Standard-issue for M16A2 assault rifles. Manufactured by Colt.

items.name: AR-15 Colt A2 buffer tube
items.description: Colt Receiver Extension Buffer Tube, Mil-Spec diameter will fit any AR-15-based carbine or rifle.

items.name: AR-15 Colt N1 Stock
items.description: A telescopic buttstock, second generation of the classic stock for CAR-15. Manufactured by Colt.

items.description: A rubber buttpad for the Colt N1 series stocks, improves ergonomics and cushions felt recoil. Manufactured by John Masen Co.

items.name: AR-15 Colt M16A2 handguard
items.description: A polymer rifle handguard manufactured by Colt. Standard-issue handguard for M16A2 rifles.

items.name: AR-15 ProMag Delta Style scope mount
items.description: A scope mount that fits over the AR-15 carry handle. Modeled after the mount from the 1990s. Manufactured by ProMag.

items.name: MaTech BUIS rear sight
items.description: A back-up iron sight manufactured by MaTech Solutions.

items.name: AR-15 Colt A1 pistol grip

items.name: AR-15 Colt CAR-15 Skinny lower handguard
items.description: A bottom part of the CAR-15 handguard, manufactured by Colt.

items.description: A basic orange construction hard hat designed to make you stand out. But is that really what you want out here?

items.name: SHIELD Absolute Cinema hard hat (White)
items.description: A white construction hard hat built to stop falling bricks. Will it stop a bullet? Test at your own risk.

items.description: An extension for the GRIDLOK handguard. Equipped with a folding front sight, Picatinny rail, and an M-LOK interface. Manufactured by Strike Industries. Black version.

items.description: An 11 inch main body of the GRIDLOK handguard for the AR-15 platform. Equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of additional equipment. Manufactured by Strike Industries.

items.description: A 17 inch main body of the GRIDLOK handguard for the AR-15 platform. Equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of additional equipment. Manufactured by Strike Industries.

items.description: An extension for the GRIDLOK handguard. Equipped with a folding front sight, Picatinny rail, and an M-LOK interface. Manufactured by Strike Industries. Yellow version.

items.description: An extension for the GRIDLOK handguard. Equipped with a folding front sight, Picatinny rail, and an M-LOK interface. Manufactured by Strike Industries. Red version.

items.description: A base for installing GRIDLOK AR-15 handguards. Manufactured by Strike Industries. Yellow version.

items.name: AR-15 Strike Industries GRIDLOK base (Red)
items.description: A base for installing GRIDLOK AR-15 handguards. Manufactured by Strike Industries. Red version.

items.name: First Spear Strandhogg plate carrier (ABUPAT)
items.description: Taking its name from an Old Norse Viking term for a lightning raid, Strandhögg was one of the first formalized battle tactics to use covert infiltrators in advance of an actual raiding operation. Strandhögg was a tactical game-changer in its time, just like the technological advances First Spear is bringing forward in this line of plate carriers. US Air Force ABU pattern camouflage version.

items.name: ANA Tactical Alpha chest rig (A-TACS AU)
items.description: "Alpha" is a high-quality chest rig that fully meets the military standards for reliability and functionality. The combination of integrated pouches and MOLLE straps provides the means of carrying a large number of necessary equipment. The vest is designed as a classic chest rig. In this type of vest, all the gear is located in the front and side parts, while the back part is comprised of adjustment belts and straps. Manufactured by ANA Tactical. A-TACS AU camouflage version.

items.name: AR-15 5.56x45 11.5 inch barrel
items.description: An 11.5 inch (292mm) barrel for AR-15 platform weapons for 5.56x45 NATO ammo.

items.name: NFM THOR Concealable Reinforced Vest body armor (Head Eyes)
items.description: A low-profile body armor manufactured by NFM. A version for those who really feel the Tarkov atmosphere.

items.name: Interceptor OTV body armor (Woodland)
items.description: The Interceptor vest consists of a fabric Outer Tactical Vest (OTV) with dorsal and thoracic pockets and two protective ceramic-composite SAPI or ESAPI inserts. The Outer Tactical Vest (OTV) is a basic vest equipped with aramid fabric pouches that protect against ammunition fragments and 9mm handgun bullets. Woodland camouflage version.

items.name: NPP KlASS Korund-VM body armor (Kamysh)
items.description: The NPP KlASS Korund-VM heavy bulletproof vest, adopted by the units of the Ministry of Internal Affairs of Russia. Kamysh camouflage version.

items.name: WARTECH MK3 TV-104 chest rig (Moss)
items.description: This chest rig platform is designed for placing equipment in the chest and abdomen areas, with an open back. Includes integrated pouches, designed for 8 magazines. Can be used both separately and on top of the armor vest. Manufactured by WARTECH. Moss camouflage version.

items.name: Vulkan-5 LShZ-5 bulletproof helmet (Eight-ball)
items.description: The Vulkan-5 LShZ-5 high-level protection helmet is intended for use in a set of combat equipment with circular 5-class (Russian GOST) head protection from medium to heavy projectiles. Too big for pool.

items.name: Vulkan-5 LShZ-5 bulletproof helmet (Flame)
items.description: The Vulkan-5 LShZ-5 high-level protection helmet is intended for use in a set of combat equipment with circular 5-class (Russian GOST) head protection from medium to heavy projectiles. Would match well with a motorbike and leather jacket.

items.name: Vulkan-5 LShZ-5 bulletproof helmet (Camouflage)
items.description: The Vulkan-5 LShZ-5 high-level protection helmet is intended for use in a set of combat equipment with circular 5-class (Russian GOST) head protection from medium to heavy projectiles. Your head is basically invisible with this camouflage.

items.name: Stich Profi Plate Carrier V2 (MARPAT Woodland)
items.description: An improved lightweight version of the standard plate carrier manufactured by Stich Profi. MARPAT Woodland camouflage version.

items.name: Atomic Defense CQCM ballistic mask (Loui Peeton)
items.description: Atomic Defense's CQCM ballistic mask provides protection against wide variety of short-mid range weapons including shotguns and assault rifles. Draws eyes and makes the poor cry.

items.name: Atomic Defense CQCM ballistic mask (Toxic)
items.description: Atomic Defense's CQCM ballistic mask provides protection against wide variety of short-mid range weapons including shotguns and assault rifles. A bright warning that the user is dangerous for the environment.

items.name: Atomic Defense CQCM ballistic mask (Crash Tested)
items.description: Atomic Defense's CQCM ballistic mask provides protection against wide variety of short-mid range weapons including shotguns and assault rifles. This mask has passed the test.

items.name: Atomic Defense CQCM ballistic mask (Demonic Face)
items.description: Atomic Defense's CQCM ballistic mask provides protection against wide variety of short-mid range weapons including shotguns and assault rifles. Has all the qualities of a top arena fighter – stylish, luxurious, and intimidating all at once.

items.name: DevTac Ronin Respirator (Beast)
items.description: A Japan-styled tactical helmet, manufactured by DevTac. Not used by any military or special forces. Just somehow happened to be in Tarkov for some frivolous price. Features a full NIJ level IIIA protection of the whole head, though you really don't want to get shot in the face with this thing. Comes with an intimidating print.

items.name: DevTac Ronin Respirator (Eternal Green)
items.description: A Japan-styled tactical helmet, manufactured by DevTac. Not used by any military or special forces. Just somehow happened to be in Tarkov for some frivolous price. Features a full NIJ level IIIA protection of the whole head, though you really don't want to get shot in the face with this thing. Painted in green with red and black accents.

items.name: Balaclava (Unicorn)
items.description: A balaclava for those who really want to stand out.

items.name: Balaclava (Zaebtsa)
items.description: A balaclava for very positive warriors.

items.name: Galvion Caiman Hybrid helmet (MultiCam)
items.description: The Caiman Hybrid helmet is a new generation of lightweight special forces helmet. This bump version, through some Tarkov magic, features a protection level similar to normal ballistic helmets. Manufactured by Galvion. MultiCam camouflage version.

items.name: Galvion Caiman Hybrid helmet (Mutualist)
items.description: The Caiman Hybrid helmet is a new generation of lightweight special forces helmet. This bump version, through some Tarkov magic, features a protection level similar to normal ballistic helmets. Manufactured by Galvion. Painted with an intimidating print.

items.name: Galvion Caiman Hybrid Ballistic Applique (MultiCam)
items.description: An additional up-armor helmet shell attachment to elevate or enhance ballistic and fragmentation protection of the Caiman Hybrid Helmet. Manufactured by Galvion. MultiCam camouflage version.

items.name: Galvion Caiman Hybrid Ballistic Applique (Mutualist)

items.name: Galvion Caiman Hybrid Ballistic Mandible Guard (Mutualist)
items.description: A special additional ballistic protection for the Caiman Hybrid helmet, mounted on the side rails. Manufactured by Galvion. Painted with an intimidating print.

items.description: The "Death Shadow" mask for face protection, reinforced with aramid fibers. Only airsofters would find this mask cool. Gold version.

items.name: Death Shadow lightweight armored mask (Gray)
items.description: The "Death Shadow" mask for face protection, reinforced with aramid fibers. Only airsofters would find this mask cool. Gray version with orange lenses.

items.name: Death Shadow lightweight armored mask (White)
items.description: The "Death Shadow" mask for face protection, reinforced with aramid fibers. Only airsofters would find this mask cool. White version.

items.name: Diamond Age NeoSteel High Cut helmet (Orange Stains)
items.description: The Diamond Age NeoSteel helmet features a unique design that combines high-strength steel with composite materials to provide advanced protection against ballistic and impact threats. Painted with orange stripes to add some character.

items.name: Diamond Age NeoSteel High Cut helmet (Aces)
items.description: The Diamond Age NeoSteel helmet features a unique design that combines high-strength steel with composite materials to provide advanced protection against ballistic and impact threats. Comes with a lucky paint job.

items.name: Diamond Age NeoSteel helmet ballistic mandible (Aces)

items.name: TKPD 9.3x64 carbine
items.description: The TKPD (Tyazhelyy Karabin Podderzhki Dragunova - "Dragunov Heavy Support Carbine") is a modernized SVDK chambered in 9.3x64mm, commissioned by PMC BEAR. The weapon is noted for high accuracy and effectively suppresses targets at medium ranges. Manufactured by SniperArms Dynamics.

items.name: TKPD railed dust cover
items.description: A receiver top cover for the TKPD assault carbine. Equipped with a Picatinny rail for installation of optics.

items.name: TKPD front trunnion

items.name: TKPD 9.3x64 457mm barrel
items.description: A 457mm barrel for the TKPD 9.3x64mm assault carbine.

items.name: TKPD gas tube
items.description: A standard gas tube for the TKPD assault carbine.

items.name: TKPD handguard (Black)
items.description: A standard handguard for the TKPD assault carbine. Allows installation of tactical equipment and a bipod. Black version.

items.name: TKPD 9.3x64 muzzle brake
items.description: A muzzle brake for the TKPD assault carbine.

items.name: 9.3x64mm SP
items.description: A 9.3x64mm Soft Point hunting cartridge loaded with a 17.4 gram semi-jacketed bullet. The bullet delivers increased stopping power at medium ranges and is intended for hunting large game, as it provides strong terminal performance and can cause severe incapacitating wounds on impact.

items.name: TKPD 9.3x64 10-round magazine
items.description: A 10-round 9.3x64mm magazine for the TKPD assault carbine.

items.name: VPO-215 tactical chassis
items.description: A tactical chassis for the VPO-215 Gornostay hunting rifle.

items.name: VPO-215 tactical chassis front rail

items.name: VPO-215 .366TKM 360mm barrel
items.description: A 360mm barrel for VPO-215 rifle chambered in .366TKM.

items.name: VPO-215 tactical thread protector
items.description: A tactical threading protection cap for the VPO-215 .366TKM rifle barrel.

items.name: 9.3x64mm FMJ
items.description: A civilian 9.3x64mm Full Metal Jacket cartridge loaded with a 17.5 gram fully jacketed bullet. The full metal jacket reduces deformation on impact. This cartridge is most commonly used for sport shooting, training, and zeroing, and is sometimes used for hunting when minimal damage to game is desired.

items.name: 9.3x64mm 7N33
items.description: A military 9.3x64mm 7N33 cartridge loaded with a 17.4 gram armor-piercing bullet with a steel core. The 7N33 delivers high penetration thanks to its steel core and substantial muzzle energy. Used by Russian special operations forces.

items.name: Magpul UCS buttstock (Black)

items.name: AR-15 Magpul ACS Carbine stock (Black)

The frame design prevents binding and accidental release of the locking lever, while the standard-thickness rubber buttpad reduces slipping on armor or gear. Black version.

items.name: AR-15 Magpul ACS Carbine stock (FDE)
