items.description: A tactical load-bearing system designed to carry magazines, grenades, and special equipment, while using low-profile body armor. Manufactured by London Bridge Trading. AOR1 version for the true Seals.

items.name: HighCom Striker ULACH IIIA helmet (Sand)
items.description: A combat helmet with the ears and back of the head protection, manufactured by HighCom. Spray painted in a desert-style camouflage.

items.name: HighCom Striker ULACH IIIA helmet (Green Stripes)
items.description: A combat helmet with the ears and back of the head protection, manufactured by HighCom. Spray painted in a green camouflage.

items.name: HighCom Striker ULACH IIIA helmet (Mesh Spray)
items.description: A combat helmet with the ears and back of the head protection, manufactured by HighCom. Spray painted with a mesh pattern for better camouflage.

items.name: HighCom Striker ULACH IIIA helmet (Coyote Stripes)
items.description: A combat helmet with the ears and back of the head protection, manufactured by HighCom. Spray painted in coyote color for better camouflage.

items.name: Cold Fear infrared balaclava (Alien)
items.description: A quality balaclava with a special technological material. For the fans of horror movies and orange cats.

items.name: Cold Fear infrared balaclava (Typhon)
items.description: A quality balaclava with a special technological material. Made for perfect pictures.

items.name: Peltor TEP-300 tactical earplug (Coyote Brown)
items.description: A special in-ear headset for communication and hearing protection. Manufactured by 3M Peltor. Coyote Brown version.

items.name: Reprogrammed keycard for A.P.'s apartment lock (Green)
items.description: A green TerraGroup Labs keycard reprogrammed using technical data from A.P.'s flash drive. In theory it might open a hidden room in A.P.'s apartment.

items.name: 7.62x25mm TT M855A1
items.description: A 7.62x25mm TT cartridge fitted with a Western 4 gram M855A1 armor-piercing bullet. Neat.

items.name: 7.62x25mm TT M856A1
items.description: A 7.62x25mm TT cartridge fitted with a Western 3.6 gram M856A1 armor-piercing tracer bullet. Tracer color: Red.

items.name: 7.62x25mm TT M995
items.description: A 7.62x25mm TT cartridge fitted with a Western 3.4 gram M995 armor-piercing bullet. Neat.

items.name: Cardinal apartment key
items.description: A key to an apartment in a luxury residential complex. These apartments once housed TerraGroup's senior executives.

items.description: A standard charging handle for NL545 series carbines and assault rifles. Manufactured by Custom Guns.

items.description: An AR-15 mil-spec buffer tube for installation of various telescopic buttstocks. Manufactured by Custom Guns. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.description: The Dragon muzzle brake by Lantac is designed for installation on 5.56x45mm weapon systems. Reduces recoil and counters the muzzle climb.

items.description: The Custom Guns 10.5 inch handguard for NL545 equipped with an M-LOK interface for installation of additional devices and accessories. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.description: An adjustable gas block designed for NL545 series carbines and assault rifles. Manufactured by Custom Guns.

items.description: An 18 inch (457mm) barrel for AR-15 platform weapons for 5.56x45 NATO ammo. Manufactured by Centurion Arms.

items.description: A 16 inch (406mm) barrel for AR-15 platform weapons for 5.56x45 NATO ammo. Manufactured by Centurion Arms.

items.description: The M84 Gas Buster charging handle for use with AR-15 platform rifles, equipped with the Military Big Latch. Manufactured by Precision Reflex.

items.description: A gas block with an integrated foldable front sight for the AR-15 platform. Manufactured by Precision Reflex.

items.description: The polymer SPR Handgrip can be installed on any weapon compatible with AR-15 pistol grips. Manufactured by Sierra Precision.

items.description: The 12 inch GEN III Round Carbon handguard for AR-15 systems. Manufactured by Precision Reflex.

items.description: A quad-rail 12 inch handguard for the AR-15 platform. Manufactured by Knight's Armament Company.

items.description: The SPR muzzle brake for the AR-15 platform. Manufactured by Allen Engineering.

items.description: A thread protector for the SPR Brake, manufactured by Allen Engineering.

items.description: A special AR-15 barrel mount required for installation of Allen Engineering suppressors. Manufactured by Allen Engineering.

items.name: AR-15 Precision Reflex GEN III SPR Top Rail
items.description: A rifle length Picatinny top rail designed for installation on Precision Reflex GEN III Round handguards. Bridges the handguard and upper receiver. Manufactured by Precision Reflex.

items.name: A.R.M.S. #22 30mm ring scope mount
items.description: A.R.M.S. #22 is a universal 30mm scope base mount for installation on Picatinny rails.

items.name: A.R.M.S. #22 ring cap
items.description: A top ring cap for the A.R.M.S. #22 mount.

items.description: A universal rail mount for installation of various red dot sights or tactical equipment on the A.R.M.S. #22 optic mount, installed as replacement for standard ring cap.

items.name: Allen Engineering AEM-5 5.56x45 sound suppressor
items.description: The Allen Engineering AEM-5 5.56x45/.223 sound suppressor. Can only be installed on compatible Allen Engineering muzzle devices, and also requires a proprietary SPR Collar on the barrel.

items.name: A.R.M.S. #40 Flip-Up Rear Sight
items.description: A flip-up rear sight manufactured by A.R.M.S. Inc.

items.name: Leupold Mark 4 MR/T TS-30A2 2.5-8x36 30mm riflescope
items.description: Precise, accurate, durable and dependable - the Mark 4 MR/T TS-30A2 rifle scope. The model provides 2.5-8x magnification giving you a clear idea of the actual size of the targeted object.

items.name: Station 14-4 KORD Arshavin K. pass (Restored)
items.description: This restored pass should now be able to unlock Station 14-4 KORD.

items.name: AR-15 Precision Reflex GEN III Round Carbon 12 inch handguard (FDE)
items.description: The 12 inch GEN III Round Carbon handguard for AR-15 systems. Manufactured by Precision Reflex. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: Voevoda's audio recorder
items.description: An old voice recorder that, apparently, was used by Voevoda himself.

items.name: Armasight N-15 Swing Arm #194
items.description: A mounting system designed to install the N-15 series night vision goggles to Dovetail type helmet mounts. Manufactured by Armasight.

items.name: Miller Bros. Blades M-2 Tactical Sword (Brown)
items.description: The "M-2" short tactical sword, manufactured by Miller Bros. Blades. Brown version.

items.name: Note for Kozlov
items.description: A threatening note left on the door.

items.name: Note from the repair shop
items.description: A crumpled note stained with machine oil.

items.name: Note with a warning
items.description: A note from a certain Nagano'98.

items.name: Note with an address
items.description: A note from Reshala's crew mentioning Kozlov's address.

items.name: The Ninth Circle Issue #14
items.description: An issue featuring a story about the unexpected PMC rescue.

items.name: The Ninth Circle Issue #19
items.description: An issue featuring a story about the mysterious Mushroom Picker.

items.name: Unsealed envelope
items.description: A postal envelope without a letter, taken from a courier and unsealed immediately.

items.name: Letter from Reshala's bunkhouse
items.description: A letter taken from courier Pasha by Reshala’s people.

items.name: Newspaper clipping with a photo of Anastasia
items.description: It seems Kozlov left a message on the back of the photograph.

items.name: Tarkov Herald newspaper with article by A. Mikhailova
items.description: This issue features an article on the preparation of an important investigation by the journalist A. Mikhailova.

items.name: First piece of code note
items.description: Someone tore a note containing a number or code. Without the other half, it’s useless.

items.name: Second piece of code note
items.description: The second half of the note contains only two digits. It seems to be a radio frequency or some kind of code.

items.name: BEAR note from the outpost behind Ultra
items.description: Someone left their notes at the Gnezdo outpost.

items.name: Map with triangulated signal
items.description: One of the BEARs in the Gnezdo camp clearly tried to triangulate Bogatyr squad's signal. According to the map, the signal came from the eastern part of the nature reserve.

items.name: Strelets' note
items.description: In this note, Strelets tries to convince Den to mend ties with Voevoda. There’s also a code scribbled in the corner. It might come in handy.

items.name: Voevoda's photo with a cultist mark
items.description: Someone circled Voevoda with a marker and left instructions for the cultists on the back.

items.name: Note mentioning Prapor
items.description: The note mentions Yastreb and preparations for the ambush on the Bogatyr squad. It seems Prapor was somehow involved in the operation.

items.name: Note mentioning General
items.description: This cultists' note mentions the General, as well as the Lighthouse Warden.

items.name: Leshy's orders
items.description: A note containing an order from a commander known as Leshy.

items.name: Assistant's notes on Group #12
items.description: The note mentions experiments on central nervous system stability, conducted on human subjects.

items.name: Assistant's notes on Group #3
items.description: According to the note, the test subjects were deliberately driven to psychosis.

items.name: Assistant's notes on Group #8
items.description: The note describes experiments aimed at altering the test subjects' biological clocks.

items.name: Assistant's notes on Group #3 and Group #10
items.description: It seems that during the experiments in The Labyrinth, TerraGroup couldn’t dispose of the test subjects’ bodies fast enough.

items.name: Assistant's notes on TG-Vi-24 test subjects
items.description: A note in which the lab assistant reports on the condition of the test subjects involved in project TG-Vi-24.

items.name: Letter from the mailbox
items.description: A letter from Kozlov that has been sitting in the mailbox.

items.name: Letter from Kozlov's room
items.description: A letter from Kozlov's room that he never managed to send.

items.name: Leshy's diary
items.description: Notes from Leshy, detailing his mapping of The Labyrinth and reports on events following the assault.

items.name: Labyrinth facility research report
items.description: Voronenko's report details the experiments TerraGroup conducted on humans in The Labyrinth.

items.name: FSB report
items.description: The report details FSB monitoring of Chepyga. Someone added a handwritten note to it.

items.name: Bogatyr squad operations report
items.description: The documents describe several operations carried out by the Bogatyr squad.

items.name: Hostage evacuation report from Voevoda
items.description: The report details how Voevoda conducted the hostage rescue operation at the Tarbank branch.

items.name: Agent network deployment report
items.description: The report from The Unheard states that their agents have already infiltrated government structures in multiple countries and hold influence beyond Russia.

items.name: Moreman's personal file
items.description: The file notes Moreman’s service locations and personality traits.

items.name: Voevoda's personal file
items.description: According to the file, Voevoda has a very impressive service record.

items.name: Taran's personal file
items.description: The file shows that Taran is younger than the other members of the squad, but still has considerable combat experience.

items.name: Strelets' personal file
items.description: It seems Strelets possessed exceptional shooting skills, which is why he didn’t change his specialty despite his age.

items.name: Radian Weapons Model 1 FA 5.56x45 assault rifle Default
Armband (Survivor)
items.description: The owner of this armband never uncovered the true reasons behind Tarkov’s disaster. But he survived, and in the end that was all that mattered.

items.name: Armband (To Fall in the Darkness)
items.description: Those who wear this armband once agreed to a compromise that came at far too high a cost.

items.name: Armband (Lighthouse)
items.description: This armband marks the PMC operatives who could never break free from their Tarkov past.

items.name: Armband (For Humanity)
items.description: This armband is worn only by PMCs who managed to uncover the truth in Tarkov’s brutal conditions.

items.description: Atomic Defense's CQCM ballistic mask provides protection against short-range weapons including pistols, shotguns and knives. Comes with a luxury white print.

items.description: A fanny pack made in collaboration with the Loui Peeton fashion house.

items.name: AK-308 7.62x51 QD sound suppressor
items.description: A quick-detach sound suppressor for the AK-308 assault rifle, installed on the standard muzzle brake.

items.description: A 30-round polymer Magpul Pmag 30 AK74 GEN M3 magazine for 5.45x39 AK and compatible weapons. Flat dark Earth variant.

items.name: Magpul UCS buttstock (FDE)
items.description: A telescopic buttstock designed for installation on 1913 Picatinny rails. Manufactured by Magpul. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: AK Zenit RK-3 pistol grip (FDE)
items.description: The RK-3 Klassika anatomic pistol grip features a built-in hermetically sealed battery storage compartment and is designed for installation as a replacement for the standard AK pistol grip. ©Zenit. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: TKPD handguard (FDE)
items.description: A standard handguard for the TKPD assault carbine. Allows installation of tactical equipment and a bipod. Flat Dark Earth version.

items.name: Armband (Prestige 6)
items.description: An armband for those who want to show their worth.

items.name: Shutter glasses (Black)
items.description: Black shutter glasses for the true 2010 partygoers. Sucks that you can't see anything with them on.

items.name: EFT: ARENA baseball cap
items.description: A baseball cap with a patch to show everyone your favorite title.

items.name: EFT: ARENA baseball cap
items.description: A baseball cap with a patch to show everyone your favorite title.

items.name: Survivor poster
items.description: A poster showing a PMC who found his way out of Tarkov. He stayed clear of TerraGroup’s affairs and the roots of the conflict, yet still managed to survive and escape.

items.name: To Fall in the Darkness poster
items.description: A poster proving that for those who gave in to temptation, there’s only one path left — into the abyss.

items.name: Lighthouse poster
items.description: A poster with a lighthouse. Under different circumstances it could have been a symbol of light. Here, it only serves as a reminder of an unpaid debt to a man you can never hide from.

items.name: For Humanity poster
items.description: A poster showing that even the cruelest evil meets its end when it faces a worthy adversary. And on the ruins, humanity will build a new future.

items.name: Dogtag BEAR
items.description: An army dogtag serving the purpose of quickly identifying the wounded and deceased in combat. Its owner never sought the reasons behind the conflict, but still managed to survive and escape Tarkov against all odds.

items.name: Dogtag BEAR
items.description: An army dogtag serving the purpose of quickly identifying the wounded and deceased in combat. Stained with the blood of its owner, who fell into darkness chasing an easy way out of Tarkov.

items.name: Dogtag BEAR
items.description: An army dogtag serving the purpose of quickly identifying the wounded and deceased in combat. This one carries a bullet hole straight through the center and a scratched-in strand of barbed wire. Even if its owner escaped Tarkov, he couldn’t escape from himself.

items.name: Dogtag BEAR
items.description: An army dogtag serving the purpose of quickly identifying the wounded and deceased in combat. Its owner shed light on all of TerraGroup’s secrets in Tarkov. The engraving on the tag symbolizes the inevitable downfall of the ruthless corporation.

items.description: A note from Prapor padded with cash, intended for the soldiers at the port. Hm, Prapor has received far more money than he put into this letter…

items.name: NKVD Finka knife
items.description: A replica of the Soviet combat knife crafted by Norvinsk masters, based on Finnish and Swedish designs. Originally used as a utility tool and, when necessary, in combat, the Finka earned a reputation for simplicity and reliability. Its design provides a comfortable, secure grip. Today, it serves more as a collectible piece than a practical weapon.

items.name: Trio poster
items.description: A poster depicting the trio who hold Tarkov in a grip of fear.

items.name: Ritual poster
items.description: A poster depicting a strange ritual. Its creator seems to know the subject from personal experience.

items.name: Cult poster
items.description: Rumor has it this is what the three most powerful cultists look like.

items.name: Control poster
items.description: A poster emphasizing the importance of staying in control. Especially when you’re in Tarkov, fighting to survive.

items.name: Raid poster
items.description: This poster was clearly created under the impression of a truly difficult raid in Tarkov.

items.name: Tarkov train station poster
items.description: A poster depicting the Tarkov train station as it looks in the current days.

items.name: Armband (Release)
items.description: An exclusive armband for those who waited long enough.

items.name: Armband (Beta)
items.description: An exclusive armband for those who have come almost all the way.

items.name: Prapor figurine
items.description: This limited Tarko figurine shows Prapor in his best mood.

items.name: Therapist figurine
items.description: This limited Tarko figurine depicts Therapist, ready to save a few unfortunate souls. Or take your money for questionable medical services.

items.name: Fence figurine
items.description: The limited Tarko figurine is as mysterious as Fence himself.

items.name: Skier figurine
items.description: The creator of this limited Tarko figurine clearly knows Skier well. Otherwise, how could they capture his character so perfectly?

items.name: Peacekeeper figurine
items.description: Even as a limited Tarko figurine, Peacekeeper seems ready to help and… no, nevermind, he's still just earning money for himself.

items.name: Mechanic figurine
items.description: Even in a Tarko figurine depiction, Mechanic remains a true weapons specialist.

items.name: Ragman figurine
items.description: Even as a Tarko figurine, Ragman looks every bit the true businessman.

items.name: Jaeger figurine
items.description: The creator of this figurine captured Jaeger with incredible precision, even conveying the depth of emotion in his eyes.

items.name: Lightkeeper figurine
items.description: This limited Tarko figurine shows Tarkov’s Gray Cardinal. Some people know what Lightkeeper looks like only thanks to this figurine.

items.name: Ref figurine
items.description: The figurine Ref looks just like the real one, always on the lookout for new fighters for the Arena.

items.name: BTR figurine
items.description: A collectible figurine from an unknown creator, showcasing the best means of transportation in all of Tarkov.

items.name: Hideout Cat figurine
items.description: This cat was destined to become part of the Tarko figurine collection.

items.name: Walking Tank figurine
items.description: A Tarko collectible figurine depicting an operative in a special loadout based on the advice from knowledgeable people. Please do not try this loadout at home.

items.name: Escape figurine
items.description: A Tarko collectible figurine depicting a PMC operative who went through fire, water and copper pipes.

items.name: Mastichin figurine
items.description: A limited Tarko figurine depicting a Tarkov resident.

items.name: Baseball cap (EFT Patch)
items.description: A baseball cap with a patch. Now everyone will know what you love the most.

items.description: A case with some epic goodies.

items.name: Armband (HEAD, EYES Protection)
items.description: A prayer armband made by Gribnik to protect the owner from a stray bullet. It seems that in desperate situations, the fighters don't refuse even "help" like this.

items.name: Armband (LOOT Prayer)
items.description: A prayer armband made by Gribnik. It is said to help keep your hard earned trophies during raids for gear and supplies.

items.name: Armband (SBEU KOMAR Protection)
items.description: A prayer armband made by Gribnik to protect the owner from a special mosquito subspecies, observed only in the Norvinsk region. Back during Contract Wars, the news posted articles on the Hazardous Environment Combat Special mosquito (abbreviated "SBEU" in Russian), but only a small fraction of the data provided had been scientifically verified.

items.name: Secure container Gamma
items.description: An old secure container Gamma that ended up in Tarkov during the Contract Wars. Despite the battle-scarred appearance, you can damn be sure it will last for many years to come.

items.name: Armored case
items.description: A mysterious briefcase, apparently containing a certain "Ticket" out of Tarkov.

items.name: Dogtag BEAR
items.description: A BEAR PMC dogtag. Judging by the symbols on it, the owner gave up trying to escape from Tarkov and instead has become one of the true believers.

items.name: Dogtag BEAR
items.description: A BEAR PMC dogtag, the owner of which knows firsthand what Tarkov is all about. The notches mark the moments when the fighter lost all he had, but still kept looking for a way to escape from Tarkov.

items.name: Dogtag USEC
items.description: A USEC PMC dogtag. Judging by the symbols on it, the owner gave up trying to escape from Tarkov and instead has become one of the true believers.

items.name: Dogtag USEC
items.description: A USEC PMC dogtag, the owner of which knows firsthand what Tarkov is all about. The notches mark the moments when the fighter lost all he had, but still kept looking for a way to escape from Tarkov.

items.name: Forged In Beta Armband
items.description: Forged in Beta armband dedicated to the event hosted by Pestily before the official Escape from Tarkov release.

items.name: Interchange underground utility plan
items.description: A detailed map of the interchange's underground utilities, used for laying new lines. The mark on the map clearly indicates a spot that could serve as an exit point from the area. Or maybe it's a pirate treasure.

items.name: Elvisvista figurine
items.description: The creator of this Tarko figurine depicted someone from the past, when life in Tarkov was calmer. It seems the person was an artist, but that's not certain.

items.name: Knight's Armament Company SR-25 7.62x51 marksman rifle (Taupe)
items.description: The SR-25 Precision Rifle is the latest evolution of the precision 7.62mm NATO semi-automatic rifle. An ambidextrous bolt release, selector, and magazine release offers the left-handed user the ergonomic advantages inherent to AR-15 based controls, as well as giving right-handed users alternate methods of manipulation to increase efficiency of movement. The Drop-In 2-Stage Trigger serves as an aid to long range precision marksmanship. The E2 bolt and gas system provides superior reliability in function whether suppressed or unsuppressed. Coated in cerakote Taupe color.

items.name: SR-25 7.62x51 upper receiver (Taupe)
items.description: An upper receiver for the SR-25 rifle, manufactured by Knight's Armament Company. Coated in cerakote Taupe color.

items.name: AR-10 KAC charging handle (Taupe)
items.description: A regular charging handle for AR-10/SR-25 and compatible systems, manufactured by Knight's Armament Company. Coated in cerakote Taupe color.

items.name: AR-15 KAC SASS stock (Taupe)
items.description: The SASS type buttstock for the AR-15. Standard-issue for M110 rifles. Manufactured by Knight's Armament Company. Coated in cerakote Taupe color.

items.name: AR-10 KAC URX 2 12.5 inch handguard
items.description: A 12.5 inch handguard for AR-10 system rifles. Manufactured by Knight's Armament Company.

items.name: AR-10 KAC URX 3.1 13.5 inch handguard
items.description: The URX 3.1 handguard for AR-10 equipped with a unique interface for installation of additional devices and accessories. Manufactured by Knight's Armament Company.

items.name: AR-10 KAC M110 Double High Picatinny Gas Block
items.description: A gas block for AR-10 series rifles which adds a Picatinny rail for installation of various tactical devices. Manufactured by Knight's Armament Company.

items.name: AR-10 Potomac Armory M110 7.62x51 flash hider
items.description: A 7.62x51 NATO flash hider for the M110 semi-automatic sniper system. Manufactured by Potomac Armory.

items.name: AR-10 KAC SR-25/Mk.11 7.62x51 sound suppressor
items.description: A rifle caliber sound suppressor designed for SR-25 pattern rifles, manufactured by Knight's Armament Company. Can only be installed on the compatible gas block system.

items.name: AR-10 KAC URX 2 12.5 inch handguard (Taupe)
items.description: A 12.5 inch handguard for AR-10 system rifles. Manufactured by Knight's Armament Company. Coated in cerakote Taupe color.

items.name: AR-10 KAC URX 3.1 13.5 inch handguard (Taupe)
items.description: The URX 3.1 handguard for AR-10 equipped with a unique interface for installation of additional devices and accessories. Manufactured by Knight's Armament Company. Coated in cerakote Taupe color.

items.name: AR-10 KAC M110 Double High Picatinny Gas Block (Taupe)
items.description: A gas block for AR-10 series rifles which adds a Picatinny rail for installation of various tactical devices. Manufactured by Knight's Armament Company. Coated in cerakote Taupe color.

items.name: AR-10 KAC SR-25/Mk.11 7.62x51 sound suppressor (Taupe)
items.description: A rifle caliber sound suppressor designed for SR-25 pattern rifles, manufactured by Knight's Armament Company. Can only be installed on the compatible gas block system. Coated in cerakote Taupe color.

items.name: Lower half-mask (Skull Santa)
items.description: A bandana wrapped around the lower part of the face. Most commonly seen on street bandits. For those who want to combine a festive mood and "badass skulls".

items.name: Cold Fear infrared balaclava (MultiCam Alpine)
items.description: A quality balaclava with a special technological material. MultiCam Alpine version.

items.name: Atomic Defense CQCM ballistic mask (Blasted Ice)
items.description: Atomic Defense's CQCM ballistic mask provides protection against short-range weapons including pistols, shotguns and knives. The cracks are painted, don't worry.

items.name: Twitch rare dogtag case
items.description: This case is meant to store dogtags of fighters with special distinctions. Don’t put ordinary mercs’ tags in it.

items.name: Loui Peeton deluxe wallet
items.description: A very rare wallet model from the famous brand. Suitable for truly valuable items: cash and rare keycards.

items.name: Hot Rod beverage cooler bag
items.description: A promotional cooler bag made by Hot Rod for the "Juice Time" campaign. The fabric honeycomb inside keeps drinks upright but makes the bag unsuitable for storing food.

items.name: Tigzresq splint
items.description: Sometimes nothing is more important than having a fracture splint within easy reach. The founder of Tigzresq knows this firsthand.

items.name: Tangerine
items.description: Only a crate of tangerines could be better. But in Tarkov, few are likely to have one.

items.name: Mazoni golden dumbbell
items.description: A dumbbell from the limited "Man-Machine" series by the renowned sports equipment manufacturer. They say this series was inspired by a famous athlete from Kazakhstan.

items.name: New Year ushanka hat
items.description: A white ushanka from Ragman's reserves, opened for New Year. Warms not only the body but also the soul.

items.name: Domontovich ushanka hat
items.description: A ushanka with an emblem occasionally spotted on the streets of Tarkov. Domontovich used to take part in the urban battles himself — until he disappeared. Some say Lightkeeper had something to do with it.

items.name: Nut Sack balaclava
items.description: This balaclava seems to have a strange smell. Its previous owner apparently wore it without ever taking it off.

items.name: Old house toilet key
items.description: A worn-out key to the outhouse in an old house somewhere on the edge of the Priozersk nature reserve. It feels like it's been used many times. Why the outhouse was locked and what treasures it might hide is a mystery.

items.name: Knight's Armament Company SR-25 7.62x51 marksman rifle (Taupe) Default
OPSMEN Earmor M32 headset (White)
items.description: The EARMOR M32 headset is an activated electronic communication hearing protector, ideal for tactical use. Manufactured by OPSMEN. Version in white color.

items.name: Galvion Caiman Hybrid helmet (MultiCam Alpine)
items.description: The Caiman Hybrid helmet is a new generation of lightweight special forces helmet. A series of modular accessories enhances the package, providing users with lightweight, comfortable and maximum head protection. Manufactured by Galvion. MultiCam Alpine version.

items.name: Galvion Caiman Hybrid Ballistic Mandible Guard (MultiCam Alpine)
items.description: A special additional ballistic protection for the Caiman Hybrid helmet, mounted on the side rails. Manufactured by Galvion. MultiCam Alpine version.

items.name: Galvion Caiman Hybrid Ballistic Applique (MultiCam Alpine)
items.description: An additional up-armor helmet shell attachment to elevate or enhance ballistic and fragmentation protection of the Caiman Hybrid Helmet. Manufactured by Galvion. MultiCam Alpine version.

items.name: HighCom Striker ULACH IIIA helmet (Winter Mesh Spray)
items.description: A combat helmet with the ears and back of the head protection, manufactured by HighCom. Spray painted with a winter mesh pattern for better camouflage.

items.name: Nut can
items.description: Despite everything, an empty coffee can remains one of the best containers for storing various small construction hardware.

items.name: Crye Precision JPC Plate Carrier (MultiCam)
items.description: The widely beloved Jumpable Plate Carrier (JPC) was designed to maximize operator mobility by reducing weight and bulk. Its modular system allows for personalized loadouts and quick gear adjustments depending on the mission. Manufactured by Crye Precision. MultiCam version.

items.name: Tac-Kek JayPC plate carrier (Black)
items.description: A cheap airsoft knockoff of the Crye Precision JPC plate carrier. Doesn't offer the comfort of the original JPC, but retains extensive customization options. It looks like the previous owner chose not to overload the carrier with pouches to stay as mobile as possible.

items.name: Tac-Kek JayPC plate carrier (OD Green)
items.description: A cheap airsoft knockoff of the Crye Precision JPC plate carrier. Doesn't offer the comfort of the original JPC, but retains extensive customization options. Someone attached an IOTV shoulder pad to this one to act as a groin protector.

items.name: Extreme cold weather face mask
items.description: An insulated mask with a fleece lining, designed for extremely low temperatures. The combination of practicality and an intimidating appearance makes it especially appealing to movie villains and to anyone heading out on a mission when it's truly freezing outside.

items.name: ANA Tactical M2 plate carrier (MultiCam Alpine)
items.description: The M2 vest is created with the use of the best experience of Russian special forces operators. The versatility of the system makes it possible to use this vest both when carrying out urban tasks and when performing tasks on rough terrain. Manufactured by ANA Tactical. MultiCam Alpine version.

items.name: CENS ProFlex DX5 tactical earplug
items.description: A high-end solution in tactical hearing protection. Custom-made to fit the wearer, so this matching size is a real stroke of luck.

items.name: ANA Tactical M2 plate carrier (MultiCam Alpine) Default
Tac-Kek SAPI Level III+ ballistic plate (Replica)
items.description: Small Arms Protective Insert (SAPI) is a ballistic plate for front and back pouches of a plate carrier. However, this is a lightweight non-ballistic replica, primarily used by airsofters and cosplayers.

items.name: Crye Precision JPC Plate Carrier (MultiCam) Default
Tac-Kek JayPC plate carrier (OD Green) Default
Can of duck pate
items.description: A spreadable meat product made from cooked ingredients, produced by Norvinsk Poultry Plant. No ducks were harmed in the making. Probably.

items.name: Poster tube
items.description: A true lifesaver for poster collectors. No more bent corners!

items.name: Maska-1SCh bulletproof helmet (Vida Edition)
items.description: The Maska-1 bulletproof protective helmet appeared in service in 1991 as a replacement for the "Sphere" helmet, designed for use by the Ministry of Internal Affairs of the Russian Federation armed forces. The Maska-1SCh ("Mask-1 Shield") modification features a bulletproof steel faceshield to ensure maximum protection of the user's face.

items.name: Maska-1SCh face shield (Vida Edition)
items.description: A special steel bulletproof faceshield for the Maska-1SCh ("Mask-1 Shield") helmet.

items.name: Escape from Duckov poster
items.description: Not everyone can escape Tarkov. But what about Duckov?

items.name: Duck figurine
items.description: A figurine of a duck, ready to face all the challenges of the universe with unwavering resolve.

items.name: Saiga-12K 12ga automatic shotgun (Redline)
items.description: A modified Saiga-12K smoothbore shotgun specially customized for the Arena champion known by the name JP. The custom build reduces barrel overheating during sustained fire and improves overall weapon reliability.

items.name: AK-74M Armacon Monolit 3 Gen.2 buffer tube adapter (Redline)
items.description: The Monolit 3 Gen. 2 adapter for mounting telescopic stocks on modern AK-pattern rifles and their civilian variants. Manufactured by Armacon. A special version made for the Arena champion JP’s Saiga shotgun.

items.name: AR-15 FAB Defense GL-CORE S buttstock (Redline)
items.description: A lightweight telescopic stock manufactured by FAB Defense. Features an ergonomically shaped rubber buttpad for quick shouldering and improved weapon handling. Red-colored decorative accents from JP himself give the stock a distinct personality.

items.name: AK Custom Arms AGS-74 PRO + Sniper Kit pistol grip (Redline)
items.description: A lightweight ergonomic pistol grip for AK series weapon systems, features the "Sniper Kit" palm shelf for user comfort and hand rest. Manufactured by Custom Arms. A special custom version for the Arena champion JP's shotgun.

items.name: Saiga-12 Custom Guns Hedon S handguard (Redline)
items.description: A lightweight aluminum handguard by Custom Guns, designed for installation on Saiga-12 shotguns. Equipped with a KeyMod interface for mounting rails and additional equipment. A special version made for the Arena champion JP's shotgun.

items.name: SOK-12 dust cover (Redline)
items.description: A receiver dust cover for the SOK-12 shotgun. Custom version for the Arena champion JP's shotgun.

items.name: IRBIS-GUN 30AL Foregrip
items.description: A lightweight aluminum tactical foregrip manufactured by IRBIS-GUN.

items.name: IRBIS-GUN 45AL Foregrip
items.description: A lightweight aluminum tactical foregrip manufactured by IRBIS-GUN.

items.name: AK Gladman Skeleton pistol grip
items.description: A lightweight ergonomic pistol grip for AK-family automatic rifles, manufactured by Gladman.

items.name: AR-15 Tyrant Designs MOD Chevron pistol grip (Black)
items.description: An aluminium rubber-overmolded anti-slip pistol grip for AR systems, manufactured by Tyrant Designs. Black version.

items.name: AR-15 Lead Star Arms Ravage stock
items.description: A lightweight buttstock for AR patter weapons. Manufactured by Lead Star Arms.

items.name: Steiner R1X reflex sight
items.description: The R1X reflex sight, designed for precision shooting for modern sporting rifles and shotguns. Manufactured by Steiner.

items.name: DI Optical FC1 reflex sight
items.description: A prismatic red dot reflex sight manufactured by DI Optical.

items.name: DI Optical FC1 sight mount
items.description: A special mount for the FC1 reflex sight. Manufactured by DI Optical.

items.name: DI Optical FC1 Spacer
items.description: A riser for the FC1 reflex sight. Manufactured by DI Optical.

items.name: AR-15 Tyrant Designs MOD Chevron pistol grip (Red)
items.description: An aluminium rubber-overmolded anti-slip pistol grip for AR systems, manufactured by Tyrant Designs. Red version.

items.name: AR-15 Lead Star Arms Ravage stock (Red)
items.description: A lightweight buttstock for AR patter weapons. Manufactured by Lead Star Arms. Red version.

items.name: AR-15 Lead Star Arms Ravage stock (Yellow)
items.description: A lightweight buttstock for AR patter weapons. Manufactured by Lead Star Arms. Yellow version.

items.name: AR-15 Phase5 Hexone buffer tube
items.description: A hexagonal buffer tube for attaching Phase5 buttstocks. Manufactured by Phase5.

items.name: AR-15 Phase5 Universal Mini Stock
items.description: A minimalistic buttstock manufactured by Phase5.

items.name: AR-15 Phase5 Universal Mini Stock (Red)
items.description: A minimalistic buttstock manufactured by Phase5. Red version.

items.name: AR-15 Phase5 Universal Mini Stock (Yellow)
items.description: A minimalistic buttstock manufactured by Phase5. Yellow version.

items.name: AR-15 Tyrant Designs MOD Chevron pistol grip (Yellow)
items.description: An aluminium rubber-overmolded anti-slip pistol grip for AR systems, manufactured by Tyrant Designs. Yellow version.

items.name: WARTECH TV-115 plate carrier (Black)
items.description: The TV-115 Operational armor system in a minimalist setup. Manufactured by WARTECH. Black version.

items.name: FORT Defender-2 body armor (Flecktarn)
items.description: The FORT OK "Defender-2" operational kit is a modification of the popular body armor FORT "Defender" designed for both VIP and for employees of operational combat units. Flecktarn camouflage version.

items.name: Direct Action Thunderbolt compact chest rig (Ranger Green)
items.description: The Thunderbolt fixed chest rig, containing all the basic utility pouches you'd need. Manufactured by Direct Action. Ranger Green version.

items.name: LBT-1961A Load Bearing Chest Rig (DNC)
items.description: A tactical load-bearing system designed to carry magazines, grenades, and special equipment, while using low-profile body armor. Manufactured by London Bridge Trading. Desert Night Camouflage version.

items.name: Cold Fear infrared balaclava (Blue Moss)
items.description: A quality balaclava with a special technological material. The knife print on the back is supposed to confuse the enemy sneaking from behind, but it probably won't. Blue Moss version.

items.name: Cold Fear infrared balaclava (DNC)
items.description: A quality balaclava with a special technological material. The print will definitely hide you from some rudimentary gen 1 night vision. Supposedly. Desert Night Camouflage version.

items.name: Cold Fear infrared balaclava (Kukla)
items.description: A quality balaclava with a special technological material. The knife print on the back is supposed to confuse the enemy sneaking from behind, but it probably won't. Kukla, or Smog, camouflage version.

items.name: Safariland Liberator HP 2.0 Hearing Protection Headset (MultiCam)
items.description: A next generation low-profile active headset, designed to protect the user's hearing from external factors. Manufactured by Safariland. MultiCam version.

items.name: Safariland Liberator HP 2.0 Hearing Protection Headset (Black)
items.description: A next generation low-profile active headset, designed to protect the user's hearing from external factors. Manufactured by Safariland. Black version.

items.name: Safariland Liberator HP 2.0 Hearing Protection Headset (MultiCam Black)
items.description: A next generation low-profile active headset, designed to protect the user's hearing from external factors. Manufactured by Safariland. MultiCam Black version.

items.name: Peltor ComTac VI headset (Black)
items.description: An improved version of the ComTac V communication headset, equipped with advanced environmental listening settings and an NIB (Natural Interaction Behavior) feature, allowing to communicate with other ComTac VI users in a certain proximity without having to use radios. Manufactured by 3M Peltor. Black version.

items.name: Peltor ComTac VI headset (Ranger Green)
items.description: An improved version of the ComTac V communication headset, equipped with advanced environmental listening settings and an NIB (Natural Interaction Behavior) feature, allowing to communicate with other ComTac VI users in a certain proximity without having to use radios. Manufactured by 3M Peltor. Ranger Green version.

items.name: TW EXFIL Peltor ComTac VI headset (Black)
items.description: An improved version of the ComTac V communication headset, equipped with advanced environmental listening settings and an NIB (Natural Interaction Behavior) feature, allowing to communicate with other ComTac VI users in a certain proximity without having to use radios. Equipped with a mount for attaching the headset to Team Wendy EXFIL helmets. Manufactured by 3M Peltor. Black version.

items.name: TW EXFIL Peltor ComTac VI headset (Ranger Green)
items.description: An improved version of the ComTac V communication headset, equipped with advanced environmental listening settings and an NIB (Natural Interaction Behavior) feature, allowing to communicate with other ComTac VI users in a certain proximity without having to use radios. Equipped with a mount for attaching the headset to Team Wendy EXFIL helmets. Manufactured by 3M Peltor. Ranger Green version.

items.name: Team Wendy EXFIL Ballistic Helmet (MultiCam)
items.description: One of the most recent tactical ballistic helmets with extensive customization capabilities. The EXFIL LTP (Lightweight, Tactical, Polymer) bump helmet provides impact protection for maritime environments and a stable, comfortable platform for mounting night vision and other accessories. The built-in NVG shroud utilizes an integrated Wilcox machined aluminum shroud insert. MultiCam version.

items.name: HighCom Striker ACHHC IIIA helmet (Coyote Brown)
items.description: A combat helmet manufactured by HighCom, the High Cut version. Does not feature any additional mounts. Coyote Brown version.

items.name: Crye Precision AirFrame Chops (Black)
items.description: An additional armor module for the Crye Precision AirFrame helmet, which protects the ear and the jaw area from fragmentation and small-caliber ricochets. Black version.

items.name: Crye Precision AirFrame Ears (Black)
items.description: An additional armor module for the Crye Precision AirFrame helmet, which protects the ear area from fragmentation and small-caliber ricochets. Black version.

items.name: Crye Precision AirFrame Chops (MultiCam)
items.description: An additional armor module for the Crye Precision AirFrame helmet, which protects the ear and the jaw area from fragmentation and small-caliber ricochets. MultiCam version.

items.name: Crye Precision AirFrame Ears (MultiCam)
items.description: An additional armor module for the Crye Precision AirFrame helmet, which protects the ear area from fragmentation and small-caliber ricochets. MultiCam version.

items.name: Crye Precision AirFrame Chops (OD Green)
items.description: An additional armor module for the Crye Precision AirFrame helmet, which protects the ear and the jaw area from fragmentation and small-caliber ricochets. OD Green version.

items.name: Crye Precision AirFrame Ears (OD Green)
items.description: An additional armor module for the Crye Precision AirFrame helmet, which protects the ear area from fragmentation and small-caliber ricochets. OD Green version.

items.name: Crye Precision AirFrame Chops (Shark)
items.description: An additional armor module for the Crye Precision AirFrame helmet, which protects the ear and the jaw area from fragmentation and small-caliber ricochets. Custom painted with a shark teeth pattern.

items.name: Crye Precision AirFrame Ears (Coyote)
items.description: An additional armor module for the Crye Precision AirFrame helmet, which protects the ear area from fragmentation and small-caliber ricochets. Coyote version.

items.name: Crye Precision AirFrame helmet (Mesh Green)
items.description: The AirFrame ballistic helmet sets the standards in protection, comfort, and modularity. The unique overlapping shell design of the AirFrame creates an integrated vent that provides passive cooling and can reduce the damaging effects of explosive blast waves. Highly modular. Manufactured by Crye Precision.

items.name: Crye Precision AirFrame helmet (OD Green)
items.description: The AirFrame ballistic helmet sets the standards in protection, comfort, and modularity. The unique overlapping shell design of the AirFrame creates an integrated vent that provides passive cooling and can reduce the damaging effects of explosive blast waves. Highly modular. Manufactured by Crye Precision. OD Green version.

items.name: Crye Precision AirFrame helmet (Shark)
items.description: The AirFrame ballistic helmet sets the standards in protection, comfort, and modularity. The unique overlapping shell design of the AirFrame creates an integrated vent that provides passive cooling and can reduce the damaging effects of explosive blast waves. Highly modular. Manufactured by Crye Precision. The added eye stickers complete the Shark look when combined with the painted chops.

items.name: Crye Precision AirFrame helmet (Tan)
items.description: The AirFrame ballistic helmet sets the standards in protection, comfort, and modularity. The unique overlapping shell design of the AirFrame creates an integrated vent that provides passive cooling and can reduce the damaging effects of explosive blast waves. Highly modular. Manufactured by Crye Precision.

items.name: Crye Precision AirFrame M-LOK helmet (Black)
items.description: The AirFrame ballistic helmet sets the standards in protection, comfort, and modularity. The unique overlapping shell design of the AirFrame creates an integrated vent that provides passive cooling and can reduce the damaging effects of explosive blast waves. Equipped with M-LOK rails. Manufactured by Crye Precision. Black version.

items.name: Crye Precision AirFrame M-LOK helmet (Bull)
items.description: A Crye Precision AirFrame ballistic helmet fitted with M-LOK accessory rails. This configuration is most commonly seen among fans of JP, one of the Arena Champions. Rumor has it that this is the exact type of helmet he once tossed into the air and shot with his final round when he first became champion.

items.name: Crye Precision AirFrame helmet (Old School)
items.description: A Crye Precision AirFrame ballistic helmet without accessory rails. When JP was brought into the cleanup crew on Tagilla’s recommendation, this became his first trophy, taken from one of the Arena fighters.

items.name: AN/AVS-6&9 NVG mount
items.description: An old USGI adapter mount for installing AN/AVS-6 and AN/AVS-9 night vision goggles, used by US Forces in the 1980s. Wonder how this ancient thing turned up in Tarkov.

items.name: Atlant Armour Titan Aramid helmet (OD Green)
items.description: The Titan Aramid ballistic helmet in the form factor copying the Crye Precision AirFrame helmet. Made entirely of aramid, providing an optimal balance between protection and mobility. Equipped with accessory rails and a mount for additional devices. Manufactured by Atlant Armour. OD Green version.

items.name: Atlant Armour Titan Aramid helmet (MultiCam)
items.description: The Titan Aramid ballistic helmet in the form factor copying the Crye Precision AirFrame helmet. Made entirely of aramid, providing an optimal balance between protection and mobility. Equipped with accessory rails and a mount for additional devices. Manufactured by Atlant Armour. MultiCam version.

items.name: Atlant Armour Titan Aramid helmet (Rudiarius)
items.description: The Titan Aramid ballistic helmet in the form factor copied from the Crye Precision AirFrame helmet. Manufactured by Atlant Armour. The decorations and additional protection were firmly attached by Champion JP, a well-known enthusiast of aggressive close-quarters combat.

items.name: Baseball cap (Zaebtsa Berezka)
items.description: A baseball cap in a KLMK Winter camouflage. For those who always wanna look "supreme".

items.name: Baseball cap (Zaebtsa Flecktarn)
items.description: A baseball cap in a Flecktarn camouflage. For those who always wanna look "supreme".

items.name: Baseball cap (Boston)
items.description: A denim cap perfect for those who want to show some style. Must only be worn with the brim facing backward - rules of the Arena.

items.name: Baseball cap (MultiCam Black)
items.description: A baseball cap in a MultiCam Black camouflage, worn only with the brim facing backward. Ignore and Override.

items.name: Crye Precision AirFrame helmet (Old School) Default
FORT Redut-M body armor (Prisoner of the Arena)
items.description: A modified version of the well-proven FORT “Redut” body armor, used by several FSB special units. Someone from the cleanup crew spent quite some time painting a "cool skull" and barbed wire on it. Probably thought it looked badass.

items.name: Stich Profi Chest Rig MK2 (Recon, EMR)
items.description: The "Chest-Rig" tactical system can be used as an independent piece of equipment or as an addition to body armor without the MOLLE system. Suitable for combat training instructors, special forces units. Recon preset in EMR camouflage. Manufactured by Stich Profi.

items.name: LBT-1961A Load Bearing Chest Rig (MultiCam)
items.description: A tactical load-bearing system designed to carry magazines, grenades, and special equipment, while using low-profile body armor. Manufactured by London Bridge Trading. MultiCam version.

items.name: Revision ShadowStrike tactical glasses (Tan)
items.description: Ballistic glasses with impact-resistant polycarbonate lenses, manufactured by Revision. Tan version.

items.name: Revision ShadowStrike tactical glasses (Gray)
items.description: Ballistic glasses with impact-resistant polycarbonate lenses, manufactured by Revision. Gray version.

items.name: Wiley X SPEAR ballistic goggles (Black)
items.description: Lightweight ballistic glasses manufactured by Wiley X. Black version.

items.name: Wiley X SPEAR ballistic goggles (Tan)
items.description: Lightweight ballistic glasses manufactured by Wiley X. Tan version.

items.name: FORT Redut-M body armor (Black)
items.description: “Redut-M” is a modified version of the well-proven Redut body armor, which is in service of special units of the FSB. The vest is based on advanced technologies in the field of individual armor. Due to the optimized form of armor elements and the outer cover with a special damping-ventilation system, the Redut M armored vest has excellent functional qualities, which facilitates active actions, including those associated with the use of vehicles and in confined spaces. Black version.

items.name: Stich Profi Plate Carrier V2 (A-TACS FG)
items.description: An improved lightweight version of the standard plate carrier manufactured by Stich Profi. A-TACS FG version.

items.name: Stich Profi Plate Carrier V2 (Coyote)
items.description: An improved lightweight version of the standard plate carrier manufactured by Stich Profi. Coyote color version.

items.name: Stich Profi Plate Carrier V2 (Coyote) Default
Stich Profi Plate Carrier V2 (A-TACS FG) Default
FORT Gladiator-S plate carrier (Death is Inevitable)
items.description: The Gladiator-S body armor by FORT, customized by the Arena Champion nicknamed JP. Since his very first appearance in the Arena as a gladiator, he never even thought of washing the blood off it. Why would he? It’s a symbol of strength.

items.name: FORT Gladiator-S plate carrier (Lightweight, Viking)
items.description: A specialized body armor developed for the FSB’s Special Purpose Center, featuring high functionality and modularity. The lightweight version is designed to provide maximum mobility while protecting vital organs. This black version has been customized by one of the Arena fighters.

items.name: FORT Gladiator-S plate carrier (Lightweight, MultiCam)
items.description: A specialized body armor developed for the FSB’s Special Purpose Center, featuring high functionality and modularity. The lightweight version is designed to provide maximum mobility while protecting vital organs. MultiCam version.

items.name: FORT Gladiator-S plate carrier (Lightweight, MultiCam)
items.description: A specialized body armor developed for the FSB’s Special Purpose Center, featuring high functionality and modularity. MultiCam version.

items.name: First Spear Strandhogg plate carrier (MultiCam Black)
items.description: Taking its name from an Old Norse Viking term for a lightning raid, Strandhögg was one of the first formalized battle tactics to use covert infiltrators in advance of an actual raiding operation. Strandhögg was a tactical game-changer in its time, just like the technological advances First Spear is bringing forward in this line of plate carriers.

items.name: Haley Strategic D3CRX Chest Harness (Black)
items.description: The Haley Strategic D3CRX Combat chest rig is one of the most respected PMC rig systems. Ease and comfort of use are supported by the presence of the optimal number of pouches.

items.name: FORT Gladiator-S plate carrier (Gray)
items.description: A specialized body armor developed for the FSB’s Special Purpose Center, featuring high functionality and modularity. Gray version.

items.name: Echo Belli crate
items.description: A reward for participation in Season 2 BattlePass “Casus Belli”. Rumor has it, it contains items somehow connected to the Arena Champion known as JP. Designed for the most reckless gladiators and can only be opened within the Arena.

items.name: First Spear Strandhogg plate carrier (MultiCam Black) Default
FORT Redut-M body armor (Prisoner of the Arena) Default
Walker's Razor Digital headset (Molon Labe)
items.description: The Razor electronic ear muffs feature an ultra low-profile design and a rubberized coating for added durability and comfort, also providing optimal hearing protection. Manufactured by Walker's. A version for the true gladiators.

FORT Gladiator-S plate carrier (Lightweight, Viking) Default
FORT Gladiator-S plate carrier (Death is Inevitable) Default
Cold Fear infrared balaclava (M90)
items.description: A quality balaclava with a special technological material. But we do not need it for some gimmicky materials. We need it to look tactical and dripped out with the Swedish M90 camouflage.

items.name: FORT Gladiator-S plate carrier (Lightweight, MultiCam) Default
TarCoin
items.description: A mysterious currency that appeared in Tarkov after the Contract Wars had already begun. The motto stamped on the coin refers to a certain well-known company... A rare item, prized by everyone without exception.
